I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: **If we lose this district, our chances at everything - the Senate, the House, and the White House - will be CRUSHED.**

I sincerely hope you can pitch in just a few dollars before our end of month deadline. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Obama Chef Death Investigation UPDATE
body:
Biden Censorship Lawsuit

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Sues for Audio/Visual Recordings Related to Obama
Chef’s Death

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30556&F=T&&hash=4342bec9032aebea329dc12139e5d1da4d7ea783f2d74b99132d25600a8f315e]
We’re still not being provided complete information about the
death of the Obamas’ personal chef Tafari Campbell in July 2023 in
the Edgartown Great Pond next to Obama’s sea-side estate.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA suit) against the
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for video recordings relating to
the death (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland
Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30557&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLXRhZmFyaS1jYW1wYmVsbC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxOTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c5cb12a8762a626b7ee425fadf3b43787a122eeaf1cc217b9d6ca233450c070f
_(No. 1:23-cv-03194)). We recently uncovered the existence of a Secret
Service video tied to the incident in response to a separate public
records request
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30518&F=T&&hash=64edba3eaf117ff3d49eec1ec22a3ae40fe652bcd9956253a53a27dbd5901944].

On August 9, 2023, we submitted a FOIA request to the Secret Service,
a component of DHS, seeking copies of:

> All audio/visual recordings (including dispatch calls, fixed camera
> footage, internal USSS communications, and communications with other
> law enforcement and EMS personnel), USSS emails, incident reports,
> witness statements, investigative reports, and all other records
> related to the death of Tafari Campbell on July 23-24, 2023, in the
> Edgartown Great Pond.
Earlier this month, we received 40 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30518&F=T&&hash=64edba3eaf117ff3d49eec1ec22a3ae40fe652bcd9956253a53a27dbd5901944]
of records from the Massachusetts State Police that include a July 24,
2023, homicide/death report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21hc3Mtc3RhdGUtcG9saWNlLW9iYW1hLWNoZWYtdGFmYXJpLWNhbXBiZWxsLW9jdG9iZXItMjAyMy1wZy03LTIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c580ccebb15f9efe0d15be80595b401a4b2e1b58969464f3270b6fb7848a81a7]
written by Mass. State Trooper Dustin Shaw, listing the details of the
investigation into Campbell’s death. In the narrative portion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30503&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21hc3Mtc3RhdGUtcG9saWNlLW9iYW1hLWNoZWYtdGFmYXJpLWNhbXBiZWxsLW9jdG9iZXItMjAyMy1wZy0xMy0yMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f71a121378afce93a275d1a1a554f81535106b3bb2875847b95a2409245831f2]
Shaw writes:

The following is a summary of my observations of the video footage
provided to me from this specific vantage point and is not intended to
be an exact depiction of the overall entirety of the surveillance
footage from [redacted] On Sunday, July 23, 2023, at approximately:

* 6:54 PM; two (2) individuals identified as CAMPBELL and [redacted]
are observed walking on the boardwalk from the area of the residence,
toward the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond. Both CAMPBELL’S and
[redacted] appearance and clothing are consistent with prior
descriptions. Once near the shoreline, it appears that CAMPBELL and
[redacted] obtain paddleboards and paddles from a small alcove near
the shoreline, and subsequently enter the water.
* 7:40 PM; Secret Service Agent [redacted] (Rescue Swimmer) is
observed running from his assigned post towards the shoreline of
Edgartown Great Pond, utilizing his handheld radio.
* 7:42 PM; Agent [redacted] observed running from the shoreline of
Edgartown Great Pond, towards the area of the Command Post
* 7:43 PM; Agent [redacted] observed running back to shoreline of
Edgartown Great Pond.
* 7:50 PM; USSS boat launches.
* 7:57 PM; USSS vehicle/first responder vehicle arrives to the area
of the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond.
* 7:58 PM; First Edgartown Police vehicle arrives to the area of the
shoreline.
* 7:59 PM; Second Edgartown Police vehicle arrives to the area of
the shoreline.

A request has been made to obtain a copy of the above-described video
and is pending its release as of the time of this report.

The records also indicate the presence of Barack Obama for a witness
interview in the death investigation. The records, which are heavily
redacted, indicate Barack Obama arrived at the emergency response
scene via motorcade. A short time later, a cold, wet woman, who was a
witness, arrived. The next morning, the eyewitness was interviewed in
the Obama residence, seemingly with Barack Obama again present. The
State Police records show authorities concluded “no foul play” in
Campbell’s “accidental” death.

(On October 24, 2023, the _Daily Mail_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30554&F=T&&hash=1696a4c1b79160827234ed9ae30c679e1657bea1e3c814a2e88a83d777c89e9e]
obtained the initial 911 call as well as a follow-up call made by
Barack Obama's Secret Service agents after chef Tafari Campbell fell
off a paddle board into the Edgartown Great Pond on Martha's
Vineyard.)

In August 2023, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30125&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb2JhbWFzLXBlcnNvbmFsLWNoZWYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=46c3520a6577674aba817b6f00fcd91ab5d77fde2c0228da780d1ffebef96596]
from the
Edgarton, Mass., Police Department that showed the Secret Service
reported Obama’s Personal Chef Tafari Campbell missing and that the
body was found using sonar. The records also detail that clothing was
found separate from the body and that he was not wearing a life vest.

But is the Secret Service hiding the video that can provide the public
more information about the death of Barack Obama’s personal chef?
The Secret Service’s involvement in this death investigation had
been treated like a state secret until we uncovered it. Strange.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF FBI PAYMENTS REFERENCED IN
‘TWITTER FILES’

The First Amendment is in “first place” in the amendments to the
U.S. Constitution because of the importance of free speech for the
functioning of our republic. So, the Biden administration’s many
efforts to control what Americans say and think are blatantly
unconstitutional and wide-ranging – and expensive!

We just filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the
Department of Justice for records of any payments made by the FBI to
Twitter (now known as X) (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of
Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30532&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXR3aXR0ZXItcHltdHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAzMDA0L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3cf8e6a205c9f928ebe199cc08b46dad832e1cb5cda5c478ce49dea573488b3e
_(No. 1:23-cv-03004)). The payments were disclosed in internal Twitter
documents (the “Twitter Files”) made available by Elon Musk to
journalists.

In a December 19, 2022, report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30533&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9zaGVsbGVuYmVyZ2VyL3N0YXR1cy8xNjA0OTA4NjcwMDYzOTA2ODE3P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2fc6b9e924611dee6369734cd842fe0078494764fab49678a9b4fb5e9527502f]
on
“Twitter Files,” independent journalist Michael Shellenberger
revealed an email which states the FBI paid Twitter nearly $3.5
million of U.S. taxpayer money as “reimbursement for the time spent
processing requests from the FBI” from October 2019 to February
2021.

We sued after the FBI failed to respond adequately to a December 24,
2022, FOIA request for:

> All records documenting any payments made to Twitter, Inc. and/or
> any employee thereof by the Federal Bureau of Investigation. This
> request includes, but is not limited to, all related purchase
> orders, expense requests and approvals, and similar records.
>
> All contracts or similar records documenting the purpose or basis of
> any payment described in part one of this request.
In a January 30, 2023, letter, the FBI claimed that it could
“neither confirm nor deny the existence of records responsive to
your request pursuant to FOIA Exemption (b)(7)(E),” which refers to
investigation techniques
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZvaWEtZXhlbXB0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=df375e4c4bef4c3fb967a2daed5a2d679eb7612cdb16ca931642008bd09fc5ad].

In his December 19, 2022, report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30533&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9zaGVsbGVuYmVyZ2VyL3N0YXR1cy8xNjA0OTA4NjcwMDYzOTA2ODE3P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2fc6b9e924611dee6369734cd842fe0078494764fab49678a9b4fb5e9527502f],
Shellenberger revealed an email dated February 10, 2021, in which an
unidentified Twitter employee tells then-Twitter Deputy General
Counsel Jim Baker
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30535&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9obHMuaGFydmFyZC5lZHUvZmFjdWx0eS9qYW1lcy1hLWJha2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=965890ad6f843e0a877081d6a8cf678c72f497ce62733f6238407a5f1f5838e0]
and
then-General Counsel Sean Edgett
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30536&F=T&&hash=2efb3cd319bac3c893374ee58d3ff11a76be3380d09337dba80dbec19a7c9f0f]
that “we have collected $3,415,323 since October 2019!”

The email explains that Twitter’s Safety, Content & Law Enforcement
(SCALE) division instituted a “reimbursement program” in exchange
for devoting staff hours to “processing requests from the FBI.”

Baker and Edgett were fired
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30537&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnVzaW5lc3NpbnNpZGVyLmNvbS9lbG9uLW11c2stZmlyZWQtamFtZXMtYmFrZXItZGVwdXR5LWdlbmVyYWwtY291bnNlbC10d2l0dGVyLWZpbGVzLTIwMjItMTI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0b5e0a057ed08ea7aeb9beffa78991cb81cc49a5adf231690fce6c8a9f554f34]
after Elon Musk bought the social media platform in October 2022.
(Prior to joining Twitter, Baker had been the FBI’s top lawyer under
James Comey.)

The notorious relationship between the FBI and Twitter includes
millions in taxpayer cash. The Justice Department’s and FBI’s
cover-up of this collusion shows they have something to hide.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=28194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=dcba214496d3ef40d0cc4016be30bee78308d522f87dfe183db13910dd9ceb3d]
documents
revealing how California state officials pressured social media
companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about
the 2020 election.

MOST BIDEN BORDER ‘APP’ USERS ARE RELEASED, INCLUDING THOSE FROM
‘HOSTILE NATIONS’

The Biden administration developed a computer “app” to let
illegals into the country indiscriminately. This includes Russians,
Chinese, Yemenis, Afghans, Lebanese, Iraqis, Pakistanis, Egyptians,
Iranians and Uzbeks. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30558&F=T&&hash=6a0665c2e81ce7423cde42a80aada6c288c0c03bbe1efc6f89be371e505132dc

> The situation along the Mexican border is worse than ever with yet
> another record-breaking year for illegal immigration that ended
> fiscal 2023 with an appalling 2.48 million migrants, surpassing what
> was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. In
> September, the last month of the fiscal year, federal agents
> encountered a whopping 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an
> all-time high for a single month and a substantial increase over
> August when Customs and Border Protection (CBP) encountered 232,963
> migrants. In an apparent effort to bury the magnitude of the border
> crisis, the Biden administration released the year-end statistics
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30559&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9uZXdzcm9vbS9uYXRpb25hbC1tZWRpYS1yZWxlYXNlL2NicC1yZWxlYXNlcy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMy1tb250aGx5LXVwZGF0ZT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ce80a5279cfd29e580c665e08153397c6d589dc30c0e9b86c25f7357718db900]
> during the weekend and the ghastly figures have predictably received
> anemic media coverage. So has a troublesome congressional report,
> issued two days later, outlining how the Biden administration frees
> the overwhelming majority of illegal aliens who use its CBP One App
> inside the country, including those from “hostile nations
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65580&L=30560&F=T&&hash=2140c4c8446f2901ba4ea34a7550643c4de7b63fdb48fa1dfa1810f465173f72
>
> The new year-end CBP data shows that the Tucson sector in Arizona
> saw an unprecedented 109% spike in illegal immigrants during the
> last month of the fiscal year compared to August and a total 48%
> increase for 2023, from 251,984 last year to 373,625. The El Paso
> crossing in Texas had a 39% boost in illegal immigration compared to
> last year with 427,471 crossings compared to 307,844 in 2022. Texas
> sectors located south of El Paso also experienced large numbers of
> illegal immigrants, with Del Rio recording 393,226 and Rio Grande
> Valley 338,337. California got bombarded as well with a 31% hike in
> illegal aliens in San Diego and a 30% rise in El Centro. In what may
> seem like a bad joke, CBP, the Department of Homeland Security’s
> (DHS) 60,000-employee “unified border entity,” writes this in
> the announcement accompanying the 2023 figures: “DHS continues to
> enforce United States immigration laws while strengthening the
> consequences for those who cross our border unlawfully.”
>
> The 2023 stats include a section on the CBP One mobile application
> that is also laughable because it describes it as a key component of
> DHS’s efforts to incentivize lawful, safe and orderly pathways
> into the U.S. since it was introduced by the Biden administration in
> January. The app lets over 1,400 foreigners make appointments daily
> to access ports of entry where federal agents determine
> admissibility. Through the end of September nearly 278,000
> individuals have successfully scheduled appointments to present at a
> U.S. port of entry, according to the newly released records. “CBP
> is continually monitoring and evaluating the application to ensure
> its functionality and guard against bad actors,” the agency writes
> in the document accompanying the fresh batch of stats.
>
> The reality is that DHS’s expanded use of the CBP One app has led
> to the release of hundreds of thousands of otherwise inadmissible
> illegal immigrants into the United States, records obtained by a
> congressional panel show. Of the inadmissible aliens who scheduled
> appointments through the controversial app 95.8% (278,431) were
> issued a Notice to Appear (NTA) and released into the country on
> parole, according to the information made public this week by the
> House Committee on Homeland Security. This includes individuals from
> “countries of concern” that made appointments through the app
> and were overwhelmingly released into the U.S. Among them are
> Russians, Chinese, Yemenis, Afghans, Lebanese, Iraqis, Pakistanis,
> Egyptians, Iranians and Uzbeks. Nearly all the Russian, Afghan,
> Chinese and Iranian nationals who made CBP One appointments were
> released in the U.S., according to the records. Most of the Latin
> Americans were also freed into the country, including illegal
> immigrants from Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala and Venezuela that used
> the app. “At a time when global tensions are rising, and our
> enemies are growing bolder, releasing tens of thousands of these
> people into our communities—especially when they have not received
> adequate, if any, vetting—is irresponsible,” said House
> Committee on Homeland Security Chairman Mark Green, an emergency
> room physician from Tennessee.

clean_body: Biden Censorship Lawsuit [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues for Audio/Visual Recordings Related to Obama Chef’s Death [] We’re still not being provided complete information about the death of the Obamas’ personal chef Tafari Campbell in July 2023 in the Edgartown Great Pond next to Obama’s sea-side estate. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA suit) against the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for video recordings relating to the death (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:23-cv-03194)). We recently uncovered the existence of a Secret Service video tied to the incident in response to a separate public records request []. On August 9, 2023, we submitted a FOIA request to the Secret Service, a component of DHS, seeking copies of: All audio/visual recordings (including dispatch calls, fixed camera footage, internal USSS communications, and communications with other law enforcement and EMS personnel), USSS emails, incident reports, witness statements, investigative reports, and all other records related to the death of Tafari Campbell on July 23-24, 2023, in the Edgartown Great Pond. Earlier this month, we received 40 pages [] of records from the Massachusetts State Police that include a July 24, 2023, homicide/death report [] written by Mass. State Trooper Dustin Shaw, listing the details of the investigation into Campbell’s death. In the narrative portion [] Shaw writes: The following is a summary of my observations of the video footage provided to me from this specific vantage point and is not intended to be an exact depiction of the overall entirety of the surveillance footage from [redacted] On Sunday, July 23, 2023, at approximately: 6:54 PM; two (2) individuals identified as CAMPBELL and [redacted] are observed walking on the boardwalk from the area of the residence, toward the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond. Both CAMPBELL’S and [redacted] appearance and clothing are consistent with prior descriptions. Once near the shoreline, it appears that CAMPBELL and [redacted] obtain paddleboards and paddles from a small alcove near the shoreline, and subsequently enter the water. 7:40 PM; Secret Service Agent [redacted] (Rescue Swimmer) is observed running from his assigned post towards the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond, utilizing his handheld radio. 7:42 PM; Agent [redacted] observed running from the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond, towards the area of the Command Post 7:43 PM; Agent [redacted] observed running back to shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond. 7:50 PM; USSS boat launches. 7:57 PM; USSS vehicle/first responder vehicle arrives to the area of the shoreline of Edgartown Great Pond. 7:58 PM; First Edgartown Police vehicle arrives to the area of the shoreline. 7:59 PM; Second Edgartown Police vehicle arrives to the area of the shoreline. A request has been made to obtain a copy of the above-described video and is pending its release as of the time of this report. The records also indicate the presence of Barack Obama for a witness interview in the death investigation. The records, which are heavily redacted, indicate Barack Obama arrived at the emergency response scene via motorcade. A short time later, a cold, wet woman, who was a witness, arrived. The next morning, the eyewitness was interviewed in the Obama residence, seemingly with Barack Obama again present. The State Police records show authorities concluded “no foul play” in Campbell’s “accidental” death. (On October 24, 2023, the Daily Mail [] obtained the initial 911 call as well as a follow-up call made by Barack Obama's Secret Service agents after chef Tafari Campbell fell off a paddle board into the Edgartown Great Pond on Martha's Vineyard.) In August 2023, we released records [] from the Edgarton, Mass., Police Department that showed the Secret Service reported Obama’s Personal Chef Tafari Campbell missing and that the body was found using sonar. The records also detail that clothing was found separate from the body and that he was not wearing a life vest. But is the Secret Service hiding the video that can provide the public more information about the death of Barack Obama’s personal chef? The Secret Service’s involvement in this death investigation had been treated like a state secret until we uncovered it. Strange. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF FBI PAYMENTS REFERENCED IN ‘TWITTER FILES’ The First Amendment is in “first place” in the amendments to the U.S. Constitution because of the importance of free speech for the functioning of our republic. So, the Biden administration’s many efforts to control what Americans say and think are blatantly unconstitutional and wide-ranging – and expensive! We just filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Justice for records of any payments made by the FBI to Twitter (now known as X) (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:23-cv-03004)). The payments were disclosed in internal Twitter documents (the “Twitter Files”) made available by Elon Musk to journalists. In a December 19, 2022, report [] on “Twitter Files,” independent journalist Michael Shellenberger revealed an email which states the FBI paid Twitter nearly $3.5 million of U.S. taxpayer money as “reimbursement for the time spent processing requests from the FBI” from October 2019 to February 2021. We sued after the FBI failed to respond adequately to a December 24, 2022, FOIA request for: All records documenting any payments made to Twitter, Inc. and/or any employee thereof by the Federal Bureau of Investigation. This request includes, but is not limited to, all related purchase orders, expense requests and approvals, and similar records. All contracts or similar records documenting the purpose or basis of any payment described in part one of this request. In a January 30, 2023, letter, the FBI claimed that it could “neither confirm nor deny the existence of records responsive to your request pursuant to FOIA Exemption (b)(7)(E),” which refers to investigation techniques []. In his December 19, 2022, report [], Shellenberger revealed an email dated February 10, 2021, in which an unidentified Twitter employee tells then-Twitter Deputy General Counsel Jim Baker [] and then-General Counsel Sean Edgett [] that “we have collected $3,415,323 since October 2019!” The email explains that Twitter’s Safety, Content & Law Enforcement (SCALE) division instituted a “reimbursement program” in exchange for devoting staff hours to “processing requests from the FBI.” Baker and Edgett were fired [] after Elon Musk bought the social media platform in October 2022. (Prior to joining Twitter, Baker had been the FBI’s top lawyer under James Comey.) The notorious relationship between the FBI and Twitter includes millions in taxpayer cash. The Justice Department’s and FBI’s cover-up of this collusion shows they have something to hide. We have just produced a four-part documentary, “Censored and Controlled [ that details the coordinated effort by the FBI and other government agencies and Big Tech to censor and suppress information on topics such as Hunter Biden’s laptop, COVID-19, and election debates. And we have been in the forefront of uncovering government efforts to censor free speech and suppress opposition to its unconstitutional actions, including the U.S. Government’s dissemination of its own disinformation. For a deeper dive into the issue, here are some of the key lawsuits and disclosures about the dire threat to free speech in America: Recently, we sued [] the U.S. Office of the Director of National Intelligence [] (ODNI) for records concerning censorship of social media users. In April 2023, we filed [] two lawsuits against the Department of Justice and other federal agencies for communications between the agencies and Facebook and Twitter regarding the government’s involvement in content moderation and censorship on the social media platforms. In June 2023, we sued [] DHS for all records of communications tied to the Election Integrity Partnership. Based on representations from the EIP (see here [] and here []), the federal government, social media companies, the EIP, the Center for Internet Security [] (a non-profit organization funded partly by DHS and the Defense Department []) and numerous other leftist groups communicated privately via the Jira [] software platform developed by Atlassian. In February 2023, we sued [] the U.S. Department Homeland Security (DHS) for records showing cooperation between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA) and social media platforms to censor and suppress free speech. In January 2023 we sued [] the DOJ for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored our video about Biden corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and our YouTube account was suspended for a week. Judicial Watch continues to post its video [] content on its Rumble channel (). In July 2021, we uncovered [] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising was given to the CDC by social media companies. In May 2021, we revealed [] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In April 2021, we published [] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. MOST BIDEN BORDER ‘APP’ USERS ARE RELEASED, INCLUDING THOSE FROM ‘HOSTILE NATIONS’ The Biden administration developed a computer “app” to let illegals into the country indiscriminately. This includes Russians, Chinese, Yemenis, Afghans, Lebanese, Iraqis, Pakistanis, Egyptians, Iranians and Uzbeks. Our Corruption Chronicles blog explains [ The situation along the Mexican border is worse than ever with yet another record-breaking year for illegal immigration that ended fiscal 2023 with an appalling 2.48 million migrants, surpassing what was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. In September, the last month of the fiscal year, federal agents encountered a whopping 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an all-time high for a single month and a substantial increase over August when Customs and Border Protection (CBP) encountered 232,963 migrants. In an apparent effort to bury the magnitude of the border crisis, the Biden administration released the year-end statistics [] during the weekend and the ghastly figures have predictably received anemic media coverage. So has a troublesome congressional report, issued two days later, outlining how the Biden administration frees the overwhelming majority of illegal aliens who use its CBP One App inside the country, including those from “hostile nations [ The new year-end CBP data shows that the Tucson sector in Arizona saw an unprecedented 109% spike in illegal immigrants during the last month of the fiscal year compared to August and a total 48% increase for 2023, from 251,984 last year to 373,625. The El Paso crossing in Texas had a 39% boost in illegal immigration compared to last year with 427,471 crossings compared to 307,844 in 2022. Texas sectors located south of El Paso also experienced large numbers of illegal immigrants, with Del Rio recording 393,226 and Rio Grande Valley 338,337. California got bombarded as well with a 31% hike in illegal aliens in San Diego and a 30% rise in El Centro. In what may seem like a bad joke, CBP, the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) 60,000-employee “unified border entity,” writes this in the announcement accompanying the 2023 figures: “DHS continues to enforce United States immigration laws while strengthening the consequences for those who cross our border unlawfully.” The 2023 stats include a section on the CBP One mobile application that is also laughable because it describes it as a key component of DHS’s efforts to incentivize lawful, safe and orderly pathways into the U.S. since it was introduced by the Biden administration in January. The app lets over 1,400 foreigners make appointments daily to access ports of entry where federal agents determine admissibility. Through the end of September nearly 278,000 individuals have successfully scheduled appointments to present at a U.S. port of entry, according to the newly released records. “CBP is continually monitoring and evaluating the application to ensure its functionality and guard against bad actors,” the agency writes in the document accompanying the fresh batch of stats. The reality is that DHS’s expanded use of the CBP One app has led to the release of hundreds of thousands of otherwise inadmissible illegal immigrants into the United States, records obtained by a congressional panel show. Of the inadmissible aliens who scheduled appointments through the controversial app 95.8% (278,431) were issued a Notice to Appear (NTA) and released into the country on parole, according to the information made public this week by the House Committee on Homeland Security. This includes individuals from “countries of concern” that made appointments through the app and were overwhelmingly released into the U.S. Among them are Russians, Chinese, Yemenis, Afghans, Lebanese, Iraqis, Pakistanis, Egyptians, Iranians and Uzbeks. Nearly all the Russian, Afghan, Chinese and Iranian nationals who made CBP One appointments were released in the U.S., according to the records. Most of the Latin Americans were also freed into the country, including illegal immigrants from Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala and Venezuela that used the app. “At a time when global tensions are rising, and our enemies are growing bolder, releasing tens of thousands of these people into our communities—especially when they have not received adequate, if any, vetting—is irresponsible,” said House Committee on Homeland Security Chairman Mark Green, an emergency room physician from Tennessee. ‘ASKING FOR TROUBLE:’ STATE GIVES ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS DRIVER’S LICENSE THAT LOOKS EXACTLY LIKE LEGAL RESIDENTS’ Our border crisis is made worse by left-wing state and local governments that reward and protect illegal aliens. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest []. This month Minnesota became the latest state to allow illegal immigrants to get a driver’s license as part of a burgeoning national trend to reward undocumented residents with government benefits. In all, 19 states and the District of Columbia have passed bills that permit foreigners living in the U.S. illegally to obtain driver’s licenses. Earlier this year laws went into effect in Massachusetts and Rhode Island and a few weeks ago Minnesota’s measure, known as Driver’s Licenses for All [], went into effect. Officials estimate that about 80,000 illegal immigrants [] [ were previously disqualified from obtaining the cards in the North Star state will now be allowed to get them. California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, Utah, Vermont, Virginia, and Washington are the other states that let illegal aliens get driver’s licenses. Typically, candidates need only to present a foreign passport or birth certificate or a consular card along with evidence that they live in the state. Open border groups and their leftist allies in local governments across the nation assert that granting illegal aliens driver’s licenses benefits everyone because it makes roads safer, therefore improving public safety. In New York City, officials cite unspecified “data” that shows expanding driver’s license eligibility to illegal immigrants improves road safety and lowers insurance premiums for all. Besides “making our roads safer,” Illinois’ governor says giving illegal aliens licenses decreases stigma and creates a more equitable system for all. Minnesota officials used similar narratives to push through their legislation. The governor, Tim Walz, said ensuring that drivers are licensed and carry insurance makes the roads more secure for all Minnesotans. “As a longtime supporter of this bill, I am proud to finally sign it into law, making our roads safer and moving us toward our goal of making Minnesota the best state to raise a family for everyone,” the Democrat lawmaker said in a statement [] when he proudly signed the measure earlier this year. The state’s lieutenant governor explained that the new law makes sure children and families “can come out of the shadows” and that all residents have opportunities to thrive, succeed, grow, and live their fullest lives. “From picking a child up from school to driving to a doctor’s appointment, driver’s licenses help us safely access essential services and navigate our lives,” the lieutenant governor, Penny Flanagan, said. Under the new law Minnesota’s Department of Vehicle Services (DVS) is prohibited from asking driver’s license applicants about immigration status or from placing any special identifier on the card indicating immigration status. The state agency is also banned from providing information to federal authorities for the purpose of civil immigration enforcement. Additionally, Minnesota is taking extra steps to assist illegal aliens obtain a license. Applicants can take the test in nine different languages and the actual exam can be given orally by a translator [] in the person’s native language to assist those who have difficulty comprehending the written test or who may be illiterate. Driving manuals are also available in multiple languages as well as interpreters to guide foreigners through the road skills test. It is not clear how much the extra services will cost taxpayers. It is important to note that earlier this year Minnesota enacted a law that provides automatic voter registration for those who apply for a driver’s license, even though the law requires U.S. citizenship to vote. Granting illegal immigrants driver’s licenses inevitably creates the risk that they may vote in an election since the state will not distinguish between the cards issued to legal residents, American citizens or illegal aliens. At least one state lawmaker finds this concerning and points out that “allowing an undocumented immigrant to acquire a driver’s license that looks exactly like a license used by a legal Minnesota resident is asking for trouble [ [ House Member John Petersburg says there are no safeguards in the new law, which means the potential is high for voting and state program abuse. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

✉️ Enclosed: Our strategy to flip CA-47 |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=1ce9879726&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter,

There’s three things that definitely need to be part of our campaign plan if we’re going to accomplish what we very nearly did last year – _help Scott Baugh flip CA-47._ **#1: Build Up Our Ground Game.** Every victory takes a team... especially when we’re up against national Democrats and their mega-donors. We need a staff of campaign workers and volunteers all across the district if we’re going to compete!

**#2: Connect with Undecided Voters.** It’s changed a lot over the years, but CA-47 still has almost an equal party registration split between Republicans and Democrats. That means there’s a great deal of voters in the middle who can be persuaded as long as we can reach them with our winning conservative message!

**#3: Beat Them At Their Own Game.** Democrats have shown they are willing to do anything in order to win. It’s time for us to take every legal avenue we can to turn out voters, especially during the early windows. _With ballot collecting legal in California, it’s time to beat Democrats at their own game!_
---
| [HELP IMPLEMENT OUR CAMPAIGN PLAN!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=7c165eb3e8&e=8a657725d1 "HELP IMPLEMENT OUR CAMPAIGN PLAN!")
---
| Peter – these three things will help us win next November. But all 3 require resources.

So can we count on you for a donation to help implement our campaign plan? We’re hoping for **75 Supporters** to [donate via this email in order to keep in line with our projections.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=c183224120&e=8a657725d1)

Thank you,
_Team Baugh_

clean_body: ✉️ Enclosed: Our strategy to flip CA-47 | | | | Peter, There’s three things that definitely need to be part of our campaign plan if we’re going to accomplish what we very nearly did last year – help Scott Baugh flip CA-47. #1: Build Up Our Ground Game. Every victory takes a team... especially when we’re up against national Democrats and their mega-donors. We need a staff of campaign workers and volunteers all across the district if we’re going to compete! #2: Connect with Undecided Voters. It’s changed a lot over the years, but CA-47 still has almost an equal party registration split between Republicans and Democrats. That means there’s a great deal of voters in the middle who can be persuaded as long as we can reach them with our winning conservative message! #3: Beat Them At Their Own Game. Democrats have shown they are willing to do anything in order to win. It’s time for us to take every legal avenue we can to turn out voters, especially during the early windows. With ballot collecting legal in California, it’s time to beat Democrats at their own game! | "HELP IMPLEMENT OUR CAMPAIGN PLAN!" | Peter – these three things will help us win next November. But all 3 require resources. So can we count on you for a donation to help implement our campaign plan? We’re hoping for 75 Supporters to Thank you, Team Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7718664d3a8a4da280fc673931d9f792&_e=CihQ_VZFlejDnHFrmH_whYYqtYlo9Brm3jZPsRjVYdhwir3lixhLrPs4DZ9pzlW7JLHBwmZbBXM08DTtQ7l-Y8ly19o64G-pKK79hto26gNRd6e8cMSxl6JG-Dps4_DdJ3Ns6ep-ty0zJH1E5Rkm4ceD1W-Ecf0z657fjq8QJQSfLyGgL0hS-cFMi59zXypI0_Mbdw9byHyL_p3h0ADA19NcsV7sPOzhdfA4WzXBJgwbdeGyglFkrduhAKsHoaXrG1JbnlhOfBXjwQMVVpPHQrXPdhRzO7w3N1gG5cf0AwKXqLYOvLbwcQohAPGgZDVQgERjVgImJT-HrQyLBMS8EiEkOZ-yCF2-CWFCr3h7UEBddvKDu1ZfWCVDGuZ33-td2LHesU1UgLw5ERlRNrpB14lDGfRj19MUG9eRn1uAOC8EJj9A9UbjNtWY-E8p7FSe2qv5p6IhtEIM6vJRHuGiPNfgGupA3lCOGqgU8Ec49qA%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7718664d3a8a4da280fc673931d9f792&_e=CihQ_VZFlejDnHFrmH_whYYqtYlo9Brm3jZPsRjVYdhwir3lixhLrPs4DZ9pzlW7JLHBwmZbBXM08DTtQ7l-Y8ly19o64G-pKK79hto26gNRd6e8cMSxl6JG-Dps4_DdJ3Ns6ep-ty0zJH1E5Rkm4ceD1W-Ecf0z657fjq8QJQSfLyGgL0hS-cFMi59zXypI0_Mbdw9byHyL_p3h0ADA19NcsV7sPOzhdfA4WzXBJgwbdeGyglFkrduhAKsHoaXrG1JbnlhOfBXjwQMVVpPHQrXPdhRzO7w3N1gG5cf0AwKXqLYOvLbwcQohAPGgZDVQgERjVgImJT-HrQyLBMS8EhVVNODnY0xBkKyP-h4o2njE1fWZHZJd7iIsuawtHJpLhkboQ_J3ANdP-t3J-lR5zQzWLDw3K5CnUmdT0_Xuk2MyRkLUbWRnCJYHv4LSopCRgS_rqoiVFdNQvem-9C33TZg0oEJBiqibwAFzcD18v9Q%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Will you donate just $5 to my campaign?

Yes, I said $5.

$5 to help me defeat one of the most corrupt and self-serving governors in the country.

$5 to elect leadership that will put people over politics and focus on real issues, like expanding Medicaid to 220,000 working Mississippians and eliminating the highest grocery tax in the nation.

$5 to invest in every last-minute voter outreach resource ahead of Election Day: from text messages to advertising, door knocking, and everything else in between.

Now, I know you’re probably thinking, “Will $5 really make an impact?”

You bet! With just 11 days until Election Day, every contribution will help us reach more undecided voters and support our hardworking team. Above all, the more supporters who contribute today, the better our chances to send Tate Reeves packing get.

[We’re so close to the finish line, Peter. But we can’t afford to miss our critical public filing deadline if we want to win. So, I'll ask again: Can I count on you to chip in just $5 toward our $130,000 GOTV goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72328842/434972851/-935144756?amount=5&refcode=ea.7457c307-2775-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7457c307-2775-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ1N2MzMDctMjc3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hGVbcb2pKRsTDVaXoKqJK-w-wnm-Ya2U-sC4qcWngh8=) | **[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72328844/434972853/-935144756?amount=5&refcode=ea.7457c307-2775-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7457c307-2775-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ1N2MzMDctMjc3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hGVbcb2pKRsTDVaXoKqJK-w-wnm-Ya2U-sC4qcWngh8=)**

body:
A special thank you for... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c2685a02217e45ec8c5f22874e77757b&_e=0chn_hDvGe4nQgHEvO_nIp75_mM_V7-nkuCPUdJ2gf4Hki7BYpgJpsisr3oRH8008Isk7JOoOPMmGJ0W0Sox99ZpMqQFJVsorZqf1qimuuhPtEEcDpqb80HqaVUkHAYokbvgwDUjBd_IQdI8VDOzEaQr55BifqzUfkRHPKVbUqRDzLEuciAZ9z3ERyrfQ7hJd7TmegkO-H0VlMqm0FcwIRZDMA6AnX43NpjreaAi19N58ffV9iTVWNmSLuIGXL2bZp9SqAYBbnKigxKxth7ZfspPrliHidF6a7n8ZGMzaiX9-4i86MHXpZggAa6e9-EmJtt_v4QKTSkncAEqA257p8vHw_M_wVuYfwUxHeBT5v5AqyeEJ_UmZPA6vK50If29fiMaMaeNwjFnT0rTJpmOVlYSUEsH2ZxfN50HF7rQqIzuVRY8DMCfXn_IBtrSO-U3vyUF4_sbtyOlizmAWLzwvkQuSZ3QoiWtvX2LhFu7Pxx4qtJeJhC8FuPX3KmvtUHt)
---
| | Patriot,

---
Think of everything that _OUR_ resilient movement has endured...
---
**The baseless attacks, the endless witch hunts, the millions and millions of special interest dollars spent against us, a corrupt president attempting to JAIL his leading opponent for 1,000 years, and even a gag order designed to CENSOR us.**

---
_**But despite all this, despite these dark days for our country, we are nevertheless WINNING.**_

---
As it stands, we are SWEEPING the primary by a historic, 50-POINT margin.

---
We are BEATING Crooked Joe in all the critical battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election.

---
Simply put, because of YOUR unwavering support, we are SAVING our country!

---
And as a special token of my gratitude, I’ve instructed my team to begin shipping out **__FREE__ sets of our Official Trump 2024 Bumper Stickers** to ANY patriot who makes a contribution of $18 or more toward our October fundraising goal.

---
_But first, let me just say that if you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t even think about donating! body:
| **Team, 5 years ago today, a gunman entered the Tree of Life Synagogue armed with an assault weapon. On a hate-fueled, antisemitic rampage, he killed 11 Jewish Americans and injured six others.**

This anniversary comes on the heels of another devastating shooting in Lewiston, Maine, killing 18 people.

This is what the gun violence epidemic looks like. We barely have enough time to remember and mourn the victims of one shooting before marking the anniversary of another.

**In the last 5 years, nothing has changed. Deadly assault weapons are flooding our communities, yet Congress still refuses to bring a ban on assault weapons to the floor for a vote.**

subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=64cc87ec167e4c19b1e2442c5b0dd977&_e=DvZs4aAcz0sGaTlWZoOOW5FYDbpG3tvkxx9iD8bLp_I10VuY9IFaYl4D03ut4A89Kd2AO7E54opAFu2BtHgeRFDfkRLza03AsodUtgHX4u7VOsrYgjqHVECnwAYtGwyqHPLle79XZNlmOHUMnPIlyAnc8hMbdgyXUOheiQXu-kxUgkKvNsCBwbQmnHDAVZRJfqWn44R0lpHQ3OurKUEUSecfCkXdfiQg60pBHa9KxDak-1BUImXBsiVyG2zGJ4jrjYNU8ZnsHQEwXm4P1QladiDkxA8lqbDpeJC5QzJXS-zoetLPe4ac4ksDUees0LnCr0ZZBUr9EOAXF1xzlwTXdKiOzzT5ARNgcoZp0FC5QAQ%3D)

Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=64cc87ec167e4c19b1e2442c5b0dd977&_e=DvZs4aAcz0sGaTlWZoOOW5FYDbpG3tvkxx9iD8bLp_I10VuY9IFaYl4D03ut4A89Kd2AO7E54opAFu2BtHgeRFDfkRLza03AsodUtgHX4u7VOsrYgjqHVECnwAYtGwyqHPLle79XZNlmOHUMnPIlyAnc8hMbdgyXUOheiQXu-kwQSXkXfZKUGrrh_r6gv1AIBVAloCC-2Z2C08s2YESFSzcEBq6m-VM0b5sa7Fq5Ijsn-t7B-g2TCmFAYiuP1tzPaSpnzmx8F7ZCBgjv_UKkUnvHwkiP2XOqgJ1b2PRbbeZdlNzh4zM8WO_yRJITX9hkCOF9kLZSl0JeQIGc29ThJdUv9KFwefJbxXQO1-SleqU%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=64cc87ec167e4c19b1e2442c5b0dd977&_e=DvZs4aAcz0sGaTlWZoOOW5FYDbpG3tvkxx9iD8bLp_I10VuY9IFaYl4D03ut4A89Kd2AO7E54opAFu2BtHgeRFDfkRLza03AsodUtgHX4u69u2OGHxHGtOAVZtBENOtnBdj4M0HkIiPwoJSSsUl0Uf7nwgq-fWE2_RNxNgzLC5IHNjkGRVD35dbGaQSgy27cUqQRr7oEfNxAB3fteUQ_I57SbJLe8uox_4dLpH6IALnRn2lC_MLfTorYLVVEYUHWgkwW8bLNUJkO2LQA_THlMQ%3D%3D)
---

---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=64cc87ec167e4c19b1e2442c5b0dd977&_e=DvZs4aAcz0sGaTlWZoOOW5FYDbpG3tvkxx9iD8bLp_I10VuY9IFaYl4D03ut4A89Kd2AO7E54opAFu2BtHgeRFDfkRLza03AsodUtgHX4u7VOsrYgjqHVECnwAYtGwyqHPLle79XZNlmOHUMnPIlyAnc8hMbdgyXUOheiQXu-kwQSXkXfZKUGrrh_r6gv1AInA9EStXW80Ea0kPjBwVQDiLRkp3okOJUImXVHeW4JEhN4J3UKA9Ll38hA7z0yxQImxd-AImq3X_x5ywQXMMsi7Qw63xjsr6GL92rcTNUPzQVZeSwF3BXaK650434KXqyHuYIAQyxoI9cNQQlMUPR2d2zQ2nwRRDtHh0I9fAlJ3w%3D)

---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=64cc87ec167e4c19b1e2442c5b0dd977&_e=DvZs4aAcz0sGaTlWZoOOW5FYDbpG3tvkxx9iD8bLp_I10VuY9IFaYl4D03ut4A89Kd2AO7E54opAFu2BtHgeRFDfkRLza03AsodUtgHX4u7VOsrYgjqHVECnwAYtGwyqHPLle79XZNlmOHUMnPIlyAnc8hMbdgyXUOheiQXu-kwQSXkXfZKUGrrh_r6gv1AIxT43Cd5K0qB5YcE4ffp6AjmEOHxMoNURNovmDJN2QT2fYEH8GSll1hqYVuG-yRPwEQU-4ZQKk8qOCpNSkrnsc4oauhJJ6mZkl8ZQt9zR7UjlCoN29cmWTrC9dbgEblmIbUpBjFbAxkmgclkY-tjODW-jMOb3IbM9e9QX4zqx8Jk%3D)

Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District

| | Patriot,

---
This week, I was called to the witness stand in New York as part of the Radical Attorney General’s vicious witch hunt against me.
---
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built...

---
In fact, they want to invoke the **“corporate death penalty”** upon me.

---
Before I ever ran for president as a political outsider, everyone knew how much I cared about the city I spent most of my life in.

---
_The New York Post_ even ran an article called _“How Donald Trump helped save New York City.”_

---
But sadly, from the Soros-backed prosecutor who was responsible for my FIRST sham ARREST to the Attorney General who campaigned on being “a pain in my...” (_you know what)_ , _the political machine in the state I helped save is hellbent on destroying me._

---
**_But something recently gave me a lot of hope._**

---
_A new poll came out showing that New York – in the general election – has now become a SINGLE-DIGIT RACE. That’s HUGE._

---
_A Republican on the verge of flipping deep blue New York? WOW!_

---
It was further proof that no matter how many times the political machine tries to destroy me, THE __PEOPLE__ know the TRUTH!
---
Voters get it. Voters see what’s being done in Biden’s America – and they HATE it.
---
Attempting to IMPRISON your chief political rival as an _INNOCENT_ man? That’s not something we do in America. That goes against every single thing _we_ believe in.
---
But so long as we never give up on our mission, we will weather this storm and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---
If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are plotting our demise instead of fixing our country, then please don’t even think about donating. Instead, use this new poll out of the blue state New York as _HOPE_ that brighter days do, in fact, lie ahead! We will Make America Great Again!
---
**[Otherwise, please make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to SAVE AMERICA from those who seek to destroy her.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=4c1fc4d6db514bb2b735b0bd11e0d6f1&_e=MkbmQb8apGWxDy3iCixkWu3gEs1J3TLf3j8nihOXkubMryxT7mOvrz4EugvCHd3SJub8HD37qBH7JfF743IJQHHPXoLzf8giSRsWzCaqMi51tNeOQvkufBiW-WWLbgaDhm6K1DBbDpBIOdAZHSc2y5Lo62-tCXD8zmyLNrjxD6OgwquHgtnGB8YonFlFdaZduMK5TT9g72Pb1ev5mmDx8Nyal4Q5LsRi4kDrwTx-6jUWavk6AWqBNAn3Gegt1uEUG5hkf0cN75HGnKS9y9DGaOaQyvVMEixPgR_xUNmW2OaJ4DRRXkRKO0b5Dbswc7-k5z_lE08IrqJ6D3Z7JNN0_w33xWDTfZUdU2br7NZQJA0YYUaTZ-69ImjOKJjXLNh57WIHbaCeQaRpPlBuKZ0fwdz6V-j27g0y2Ty0LOhIiKRmCZ3zpckvckNM-SlD-knGUg7GXl3aD127Or3jKA6KyofUVkMQe58_1Tiz3b93gCA06G9-xwBHyFN-iPi6PAjk)**

clean_body: During these dark times, THE PEOPLE get it. | | | | | Patriot, This week, I was called to the witness stand in New York as part of the Radical Attorney General’s vicious witch hunt against me. I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built... In fact, they want to invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me. Before I ever ran for president as a political outsider, everyone knew how much I cared about the city I spent most of my life in. The New York Post even ran an article called “How Donald Trump helped save New York City.” But sadly, from the Soros-backed prosecutor who was responsible for my FIRST sham ARREST to the Attorney General who campaigned on being “a pain in my...” (you know what) , the political machine in the state I helped save is hellbent on destroying me. But something recently gave me a lot of hope. A new poll came out showing that New York – in the general election – has now become a SINGLE-DIGIT RACE. That’s HUGE. A Republican on the verge of flipping deep blue New York? WOW! It was further proof that no matter how many times the political machine tries to destroy me, THE PEOPLE know the TRUTH! Voters get it. Voters see what’s being done in Biden’s America – and they HATE it. Attempting to IMPRISON your chief political rival as an INNOCENT man? That’s not something we do in America. That goes against every single thing we believe in. But so long as we never give up on our mission, we will weather this storm and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are plotting our demise instead of fixing our country, then please don’t even think about donating. Instead, use this new poll out of the blue state New York as HOPE that brighter days do, in fact, lie ahead! We will Make America Great Again! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: This email is a little different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
It’s a little long, but I hope you’ll take the time to read it.
| Team, I want to take a moment to tell you my story and why I’m running for Congress—and I hope you’ll let me. [**(If you’re ready to do the thing — flip NY-17 and retake our Democratic House majority — split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project here today.)**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55967?t=6&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)

I say “policy is personal,” because, for me, it is.

I was born and raised in Spring Valley, New York, by a single mother who worked multiple jobs to keep food on the table. Even though she worked around the clock, we still needed Section 8 housing and food stamps to get by.

When child care was too expensive, I often went to work with my grandma, who worked well past the age of retirement cleaning homes, while my grandpa worked as a janitor at the local middle school.

I was lucky to be raised by a hard-working family, which did everything it could to provide me with what I needed. But life wasn’t always easy, and I often think about what a profound difference affordable child care, health care, and better wages would have made in easing the burdens on my mother and grandparents.

Despite our circumstances, my mom always taught me to dream big, and that’s exactly what I did. I’m here running to return to Congress to keep fighting for families like mine and ensure everyone has the opportunities and resources to not only survive, but to thrive.

[**Split a donation of $10 or whatever works for you today between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to flip NY-17, retake our Democratic majority, and create a government that works for all of us.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55967?t=7&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mondaire Jones and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55968?t=8&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55969?t=9&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55970?t=10&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55971?t=11&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55967?t=12&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
Let me be frank, there are not many members of Congress with backgrounds like mine. Most members of the House and Senate are millionaires; many are worth upwards of tens of millions of dollars.

Corporate lobbyists from Big Oil to Big Pharma spend billions trying to influence elected officials like Republican Mike Lawler—himself a former oil and gas lobbyist—to maintain the status quo and keep our government working solely for the wealthy and well-connected.

It’s created a system of government that makes it all too easy to give corporate bailouts and tax breaks for billionaires, while keeping everyday people locked in a struggle just to make ends meet.

We need more leaders committed to making sure our government serves the public interest—not corporate profiteers or power-hungry politicians.

Because for me, policy is personal, I will:

\- Put the lives of our children over the NRA to enact common-sense gun safety regulations.

\- Continue to lower prescription drug costs so _everyone_ has the lifesaving medications they need, without being forced to work multiple jobs or past retirement to pay for them.

\- Protect access to abortion, so everyone can make their own health care decisions.

\- Ensure wages are high enough to meet the daily costs of living.

[**Legislation that actually helps people isn’t a pipe dream. With your support, we will flip NY-17, retake our House majority, and create a government responsive to the needs of everyday people. Split a donation of $10 to send me back to Congress. Let’s make our dream a reality.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55967?t=13&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)

Sincerely,

Mondaire
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11471%2E878179%2EFHRYon)

Peter,
Jamie McLeod-Skinner, my extreme left-wing opponent, is taking the lead in the Democratic primary.

_**This is bad:**_ this puts our hard-fought Republican majority in grave jeopardy!

Jamie said it herself __“My ability to win purple areas is key to winning this seat & flipping the House."__

We can’t let this happen!

The consequences of losing this seat could be catastrophic for the future of our party and the nation.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Jamie McLeod-Skinner, my extreme left-wing opponent, is taking the lead in the Democratic primary. This is bad: this puts our hard-fought Republican majority in grave jeopardy! Jamie said it herself “My ability to win purple areas is key to winning this seat & flipping the House." We can’t let this happen! The consequences of losing this seat could be catastrophic for the future of our party and the nation. | Donate today and help us protect our Republican majority and keep Oregon's 5th Congressional District in the hands of a dedicated and effective representative. | Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

name: Team Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]Adam Schiff for Senate

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Derek — we |
|are 4 days away from our 10/31 fundraising deadline, and short a few |
|more donations to hit our $250,000 digital goal. |
| |
|[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3189?c0=oct2023_abs_em.yfiiQ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]Will you chip in $32 (our average donation!) to help elect Adam to |
|the U.S. Senate? We’ll share more how much your donation has an impact |
|below. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Reason 1: The first thing you should know about Adam’s campaign is that |
|he doesn’t take a dollar from corporate PACs. |
| |
|Since launching this campaign, our average donation is just $32. This |
|campaign is powered by — and for — working families, giving just a few |
|bucks at a time. |
| |
|$32 might not feel like a lot on its own, but when combined with |
|thousands of other gifts, it makes a big difference in our work. That |
|$32 can help us lock in TV ads at the best rate, energize Democrats, and|
|increase our get-out-the-vote efforts across California’s 58 counties. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Reason 2: The GOP is hell-bent on taking revenge on Adam — starting by |
|sabotaging this campaign. |
| |
|Right as Adam was preparing to announce his Senate campaign, Kevin |
|McCarthy removed him from the Intelligence Committee. Then came a |
|shameless partisan censure vote from MAGA Republicans, which was |
|supported by both McCarthy and Donald Trump. |
| |
|That was topped off with Donald Trump’s recent visit to Anaheim, where |
|he called Adam “Pencil neck” and bragged that Adam couldn’t win this |
|Senate race (we will prove him wrong). |
| |
|Adam is effective at holding the GOP accountable. Republicans know it — |
|which is why they’re doing all they can to stop him from reaching the |
|Senate. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Reason 3: Now, instead of running in just two elections, Adam will be |
|running in FOUR — for both the special election and the general |
|election. |
| |
|Gov. Newsom recently appointed Sen. Laphonza Butler to fill Sen. |
|Feinstein's seat, but she just decided that she will not be a candidate |
|in either election — meaning this race is still wide-open, without an |
|incumbent on the ballot. |
| |
|With over 30 candidates in the race and early voting starting in just |
|shy of 100 days, we’ll need even more resources than anticipated to |
|educate voters. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|These next 100 days will be make-or-break for this Senate race. There’s |
|no telling what dirty tricks national Republicans will try to pull at |
|the last minute. It’s on us to cut through the noise and elect Adam to |
|the Senate. |
| |
|[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3189?c0=oct2023_abs_em.yfiiQ8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]If these 3 reasons helped convince you to pitch in to Adam’s campaign|
|— and we hope it did! — rush in $32 or another amount today. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3156?c0=oct2023_abs_em.MejQpi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]EXPRESS DONATE $32

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3190?c0=oct2023_abs_em.T_rr7U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]EXPRESS DONATE $150

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em.IFk4qX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

– Team Schiff

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=oct2023_abs_em.p2naon&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231027_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4318%2E5257348%2EVT4tcT ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: Maine on the move
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Pro-lifers in Maine are steaming MAD!

_And they should be . . ._

You may remember this past June, when pro-abortion radicals like Governor Janet Mills succeeded in passing _LD 1619_ , which legalized abortion up until birth in Maine.

That’s bad enough. _But the truth is, it could have been stopped if ONLY four GOP legislators in the House had just decided NOT to take the day off!_

For the past few months, we’ve been fielding call after call from pro-lifers in Maine who are asking us to help them be more effective.

That’s why _Students for Life Action_ decided to host a BIG _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ in Lewiston, Maine next weekend on Saturday November 4th.

But we have __more__ attendees coming than originally planned for!

Pro-Life Friend, the bad news is, I may have to start turning away folks if I can’t raise the resources quickly to expand this training _FAST._

Given the incredibly high stakes for the pro-life movement right now, that’s the last thing I want to do!

**[And that’s why I hope you would please consider chipping in $25, $10, or even $5 to help us buy lunch for all our attendees](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-syutyjd-duchtdja-y/).**

I know lunch may not sound like a big deal.

But many people travel hours to attend our schools.

And when you’re cramming so much into a one-day training – _decades worth of strategies and principles_ – having folks head out to grab a bite means they’re going to miss A LOT.

We know ONE person can make a difference. We’ve seen it time and again.

So, YES. Serving lunch would be a big deal if you could help us pay for it!

During our _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ attendees learn:

➔ The Real Nature of Politics - why "educating" people alone won't result in change;
➔ The Biggest Lie in Politics - and how the political class uses your convictions against you;
➔ How _Students for Life Action_ is working _effectively_ at the Capitol - getting a bill sponsor and a roll call vote regardless of current leadership; and
➔ How to put pressure on legislators.
Pro-Life Friend, training these students now will help us mobilize them to work with us on our journey to see Life protected and preserved in America.

If you could help us cover the costs of meals for our attendees at our _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ it will continue to allow us to offer this training for free to our students, supporters, and community advocates.

Just having enough for sandwiches for our dedicated student leaders makes a world of difference – _and takes one more thing I have to worry about off my plate!_

**[So please consider a gift of $25, $10, or even just $5 to help pay for lunch for our attendees](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-syutyjd-duchtdja-j/).**

**[Or, if you could give more – like $250, $100, or $50, you’ll be helping us continue hosting these trainings across the country](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-syutyjd-duchtdja-i/)!**

Thank you so much for your support and prayers!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-syutyjd-026154D2-duchtdja-d) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-syutyjd-duchtdja-h/)
**

**
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qdqv9jeij2h93fpihkuddl032ohb8tjmr391rg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5gecor6cth2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4qqtdhtql0fbsknd9adju0q1lrp6h2hs2jv4ej8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5gecor6cth2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq0aqff304utp3uf0omfcumcerim8jmaj3i15chg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5gecor6cth2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

1600 Daily
