name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, and here’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35629%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3ioTENU2me73PqKt2K6R%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for “picketing” because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don’t regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what’s right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I’m running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I’m writing to you today because **[I’ve been told you’re the kind of person who’s always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35620%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2LjT7kI1AhFbitYkgJQPlw&sysid=1)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35621%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tyAvBmEp5zYcB3gwr2mbkg&sysid=1)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35622%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OVKy204PJ90%2fP7E%2fSlD1kg&sysid=1)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I’d say they’re treating me like a joke...that they don’t _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball’s chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking “deplorable” like me can win. ** That’s why they’re already firing everything they’ve got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35623%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rnYSEDHAU1WKq56fdxYhZA&sysid=1)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I’m going to be the biggest headache they’ve ever seen...

...because I’ll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they’ve been screwing over for decades.

They don’t want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you’re just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you’ll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35624%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=INkimbAUQrxxxh3ahuN4EA&sysid=1)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35635%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Cy0D8QomtV0BebEcE%2bKMA&sysid=1)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can’t wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8445%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=M3zBLRbdi3FgcXzZKoWixw&sysid=1)

body:

| | | *** OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION ***

**To:** _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf17bi65c7nbnvmlbmp7ml3rpc9eo5m2iv713ni0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
**From:** House Republican Leadership
_We need to share three urgent updates with you immediately ..._

** 1\. ** House Democrats just posted a $26.1 MILLION fundraising haul to annihilate our Conservative Majority. To make things worse, Joe Biden raked in a mind-boggling $71 MILLION over the last three months. With the Presidential Election less than a year away, this is make-or-break for Republicans.

** 2\. ** Liberals just won back-to-back special elections in swing states. Now, we are closing in on two more special elections within the next month, and we can't afford to lose a SINGLE ONE.

** 3\. ** We are only a few short days from the end of October - the most significant deadline of the year. To make matters worse, we're pacing dangerously short of our FIRST critical budgetary goal with a new House Speaker.

**We 're in a race against the clock to save our House Majority.**

It's no secret that if we fail to hit this critical budget goal, the Democrats will have the resources to take TOTAL CONTROL of our country. _**[That's why we urgently need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight - that's the bare minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdm7td7eh8dvk46gep9vg01n7dnd6hasdmoks238_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs "That’s why we urgently need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight – that’s the bare minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG. ")**_

Listen closely:

We have a new Speaker of the House. The Democrats would like nothing more than for us to miss this first major deadline. Because if that happens, they will use their fundraising edge to steal our Majority and destroy everything we have accomplished!

_That includes our strong border security bill ... Our plan to lower energy costs for your family... Our Parents Bill of Rights... And even our impeachment inquiry..._

Trust us when we say: **Nothing you do right now is more important than this.**

Our fate is in your hands. Our make-or-break October deadline is here, and time is of the essence.

_**[PLEASE: Dig deep and kick in a few bucks before midnight.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziojud1hc963qlqjpatrn2fhbu17o0girkhccq4o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs "PLEASE: Dig deep and kick in a few bucks before midnight.")**_

Thank you,

House Republican Leadership

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m a Christian, husband, father, attorney and conservative fighter. Let’s get to work.
It’s Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It’s Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671460%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rc8QpsjMN45Pi%2b02%2f3HCBA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TNfKQ92npgbhO8HM%2fg6rVg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671462%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IVhp0ThhspRHUw3y2zh1Lw&sysid=1)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TNfKQ92npgbhO8HM%2fg6rVg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

I’m honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can’t wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

[Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671463%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v9Gh5DZhqp%2fNQW003pUnrw&sysid=1 "Will you join my team
today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in
2024? ")**

---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TNfKQ92npgbhO8HM%2fg6rVg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeba5uqhm8qks1hfc3sb5h1rh9goa5d448sn9flg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z35i323prll5ema4c0ug6cng89fnmiha8dire7ro_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuml1a5d9ij50lfai78q0i7ctr2159p0acogrktg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6cph2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsro820dls5i84nuc0il07uci2rg98kkpveeh3lg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgfm3kedolbohbk3vos8h05hg1tiok3q5ivce6g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ddqaauqoo4sh1rcrf35s9cesassa812posl1j0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvaa6uprms55jnaqq6bvbm9v495e4benobr7hpq8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhbf9bki1cbi1rq7ohnmqst9noaerg72hlbnj1oo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6hkhe1nis22kokv2fal5m3tmcvaaqtp21mpiatg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5geeoj6clh2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Dear Friend, I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances... ...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him. That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo. Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend. He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation. And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. But first, let me explain what happened... On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a violent criminal named Quadren Wilson. Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom. Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice. Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up. Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward. Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, your response is vital!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m a Christian, husband, father, attorney and conservative fighter. Let’s get to work.
It’s Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It’s Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35631%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2V4asUMHcEz0xmT%2brNhLBQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35632%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bIYiPwyvX27kQm%2bN1jUOXg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35633%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rGZAtqiE%2ffl3VQW1JnyspA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35632%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bIYiPwyvX27kQm%2bN1jUOXg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

I’m honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can’t wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

[Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35634%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VEn%2bVO2yZjB2CzuYcY%2fjxQ&sysid=1 "Will you join my team
today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in
2024? ")**

---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35632%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bIYiPwyvX27kQm%2bN1jUOXg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
We need to share three urgent updates with you immediately...
{{md5_hash}}
| |

---
| | | *** OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION ***

**To:** _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671485%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K49JQDLA%2fL1SDfnhlIWafw&sysid=1 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
**From:** House Republican Leadership
_We need to share three urgent updates with you immediately ..._

** 1\. ** House Democrats just posted a $26.1 MILLION fundraising haul to annihilate our Conservative Majority. To make things worse, Joe Biden raked in a mind-boggling $71 MILLION over the last three months. With the Presidential Election less than a year away, this is make-or-break for Republicans.

** 2\. ** Liberals just won back-to-back special elections in swing states. Now, we are closing in on two more special elections within the next month, and we can’t afford to lose a SINGLE ONE.

** 3\. ** We are only a few short days from the end of October - the most significant deadline of the year. To make matters worse, we’re pacing dangerously short of our FIRST critical budgetary goal with a new House Speaker.

**We’re in a race against the clock to save our House Majority.**

It’s no secret that if we fail to hit this critical budget goal, the Democrats will have the resources to take TOTAL CONTROL of our country. _**[That’s why we urgently need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight- that’s the bare minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671486%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PYOCemEdmywd5jKYP6bGGQ&sysid=1 "That’s why we urgently
need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight – that’s the bare
minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG. ")**_

Listen closely:

We have a new Speaker of the House. The Democrats would like nothing more than for us to miss this first major deadline. Because if that happens, they will use their fundraising edge to steal our Majority and destroy everything we have accomplished!

_That includes our strong border security bill ... Our plan to lower energy costs for your family... Our Parents Bill of Rights... And even our impeachment inquiry..._

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My core principals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo59emcmmt28pd58bq0s8p2m652kk1gdd51atif8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcatfse2f8mifb1e70ppbcacp5vbmb1pkgdfa8to_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq16hagkata47pbn5cdvqls2scd92uftbp4g283o_)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb3788ht0l16ai26urd9lojj04pca3991pjjmeu8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7vgjdn13b87guargdnlmlqed7a7paim6sgrv618_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk88mujvb1b2n31atdhrj0ga2vpm309g9v8cpivo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zssvmh3vimqgg67aqnlntt6nk2gv4tbsmiikboh8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o72c5h2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgisllc1a0hn1mkeaodskn9hpssiuqbe03s3k0io_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq9t3fjmtjp1rfsuijhqop0t0uqpq9l53nt2aiuo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o74cdh2bs) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4kbrrm8libfbr04cmg7qju58s55hn0mqoh0efc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o74cdh2bs)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6kcbugb2cnasv1hs25haf63u3fu7lngf5d5e48g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30sdimepj246h22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o74cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztd3hf14jto1qjsl9qhn6kt9pk1rei2ahu65sohg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o74cdh2bs)_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm1pjmts0ioae50bppqd28umd5eg170kbtr4l14g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o76c9h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnshcmhqdrccus531fuda4s3ce057f26efigsfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o76c9h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ckm1l2ag63nf8i1tqsjm4kjt1a9epkqdaq18b0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s5ie0o76c9h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35756%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4P5wQVg7%2bH6ZiRM3UJJ9qw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35757%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gvycWcUWxJugOWw0VzJBNA&sysid=1) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35758%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6SKzo7qeDVKXb9UEC9oXkg&sysid=1)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35759%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dM9XMa5T3ed4%2bs2n%2fprhbQ&sysid=1)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35750%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zdt%2bOuqn64y8pj5I0D4Tuw&sysid=1)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35751%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s5DkEFgsaLEVh3OBR46O5g&sysid=1)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35752%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=infIvoWQG4s1tnvLM44pSg&sysid=1)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35753%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h3NKhDhM%2futMyrO8IudnNQ&sysid=1)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35754%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mUdD9Dpj0fz4BSYE5c8fYg&sysid=1)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35765%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GXJp0QH3z0rT%2fJkY%2fGtw%2fg&sysid=1)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35756%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4P5wQVg7%2bH6ZiRM3UJJ9qw&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35766%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dRI6vRSKcvkoe%2bIP9Ux9Pg&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

---

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 10.27.2023
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xphhhd-didthutlhu-jh/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-r/) **October 27, 2023**Friend -Happy Halloweekend! Be sure to check out your Weekly Update below!-Team WisGOP | For the past month, Wisconsin Congressmen joined together in an effort to preserve Republican leadership in the House of Representatives. Our Representatives acknowledged the importance of having a strong conservative as the Speaker and did right by their constituents by presenting a united front. On Wednesday, Congressman Mike Johnson (LA-04) was appointed as the Speaker of the House, with support from all six of Wisconsin's finest. After the floor vote, Congressman Tom Tiffany [posted on X](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-y/): "All good things take time, and the House got a conservative leader in Mike as a result of this process." We appreciate our Representatives for their ability to balance intellectual diversity
Wisconsin Republicans have not backed down from fighting to ensure that our elections remain safe and secure. This week, Republican legislators introduced a series of [constitutional amendments](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-j/) in an effort to protect the upcoming election cycle. These amendments include:
* Outlawing Private Election Grants
* Ensure Non-Citizens Do Not Vote in Federal Elections
* Require Voter ID to Vote

Our representatives are fighting every day to protect our early votes, so make sure that when election season rolls around, you don't wait to cast your ballot!
---

The November 30 deadline for poll-worker sign-ups is quickly approaching. Make sure to sign up to be one of our Republican nominated poll workers, and put yourself on the frontlines in our fight for election integrity! This is the most important way to protect the Wisconsin vote in upcoming elections.

[Senator Ron Johnson](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-t/) has already encouraged Republican leaders to step up to the plate and serve as poll workers in the upcoming election season - stay tuned for more messages from our amazing leadership! Tammy Baldwin's record on international policy continues to serve as a testament to her poor leadership. From the border crisis to the Israel-Palestine conflict, Baldwin has chosen to handle these issues improperly time after time. Open Borders Baldwin has voted against [funding a border wall](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-i/) for two decades; instead, she has been an avid supporter of [sanctuary cities ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-d/)and lenient [re-entry laws](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-h/).

Amidst the horrific attacks in Israel on October 7th, Baldwin tried to reverse her previous standings by offering support for our Israeli allies. If you had asked Baldwin about her stance on October 6th, she would have offered her praises to [The Council on American-Islamic Relations](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-k/) and defended her interaction with Nadia Rahman, an activist who has accused Israel of [ethnic cleansing](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-u/). Moreover, Baldwin has failed to support the protection of Israeli citizens through her continuous support of the [Iran Nuclear Deal](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-o/).
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[Democrats Gloat Tweet While Working Families Suffer](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-b/)**
One might assume that Wisconsin Democrats would realize just how disastrous Bidenomics and Baldwinflation have been for working families. With prices rising, wages falling, and debt soaring, you would hope some level of self-awareness would be in order. Nope. Instead of recognizing the disaster they caused, Wisconsin Democrats are popping champagne.
**[ICYMI: Israel& Two-Faced Tammy Baldwin](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-a/)**
In case you missed it, Senator Tammy Baldwin is desperately trying to present herself as pro-Israel, but Baldwin's claims are proven meritless by her long record of aligning herself with anti-semitic organizations and turning a blind eye to Israel's enemies.

**[Open Borders Baldwin Leaves America Vulnerable to Terrorism](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-f/) **
The crisis at our southern border continues to worsen with the threat of terrorism on the rise. New data from Customs and Border Patrol reveals that a record 169 suspects on the FBI's Terror Watch List were encountered at ports of entry along the southern border.
**[The Republican Point: Speaker Mike Johnson's Seven Core Principles](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-z/) **
During his first speech as speaker, he laid out a powerful vision for the House of Representatives and a clear agenda for helping the American people. We were particularly struck by his seven core principles that made this country the greatest on Earth - the principles that should serve as the shining light for every government official.

**[Economy Gets Worse:"Bidenomics" ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-v/) **
Just 26 percent of Americans say "Bidenomics" has been good for the country -- so, naturally, Biden will make another feeble attempt at selling the failed economic agenda later today. Americans continue to see increasingly dire economic indicators that show Biden's abject failure to deliver.
**[Biden's Border Crisis Rebreaks His Own Broken Record](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-e/) **
New data shows 269,735 illegal immigrants were encountered attempting to cross the U.S.-Mexico border in September - a 15 percent increase in crossings from the previous month and the highest total for September in DHS history.
**[WisGOP hired Communications Director](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-s/) **
The Republican Party of Wisconsin announced the hiring of Matt Fisher as the new Communications Director. Fisher will serve as the primary media contact and spokesperson ahead of the 2024 cycle.
**[Erik Ngutse hired as Director of Community Engagement for Wisconsin GOP](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xphhhd-didthutlhu-g/)**
The Wisconsin Republican Party proudly welcomes Erik Ngutse as its new Director of Community Engagement. Ngutse's unwavering commitment to championing conservative values and his experience in supporting GOP candidates at every level make him a valuable addition to the team.****

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Seeing what I’m seeing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=643e57ee58f1566188b65251894210b04a7064f027eb02145dc5493f4c93c3910d1991a6e74381d3c79514f933e4c5003d74047a95bf63916b0167e2d18a508cac59a6b3313e06c4c08f44d09692c0a2

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740bd030a92bdb699a66934e1f12a454ef797d67d1e972184b3aab53da0234a3d8b7d45debd6be4d9f2f2d3f78074b9595a8055c20bec0f6a97

Friend,

Out on the campaign trail, I joke around in saying I’m one of the few people that has gone to Harvard and Yale come out more conservative than I went in, but I’m not laughing about what I’m seeing now. Students of these liberal institutions are leading Pro-Hamas protests and praising the atrocious acts of terrorists.

I’m quickly reaching out to you today because I’d like to know what your thoughts are on these students who have gone so far on the liberal extreme that they’ve signed letters of Pro-Hamas support and gotten their post-graduation offers of employment rescinded. What do you think about businesses pulling these employment offers?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a487404f2e64f0544a408df56fe82fe5370adf74acc0ae9e6bfcf777e6e15c137ecd855a08bed6e488579f9d16f6db8aa14c60f7aa8f387c7a0a5a
I completely agree

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740db0612fac5d0c491dddc52b46c1db3c2a4d3f8038a245c0703cf9d37bb094060cfa30967e57463a9f69c79f0c67ab2633fc19fe3c9a6211e
I think that’s inappropriate

I’ll tell you friend, I totally stand by the businesses pulling these offers. I think signing a Pro-Hamas letter of support and celebrating terrorism is one of the most egregious acts you can commit. I think it’s a no-brainer to throw those resumes in the trash.

Truly, I have seen the Left’s indoctrination dangerously worsen in the last couple of decades—from student organizations praising Hamas at Ivy Leagues to elementary school teachers pushing radical gender ideology down the throats of first graders. I don’t like what I’m seeing, friend, and I refuse to sit by and allow our country to slip into decline any longer. I need to know what you’re thinking.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740bd030a92bdb699a66934e1f12a454ef797d67d1e972184b3aab53da0234a3d8b7d45debd6be4d9f2f2d3f78074b9595a8055c20bec0f6a97
Respond Now

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740bd030a92bdb699a66934e1f12a454ef797d67d1e972184b3aab53da0234a3d8b7d45debd6be4d9f2f2d3f78074b9595a8055c20bec0f6a97

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740f8d0775050bc5d0ea99f887e1f859074f3b90011765cb09a3233ae757a0f0ea621ce32470ae6118a91ee81fb97e278840a6d8e218af0a16c
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a487407c4450eccdc40b15db15370d8a5e2573818c7a187efe1a1fb3e505e1c6aa0e22a5a32e303a243e6b85b53b2def8081fe3b98419fb6f834b0
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740bd030a92bdb699a66934e1f12a454ef797d67d1e972184b3aab53da0234a3d8b7d45debd6be4d9f2f2d3f78074b9595a8055c20bec0f6a97

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7e0d902779a48740bd030a92bdb699a66934e1f12a454ef797d67d1e972184b3aab53da0234a3d8b7d45debd6be4d9f2f2d3f78074b9595a8055c20bec0f6a97

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmet7muvl80idcadup3ac3hbu9fvu9a6ubd4bi08_)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8vdmv5lr1t9gs9co2t6svflt1so2di534g4cn4o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4c1h61op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i66p70s5ie1o32c9h2bs) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr2qqr54h06rdt6m298hb4soa5qnsle73ps3bek8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfloni18569bhemrt2thlssbp0k2lk9g64pj4c1h61op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti46h22sh2s8i66p70s5ie1o32c9h2bs)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a21eb95d7cee48a78ff61b39e4b1fbfd&_e=mfUp4pW-8dL0h7yonwY4z5mqZEa-s-v2fDofR1L5RLL1Hsy13ZBKXLxRo1Jg-_8kZRVgSNirY7FS5x5eINZumSzjUp6Vc4teNZq7PM28dC3C8OJMxIMIrDedJFgmxqcTcpNwJj_WFZ3YSlS_v_rMxRs00i2WaaX3ydZw_dsFZc8RZEqU1fY4owrynf89mYGcMcU3hFF5EsdCwfiqEa0ZrWaJw2F-Gozr5GLfSB0nj5OvaVSOtucHrT7BJNMRB0_ETr5zwZ1xOjoWPz_h-6MQYMt_A1qFs--oGkdYFyOESXDAgE-yalwUToqqlehcN_YzbWfmy_GG_M7l6N8Pqx-DruFjVbrfCjVhPysadNbNUASrosrqtJ1seYn20T85C4Vl)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a21eb95d7cee48a78ff61b39e4b1fbfd&_e=mfUp4pW-8dL0h7yonwY4z5mqZEa-s-v2fDofR1L5RLL1Hsy13ZBKXLxRo1Jg-_8kZRVgSNirY7FS5x5eINZumSzjUp6Vc4teNZq7PM28dC3C8OJMxIMIrDedJFgmxqcTcpNwJj_WFZ3YSlS_v_rMxRs00i2WaaX3ydZw_dsFZc8RZEqU1fY4owrynf89mYGcMcU3hFF5EsdCwfiqEa0ZrWaJw2F-Gozr5GLfSB0nj5NreIv5QZ20-O-CNUzx3qDt0qoRZ58JRIrZbc8W4lxjI6SVEWT1nk5YTFU2MTd763vUjCW6AVCcaRmNe_reEwHYr_q-6gj-5mi_A_ohkOUnLSHOr3km1VkA7QRrk3Z7X3jaTZTs1wJIwjUcnbH_ptcp) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a21eb95d7cee48a78ff61b39e4b1fbfd&_e=mfUp4pW-8dL0h7yonwY4z5mqZEa-s-v2fDofR1L5RLL1Hsy13ZBKXLxRo1Jg-_8kZRVgSNirY7FS5x5eINZumSzjUp6Vc4teNZq7PM28dC3C8OJMxIMIrDedJFgmxqcTcpNwJj_WFZ3YSlS_v_rMxRs00i2WaaX3ydZw_dsFZc8RZEqU1fY4owrynf89mYGcMcU3hFF5EsdCwfiqEa0ZrWaJw2F-Gozr5GLfSB0nj5NCwBNirMKsq5bFcl91tZBWQIykoa33sSOzog7ayCVyAZcZ88_93ta0Jbw7rODQzh7XHF9eBVYaMzlsN9geQw3878yvU__mJxGjDcwJqMtI7o7cO5NVadsMGcX5hlWEe1X7sPEG-QauJuI3hGx-RvzA)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. [**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a21eb95d7cee48a78ff61b39e4b1fbfd&_e=mfUp4pW-8dL0h7yonwY4z5mqZEa-s-v2fDofR1L5RLL1Hsy13ZBKXLxRo1Jg-_8kZRVgSNirY7FS5x5eINZumSzjUp6Vc4teNZq7PM28dC3C8OJMxIMIrDedJFgmxqcTcpNwJj_WFZ3YSlS_v_rMxRs00i2WaaX3ydZw_dsFZc8RZEqU1fY4owrynf89mYGcMcU3hFF5EsdCwfiqEa0ZrWaJw2F-Gozr5GLfSB0nj5OvOHCXrGmJTLL91t1C_4ZGrBQI6oZe9r-rfBKYOcrExRXHyczsTwDHGucTrivFs8ri-ipXGXHKxr7seU2NOWo_s5eBVxXF1BF-eqslk6QfxpAKH_2NAtwkL3sws2161Gbc-WY3kQlxWtjZoMloq-O6)

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

name: The Flyover
subject: Maine Killer Found Dead, a World Series Walk-Off, and a Very Friendly Dolphin
body:
The man accused of killing 18 people in Lewiston, Maine, was found dead last night; he appeared to have died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound.

# Saturday, October 28, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **On this day in 1886, President Grover Cleveland oversaw the official dedication of the [Statue of Liberty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO4yAQBp8Gd1jLgm0oKK5xl2uvtAgsyZ5IiJy9WHn7U1L_7adPGs38OW2nxI3vl9_pRlFq31IWftFmQKPXaDc3lFiJkOxA0czBu7DMDodrTL5Wkyew3i6TnUOpE87VLM7k4HOAgSMCWgPoIUyTWUYDcPaphJzsOZfFKwdUWPo-_u18lyvV9u4v2sfcb0OLV5HHU9lfCleF63Ec46M3Fs79c1C4PqXvb4UrAniFq4HvluQf6V514zPt8taFCuckVHTP8rEy3s8ajAs-DHssj4Nb4-e8KAeXW-L2xcvPNf4HAAD__2uLXiw). The site in New York Harbor was chosen by Civil War general William Tecumseh Sherman, who chose the island, now known as Liberty Island, in keeping with the wishes of Lady Liberty's sculptor, Frederic Auguste Bartholdi. Thanks for reading along with us __ this week!
