## Maine Shooting Suspect Found Dead
The man accused of killing 18 people in Lewiston, Maine, was found dead last night; he appeared to have died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound. Robert Card's [body was found](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2znSAUAH-NdscB_AALijR2N21K5wgHJYPgAF6Tf__mvvrVu8XO_nmtL_TBx_03nqSrSyua6t-0cgZCgejXobXaEQnqW9J8mtUwy2kQ7aGNUUSj2TbukE2MC4dsVtJOch7GScrWa8FEz5lQbB5HLjvO2KbQzgb7zVipmoGR9TXl7m_ysR7kwv_0ptyZdLZBH7Vepel_NWJpxPI8T-fSv0hP-fBGLHdpxHKijwQnlgLlSKn6uEO5y0WmQk4b5QoGswWX7mjBElrA68JMsUKh4MBHF7ypZGG_YzlSheejtlnb6_Eh-DLJZmD7iT58h9WfP30FAAD__0onbag) next to a dumpster at a recycling plant he previously worked at in Lisbon Falls, ME, about twenty minutes from the scene of Wednesday's [mass shooting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAQQH-NvTk6PmxgYOiSLV07Wgcc8VUYIhsl6r-v0rnj0xue9L5u6w25cL1_4k6-57Zi7PykVcAk7STVqsfkM5EkNZIXi7PamUXLcfPksrOQo0LnRNY5UBALzSojLcnZMLKXIJUAacHNszAXARAsJhdRhZiMHTRQ4t6Oy3fj2jfK5ac96bjEto_Fb70_zkF9DPI6yCs-Kr3Ot3rD0TkWGuR1R640nVtrnet9KvTis7c6ZUozBkAkcskkHSFDjjGopECEYMbDp8eLS-FzMYOG-45c_sL9_w-_AQAA__8fEV_4). Card's vehicle was found seven miles southeast of Lewiston, next to a boat launch, where police believe he boarded a jet-ski and made his way down the river to Lisbon Falls. [All 18 victims](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uxCAQBOCnwZ0tvMYHFBRp3F3alBbg5bwRP6cDHcrbR06d9puRRpqv-363FCk_Pm1C00LZrW_0xn3mI6gRll0MhwmIgMuAZr5pJbS8CRhO4yQKHZxcVxSrC7gGmL1TChWi4zoMZIDDMnNQXK_rLKeZc6fsob1dnD-kYoLjQa28pu9CuZ0Y4k9542vyJQ3RnK09K1s-GGwMtt775F3N2OuVM9hcqa1kBttlDLaInS4Zk6WMY7K1jvUspVF-1PFNvlG6esPLHM9OMVK9SSb4I1mKf5vt_wt-AwAA__-Xn1_A) of the shooting have been identified. Their ages range from 14 to 76.
## Robert E. Lee's Statue Melted Down
A statue of Confederate General Robert E. Lee [was melted down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_G7kD22oBduEhDd2lTIp-9HBuZ8wk2kPx9ROp0T3rSjDQft-kWqdDz8R5XDDzXKSamAyetGnANmMnKHGZEQCMx6N4764feglyCtX2XPFrdOT9ra6yDLilEp53vnbKSAigwWoFTvuv00Gql7i5mn6K5pzw4YRVm4rq1n5WevOBcfuqBW5vqKktYmF-7MG8CRgHjeZ5t_Ka6X6-A8WILGLW69iBgTPU5Y8YtMjY7R_7CZsXCmJu0xK1UZtwPKgXlFvLrpFJo7wdh1WONVP6c_H-C3wAAAP__G8hb9g) at a secret ceremony, part of a project called _Swords into Plowshares. _ Plans to remove the statue sparked the _Unite the Right_ rally in 2017, and the removal was completed four years later. A team from the University of Virginia and a local museum created the plan to melt the statue into bronze ingots and create a new piece of public art. The plan was kept quiet in order to avoid "[threats and legal action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtygzAQAL8GOjF6gaBQkYbOaVMyehz2ZSTkkc4m_vuMU6feLXb267JdHCY8rp8ug6W9bC4QPmETnMmZSbXpPtodQILqwYppmfViJi37m5UCghDeG2-cU0vc95Ev06hN5Hr2o-rRSi6V4HLmyzgKMwjO_eziEpzyIZq50xwiUqnDd8GDbrCnV3lCHULJfbI3onvr1Ecn106u53kOe_k54Gxv3sk1Q0TXybUWD5UYsATAGjl6AMuQCCJrECoQa6_sS8LAAlTI5XixCtlFYHhQYXiE9Gj4BHZ_-LflKvXVxvuJKWGbTKf5NTtMf130_6bfAAAA__-u_m0I)," according to one report.
## World Series Walk-Off
The Texas Rangers [won the first game](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGu3CAQheGnwd2sMHhtKFykcXfTprQGGJvJYrMCslbePnLq23_SOfp_fa1fyInP_SceNLctr-gbf2jtJSgDSq9DF-aNSJHuaO5HawY7jYPq4qxHqdFYOU7GaNe7DQNqa59mQ-lGazuelVS6l8pI-3z206OX0hkM1qN2PkxGDJICt1wevzOfLdKW_uYPlYfPR5fm2Nq7Cv1DqEWo5bquh3e1vnNp9RZCLUdyQi0nXfUGuaQAlQpThR0Pgh6qz4Ug8h4T77FVKHjuVCpgyIlvVjwjRG4VLkwvyNsGMR8E5c8JuCOftUFgPPIZHPrXPZT4Q0ItXZnD--KUuI6TGOR-IKf_19v3Jf8FAAD__-HyeFk) of the World Series with an 11th inning walk-off home run. The Rangers were down two runs as they came up to bat at the bottom of the 9th, but Corey Seager hit a [418-foot homer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGncbZWd-f43-ABhky0HWGL7PjSGrlNlRyteHskWJk_6ZN-74fxkGqrt_MxXTnKvIxpkvrgEWFHfkd67LsSZ2Zi3XFEG3wfnO2pu8RgddbBBBOSxlyYLQJg5n7Wma0JXY0EpBHIQzAG3R4Bsk8lTEnnqTiveuBSZVn3n0u9yYXn9r08eN1Py7Vr8SJy35R-UTQoGuRZRf6aouHw9no6DqcPRcMmSb42RQM69AjOIXog442x2K2x3J-1tbpZp3o4X1Ntv3v5X_sTAAD___SOUnk) and sent the game to extra innings (the first of this year's playoffs), then Adolis Garcia sealed the game in the 11th with his shot to right field ([watch it here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFv8yAQQH8N3hLdHdhwA8O3eMu3drQw4ISKBMtcE_XfV23Xbk96w9N7uyyXUGp5XP-He_aytSVEKc-8IJzInUgvZkh-y5myHrLHiZ1hOxkabn602nDceMpRQ3RuHdFi4o2Ty8wGhuIJSCOQAx5HtGcEWF1IHINeY7JOGcipSDvO76085Ja3-tme-TjHdh-qv4nsXel_imZFs7yKyK9TNK_h6NJa7Xs7pCuauwT5-Aa06BAdOkbShgHGaTh82l-l1tInqwxc76HUn4j8_fwVAAD__4N1VhM)). Garcia recorded his 22nd post-season RBI last night, breaking the single post-season record previously held by Cardinals third baseman David Freese. Game two will be played tomorrow in Arlington, TX at 7:03 ET, and you can [watch it on FOX](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9yrCAUgPGn0Q4HD6xiQXEbu71tSucARyXhzw4w6yZPn0nq9F_xze_tvt3RB5-O_xhJtz1vaJt_0jZyBoqB2GTv9E4EJHrS47QoucyThP7UIwowhsNopkVOO8pZcEmzUsrYHRX0XgMHMXJQfLndxnkYOTcK3WJRGOtm1UlOzrdchvfsUztpD5_5SWWwOfZBn609aif-dbB2sF7XNez5JRNd9SfoYK2PXFrtYG30wsoKpoNKZc_KsPivnJA5jzEnZ9B-VHZgJAbMnpgSBVZbIYwMk2MxF-qLdo_Lh-DrNHeSHxF9-D1pf8N8BwAA__9vrGcD).

On this day in 1886, President Grover Cleveland oversaw the official dedication of the . The site in New York Harbor was chosen by Civil War general William Tecumseh Sherman, who chose the island, now known as Liberty Island, in keeping with the wishes of Lady Liberty's sculptor, Frederic Auguste Bartholdi. Thanks for reading along with us this week! If you have any feedback for us, just reply to this email or mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Don't forget to check out today's sponsor, ! | Maine Shooting Suspect Found Dead The man accused of killing 18 people in Lewiston, Maine, was found dead last night; he appeared to have died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound. Robert Card's next to a dumpster at a recycling plant he previously worked at in Lisbon Falls, ME, about twenty minutes from the scene of Wednesday's . Card's vehicle was found seven miles southeast of Lewiston, next to a boat launch, where police believe he boarded a jet-ski and made his way down the river to Lisbon Falls. of the shooting have been identified. Their ages range from 14 to 76. Robert E. Lee's Statue Melted Down A statue of Confederate General Robert E. Lee at a secret ceremony, part of a project called Swords into Plowshares. Plans to remove the statue sparked the Unite the Right rally in 2017, and the removal was completed four years later. A team from the University of Virginia and a local museum created the plan to melt the statue into bronze ingots and create a new piece of public art. The plan was kept quiet in order to avoid "," according to one report. World Series Walk-Off The Texas Rangers of the World Series with an 11th inning walk-off home run. The Rangers were down two runs as they came up to bat at the bottom of the 9th, but Corey Seager hit a and sent the game to extra innings (the first of this year's playoffs), then Adolis Garcia sealed the game in the 11th with his shot to right field (). Garcia recorded his 22nd post-season RBI last night, breaking the single post-season record previously held by Cardinals third baseman David Freese. Game two will be played tomorrow in Arlington, TX at 7:03 ET, and you can . subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a18468ba482482c927456cf27962cfd&_e=SnQJU7ek32a4EG0NA9gaKOPpJG4crbi0a7x_-gWRZe0y00VF4qOQSlRBc1DH2et-D-bCVp2mJK_uRWf2Cu4wEueTMdF7E2T6COVThnmU7Y0arSCowX3kCDB8oMta93A31D_87JGn8adbrdHL7Yh8LEWPqhR6Tj9LM3hfwAOf-oa2HsKVqvapIQkI2vGcDlyQ7stZfnxScGfUjJ8b2iH0vkKntUtpamwkGY25C8_Kxb8p8UdiSNwpttR1U0BVkurjtoPAkb99LWwUkYG-6Dxda4U7L8a1dfu-StTS4VuoVJzbg4Tkt2USFxVAAq8Ne29N). Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsjcvlstt925jknustid7ga4o7cvvqp8obdqfmeo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32c3hiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r3kthqep238h1e8he4933cjgeao34cdi69oh5u)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnt0an2n408s8v373ju13rus1ds9hb5gtd6ojqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32c3hiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pb0chhm8p724no) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0t7c6bckparin8l5ce4mnom1g45j5m6hr9fntoo_rp22sh2s8i66p70slg68or4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h61op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z077f19o5mknafe19fkf15mu90sgq18i8ci57nlg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32c3hiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pb0chhm8p724no)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdi0l0o4bp8gn4c7aciolehgsq9qe63gk03v6u8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32c3hiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pb0chhm8p724no)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5r3qcqej23lj621be16mbrs4hv8sr1ccs8k2j8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32c3hiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pb0chhm8p724no)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zls2mkg0lpos0unnl47utk3ndnsj8d9ooltcmt28_rp22sh2s8i66p70slg68or4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h61op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeafsfovftinp4snq4faf4sa55ailbimu537jkt0_rp22sh2s8i66p70slg68or4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h61op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW772SkiNx

In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW772SkiNx

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_t=1sK4J7Poc1c0Rc_dLoXiHz6V-6Wb3f3PwxU9haZ-Wrtpsw5mkuO6GdQH2jBmzAQAoOC01EZP3Daabs07Mk8wvlSOmgJS3nP4VBsrhsuAjjk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_t=1sK4J7Poc1c0Rc_dLoXiHz6V-6Wb3f3PwxU9haZ-Wrtpsw5mkuO6GdQH2jBmzAQAoOC01EZP3Daabs07Mk8wvlSOmgJS3nP4VBsrhsuAjjk%3D)
[ ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplDmmgjLGZVNnD6y-yWnP_OcVy9rkii0JuHDfJdAFtFqjBnLmVoPyuUFaPrM_zI5vbMDwYeJFyUetE6KSeuHUlnAuk7uYGIVvuzi7xcXwKx8lHBpW5ph5760yWxaBa7QnzLSfOvJDPWWXfq3PZvfzB3IPEf-KCdxIY_XhN0q31FzBQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplCq4FUWxG4zF6ESpsqpGJUkBuY01AcUQPEsPuB863zbFy_WYXug_aaH6WhfKepsDkHMqQaB0uqF4Xt11SaXUtsjMg6PFv3bDb9BfwQGEco6-gioKO9DWF0bHLMAYogfVE635K4Mlbx43zrGGcqPSRlMyt916b1iqN0Ddy9DAV_6Eg%3D%3D) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplBVSWjhlHxYO8kb9iMzmANgumFEPzV7aldlI9WWrIH2agOri90_lHhRP0TZyUKeSlAxSgaI2RTCmbKvETAOv7gJ3Yc0F51_smgveBfkm88cKAkQ88r53AeCZbfGxhbRrmQEv4H7NpU7_KY9pWnaOhjlkkwYy_SnvXjGnjAyu-ICsQ%3D%3D)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplBqNYDYYU4QbcJUIbwdU2UNyvslHIG51F59vfbqSGzcnaWSO8KaQ4nZQFJf5xBWkzypMilVcA_Atk7O64EoJx3mfrzABxrgkaaLjRCg_QwXRsRYzln-pkvHI6nHjCDCSPEREzyKn5t0vdSlchAyfiFW5IU3eF0qBc6XnyF-Wkk4Vw%3D%3D)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplCdy57awWShrCD3tA4bfbtgyYm8ZK_KPbR3niMMfNEB2u5U1HOovgAv9V8ZZNFIvde0jcAc0EMJFBWqEdcWXBi7TdquhyW7zYlGoRMMWpnHnL1caI16sh4nhrA_TP10ZI2bafiOivOAZN8hWaQx2_WjS8ovhJ1Z5l3yPTCcb5cm8A%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplA_d35eDe1m9wd0anqYRH9Rrf5L2h2UuKY8-6J-Gd1mX5D2egPHwY37A9av8iomc3jVvQCfpnHS3TYJs7OauFpapg8OLMo_RRHd185MZfqUb384VlMSPB_vrSqEayF6iV9CrEYb_kkEnxQeN18A2nchUHbn5soEe904kkXZn36a2A%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplARphhSugjwxjVdQLnuR49Hn8MtZwC_J3NAx20iNUhubuVpI1cdAwStnXbHNKM5MigoqXEulH3lKMv_EXFRrJYUNr6Df7OakrjtR03m_70-WGeCsR0YUWibxjXkM6Cifs48Vm-4ZxyoqDr0NJP9jTqtPZR9jfdLYt63nj5Qf4w1SA%3D%3D)

[**If you are committed to taking back the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplDlWjdx9Ywq_WRKA1765bhP9DmUE-NAqKkcOMaolFoJj1S4NVXuuhPaFdAqHvOYvqVi2tMX9f5U4rNso5zlsgkuabp-F3peuTcirnT-31FJUs9X51VMPYr22cd_8eWc457BnWd4KMMW7OvappUA-BHUnuY7pjIpsPSe_GtM0HJiCw%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=839d1f84921341a891bd4bb7f020bccd&_e=aOwCpNC1k2u5MAUUmzbE06U-rIgz9_Ngtxk74kJTv0Gz5E6GBZMbNJKIbFrDbMDWLc8FRNxdkaPL8h8QdwKeUKRujmHBIxEL3L9wuYHtKC_bvT9KOW16kZr8gAopkfn0kRIkoX9W-1gqJ10EJffaA-Hs2aab1Bh4W3-F9n2xBso-xk6JhnhJYXcUBeU2RTzfhure-5xoZWRBtACRkFgkBEXd2dWZ4EKhrrIG39goplCxlN-tTclgs5Sk-EcTRB_oRCJQ4c7suLY-KlJ-3N07cDDv_kpfn-Ck5mDhYXzZgg1u-ZhZ33Heyw6IQPNUomU8ouZHedXVa-A_ncnqIt58m4ZH-NQJRjHfFK1vWBWnCeZC8LyrUX_0WQSn3bq9xUuuaM-rLpBKjDw8VDOir7H2rw%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

\*\*TODAY'S HEADLINE:\*\*

In a groundbreaking revelation, exclusive documentation has been obtained that exposes the California GOP's clandestine efforts to modify the bylaws governing the Presidential delegation process in the state.

The evidence implicates key figures within the California GOP, including Chairwoman Jessica Patterson, RNC national committee woman Harmeet Dhillon, and committee man Shawn Steel.

This disclosure sheds light on the secretive maneuvers within the California GOP leadership and their potential impact on the upcoming presidential election.

name: Read/Act News
subject: Russia and the United States
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as “a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma”—words that still ring true.

But given Russia’s current war with Ukraine—and Russia’s role in the shifting balance of power in today’s world—a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia’s place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world’s great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a[FREE online video series on Russia](http://trk.readactnews.).**

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you’ll learn more about Russian history—including the “Greats” such as Peter and Catherine—with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia’s significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy—and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You’ll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia’s enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war.**

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca/](http://trk.readactnews.)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**

---
| |
---

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2566467180cb4fb5847dc2d47e914f3b&_e=4knlWE_Jor6SmDLTsvua-13HC__JUzj_opkMAQZzoF7oTJE2e7B3i9Bg0UjoB0yVp7z9njjr2mnFXWrlAkoUUBv5LH8AMPBxGCkyxLefc8BptvIqkXGp05tjDyfDwPI4f9b9aUKp6vap8AuT8TiLRS4sXPokY-KRwBCngbn5SIapUc9LCx8dVFzq13DliomRKcg7ZceGG5K7KA3V0Oq1sIiMHRnuVGjEl68pMPQyBmxuRuWf6syEV-xW9_LTWiNv78d0TlYmqfuFqgjfvw8hrNpoOuEm_hfWLMtBpIPDKoN8DLHxuHQRIZo-Uf01o_yXZ1fBM0xim_czNkHMiB-HxfYfyAipxFRAOiH-AjFQTzUYILlJHmuGusexin58So-PJBGtZdiANuIGSBchWyloQw%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2566467180cb4fb5847dc2d47e914f3b&_e=4knlWE_Jor6SmDLTsvua-13HC__JUzj_opkMAQZzoF7oTJE2e7B3i9Bg0UjoB0yVp7z9njjr2mnFXWrlAkoUUBv5LH8AMPBxGCkyxLefc8BptvIqkXGp05tjDyfDwPI4f9b9aUKp6vap8AuT8TiLRS4sXPokY-KRwBCngbn5SIapUc9LCx8dVFzq13DliomRKcg7ZceGG5K7KA3V0Oq1sIiMHRnuVGjEl68pMPQyBmxuRuWf6syEV-xW9_LTWiNvy5-eTfND3QHqkylYGVARSRfBcLou2vGDD_MB7pOYMuuDXjUIOhfptwdHX9hBoxGp8LQowZvWhGLBUGsCMNEKA1Ai2YDhKcPEYj09lDHUeO0fDhdIP6XDeMIo4AvDt7gj5uAEF2CHn4dgt-JStCG4Rg%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2566467180cb4fb5847dc2d47e914f3b&_e=4knlWE_Jor6SmDLTsvua-13HC__JUzj_opkMAQZzoF7oTJE2e7B3i9Bg0UjoB0yVp7z9njjr2mnFXWrlAkoUUBv5LH8AMPBxGCkyxLefc8BptvIqkXGp05tjDyfDwPI4f9b9aUKp6vap8AuT8TiLRS4sXPokY-KRwBCngbn5SIapUc9LCx8dVFzq13DliomRKcg7ZceGG5K7KA3V0Oq1sIiMHRnuVGjEl68pMPQyBmxuRuWf6syEV-xW9_LTWiNvD-tHHodOfaEwuudzUyo2eNmbDo0vqjareJABmnrCuSlppoz4IExSZwdvMu0rxNRblbqLe1LQgShRiLgn3draehgXz0ORpoxq4IqoAEEuLytJrtOefqU6ePR9vblM6Ym8568aXVBRzq7Yw0PaheXUiw%3D%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband made the right decision
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6Z-Sox0BWZY0aaunbqguEBHAOF2jJyz1l1am7QZ7s-H4Niv4adDqVBPDRXY9gvMm3kv0eRv30joYtboZrDMvapRYYRDwVFC9SzbKfSEr3mR3PQaB_hCcVtSnjNZvf4S8CDsBRDJty4M0ePdwwNPbQOED1IpqDD4FvMbHHqWjfGs4%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6SMvRQXApbzZHxGR00RhSHaCapPxpUPc7egk668fnXf7FemiVi8bH2zqEsAXgO9KG9nbfucuzM1CsoUbQZrLKBAaq2z7Ktge94rj0g49bUKpSc5_DAAb8PLQLCjWoaf3y7V2R9gnhYBc0nd26lLJUVQIoOcxhO_cuqM5jNwq1aXs%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6C2nrnEU15s4K1rjvoqpY9JavCRnYnhU04C06NXbQO0sWzC2ood-lew3XzjxGL-V_HXGqHRBPnJpzFM_McWkBMc7ghhGyL41CK--PcDFcWplbPUK9LgpWJvYutkgFAOudQSAAUFfC2J0ki2q_dref_0YaEKHacGzghj_YGMGUvYY%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6pFqg_BjT6LS3JpQp-hDu0VGj2VaZa3rNJ3EaS3ja1Txriys8YOXETzTTMGkZgZ0gyo3UccU9IuRbgMPin1VZw5KQPC5HLufoU5gPlGqQv8uVD2azi4cRxWf9-FXaE49mqPwZgSmOVIQ3iaeqolAJNa85yckgE3RKs4lCdDFQ9kE%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6rdRPC4Uvrk1cakRWh9lailA0R5YqxnALoEF28ESmJaM-1rpOQBbJld9Zv4n9xV4p7SqTKg9_Qufw-zK_5ZdHsyZTyllZOPUQn6IFYq-aNMTeAL52xuBL2QXp7GVU7uoQIhgvkuLlAfZELSKytopYfR4swnFuJaEkUTNoWF0pqcE%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=722be6d79dfb4048943b129a83d5f43b&_e=MUz_gVuSsamJVA9RopxszOuMrh6yI5wA5tmrZLiuiJmFg7x6-tdN1FIeFoYXUYg4X-R8AERP98qJr2Vg_R1Vvs8VBnRH02DpS1Rzpw3Pk0wSOSimzDv49AzLZo7m-iDvqsuYdQnNdRgvsoYNCb77_kmL_jJ2joyQqGTJ2iofZhyzp3ct5fz6LcBfzkVGvaN6YcUj7wUZ_RRfKTfuzZ8WljmILRXCKs1WvPFwwNzPawlJXWhDkK1MzW3inFQqOZwEIaCz2QcgXZEDINxSXpli02yOuz27eQv3yxIR4sBgZgIa9H9DtbYY5HzkcrwWX8m-iudpNBEKAfKgXRr4OBF8zprNVrhCTuuEslvxfrFufQI%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

**To:** _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9caf595b65b046d79ce50909f2461eeb&_e=zz_eFcNXrp_LlD6aWe_nrUT4us44VEcyOVCl60_wKEcaKK0RhMARKCY-uL8LEaB9amyDjxEZ2N73kFOPSb8_TehArD_CVjm7MHUufg0Vy3nX97ab4kxUaqoQNIGVH4F_vz3YlVfljlkuAQsVi81JMdLrzxV6G2jqaI1kbePDsfSrMt_Q_4fYvELD3W6EFcTLduzHJpH-9ZGWwtRy3tQiv99AOvZbPfwOLhqzL9jqm8gCgCW-Kci4mKRJ1_wrRNTHjRzcULLZeNssuQcjC1k-R724NcbPpFhL1Vsv_DN97g8d6rhyQAMU_g904dpLDeGBh6u4nscyGLiP_o7Ot8Ularfg8fnOAt6YGyIZhZiMJ-32yOAJWw_asEbkgRXVA4cryU-7phG7ohs6YDMljUqwRwJu3dNAcLr5s-mHXnwh53RhhM0DJupYCI6MMk9ptLc4sySftxSARGNQU6socEQ-rg%3D%3D "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_
**From:** House Republican Leadership
_We need to share three urgent updates with you immediately ..._

** 1\. ** House Democrats just posted a $26.1 MILLION fundraising haul to annihilate our Conservative Majority. To make things worse, Joe Biden raked in a mind-boggling $71 MILLION over the last three months. With the Presidential Election less than a year away, this is make-or-break for Republicans.

** 2\. ** Liberals just won back-to-back special elections in swing states. Now, we are closing in on two more special elections within the next month, and we can't afford to lose a SINGLE ONE.

** 3\. ** We are only a few short days from the end of October - the most significant deadline of the year. To make matters worse, we're pacing dangerously short of our FIRST critical budgetary goal with a new House Speaker.

**We 're in a race against the clock to save our House Majority.**

It's no secret that if we fail to hit this critical budget goal, the Democrats will have the resources to take TOTAL CONTROL of our country. _**[That's why we urgently need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight - that's the bare minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9caf595b65b046d79ce50909f2461eeb&_e=zz_eFcNXrp_LlD6aWe_nrUT4us44VEcyOVCl60_wKEcaKK0RhMARKCY-uL8LEaB9amyDjxEZ2N73kFOPSb8_TehArD_CVjm7MHUufg0Vy3nX97ab4kxUaqoQNIGVH4F_vz3YlVfljlkuAQsVi81JMdLrzxV6G2jqaI1kbePDsfSrMt_Q_4fYvELD3W6EFcTLduzHJpH-9ZGWwtRy3tQiv99AOvZbPfwOLhqzL9jqm8gCgCW-Kci4mKRJ1_wrRNTHjRzcULLZeNssuQcjC1k-R724NcbPpFhL1Vsv_DN97g8d6rhyQAMU_g904dpLDeGBwp-yf6816TIY0FemVY4YD0G_yBz26ST6_lvVv8mTiNKaMc4eDqti_Mi7GZhYv1S_buUaIPecDhvoJ-YXrUIIRiU5ev4TuC-eo-Gi9xxMpmH6FppKoDxDvghOQFTzsIBT1543ie_L62U5W4TiK6vwNA%3D%3D "That’s why we urgently need 10,000 generous Americans to pitch in by midnight – that’s the bare minimum we need to catch up and WIN BIG. ")**_

Listen closely:

We have a new Speaker of the House. The Democrats would like nothing more than for us to miss this first major deadline. Because if that happens, they will use their fundraising edge to steal our Majority and destroy everything we have accomplished!

_That includes our strong border security bill ... Our plan to lower energy costs for your family... Our Parents Bill of Rights... And even our impeachment inquiry..._

Trust us when we say: **Nothing you do right now is more important than this.**

Our fate is in your hands. Our make-or-break October deadline is here, and time is of the essence.

Thank you,

House Republican Leadership

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fx2x_nEbS3cXTyfe_1irzQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH6DYP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9yZWdpc3Rlci9hbWVyaWNhbi1jaXRpemVuc2hpcC1hbmQtaXRzLWRlY2xpbmU_c2M9MDA5OTZOMDI0MkxKQkRPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNpdGl6ZW5zaGlwJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYxX0ZVTkRSQUlTSU5HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTAyOFcDc3BjQgplOM7mPGWxPacyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fx2x_nEbS3cXTyfe_1irzQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH6DYP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9yZWdpc3Rlci9hbWVyaWNhbi1jaXRpemVuc2hpcC1hbmQtaXRzLWRlY2xpbmU_c2M9MDA5OTZOMDI0MkxKQkRPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNpdGl6ZW5zaGlwJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYxX0ZVTkRSQUlTSU5HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTAyOFcDc3BjQgplOM7mPGWxPacyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/p0ZGnIDFZ160aqZGD2WSjA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH6DYP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmU4zuY8ZbE9pzJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9gBot6PjzIdbwXDoNcxFLQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH6DYP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplOM7mPGWxPacyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. name: Mike Johnson

body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0zpPWJTTdTYt44dfeiA9zun_0c6IVBvDYGXgcgvpFq6wsA_FdZdOW4vrhivSCQi8j24j2KOj1Bt9YG78LM2Ka02x8gxc8t6eUm0d2LGqOxq3PamE7L655KF6zv9m-41VzHF9ejv8CXyiex1bfXePFX0)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0zcHBc_4qckpXMTE2HxM0Hm_qNiJW1-a01QIUamA4Jxw4XpaXh_jD9Y-VpAF6zeTkHp2jW898UpO4gqj-x6yPysO4eHYgYrVnMl4jXs2Fd8IN96yt_TJCQjFBBytmnXhqKzxQ_rzsFs4k-SK6JV_2JE) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0xZjg1FCaN4z5vWHAdeRk8CYWLIfIYUl0kMu9ru7wAqrlIZPIn_fMOdU9fSy7sQQvQ7xr8SuyrPXoYZ2YOXzIvql4LpYIzFy9OhbnTRCvrJwToWJQI0oMg-nhjA9jyX2uLWcwtuww9wlqcxidQwfe07)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0yGOJGzJgc_ojn_17OXcM_dw26rNUaa-8iZCO6_FZzMtmswzHBQyjNz0ueciFEHJU16uwcLHbhJhY7vmWNwJrDQPHrFOXLhms8gebZiGk3MqJefYefk3k3-3O76xo_RSsiOIGl5y4Q6oxSenBio_hmk)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0xbNA03_iK2zMJn22AfFy-3v_JYIiypglkPZZnmFH_q3L71Dkxsn9qiZdHPAaFFjshLmhrZpyX4ti9OZxzckkknWxvisoUupJ8Mlnlv9mvkyVWOF3e3VlIbfonf27bZ3fheXrwXaRhguQVM0jA3wZqX)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0xwVmd2SlKXM7YVAsd1C_39M4FgMxhq3aoxA-gh9Z_jnVAhHVgSwul0hvYANa3OXHTNIPovUeQt-782okP87SvtifGfDgrYRyI2g4ibVGXVwX6UUwolpqeZhS6WVVQMG7lIZgAwJrb8soxfld5CSiqT)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0yyoeSYBDftALI8paUpB5iZUSstQhgmXCWbsygK2EUWRnVfoXcsi5kF6I7RqSp-yxzfB33L4ic9ejHEnb-qQHeEQxHINQ9WyOeZYP2dKmO3S78b5wZvR72J0QNkmhzb941z6xwEMIrzfSK1tdi_ihGg)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0z4bN2nCG4LlIQpMMJipVc5NYaqfVD63GIEW5jPBGuKjCnk2RYPd7dMkog_UzXSWhDnWI6KB4vb5uu3ersjVR-hKTqT6iX9B7KopnB8vtzEN70SXCH_-epB5uxIdPKrTBLACB8ZaeyPXhuIx2RbxVm4)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0yJ6DogN9GjQ1OZ1fjdXzkSZk3AUu7EdRWuvGY9UQFv6WhtWhTmthUKfL0xliiXJ3My_GKGJl-PedZ0gN6w4VtiWL41c9lmZJYmBRV56VyzeSbfJzndalYk7X4Cyar7F03mF59km0I9TdTZrStWqiVI)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd9b3f3a32f42648fa90414c1effa8b&_e=4xJlFgAfaEAjrwXWbnb6PPAfY_yUSr71GHhZPNQmtHCqiUDKJTbG1nVTu4_dFyYAOl_ywQSEN0HPT4e7izvAHqjJ0dyysF7leu7tR7RY97PCnWWeqEEecF6RNGwD2QVY5aZN3Z6vzIQjEw3KN-WaiX5kxuu8pahrYeC-Xo6ISHXUdGqQdAp5PFLHNIME6dZ0um6YF2bFOU_vgZ-k7euX0AZmLAx601T81AVjR9FO_0w2xU46Q72mLOyKpL90U8034n8e8swjxgg6kHBXZnGLMahSn3bLJfr5-353t4l1iu6F5ftKqOuneDKM_j0_8xKkXFD8OUaSaPqnetpRiK2GvYCfU80dvlf77kksXtKiKvmhTZRVWZ2hsoFErmLVqFGC)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.
