Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=242c07601d9a470b94664ca044395609&_e=15KQaXHd0RAfx2GeySK52RpkFCHYyWJJy0P8Uan2uRAnUS3TA0CK3b33f8gul3TZecvw_0X3klsp_EzXoWf0b0gJ3RIvrZQLhR0HUUIzRsvyH7RVpI1HyNFwbgwhl-pFckKvLOuE1Pj8siCFAeRjthl07nR2M7qfNjQOOLe2HmfTx8_mfFMGIJwCUe7ienb0RG5SN03StPEVkntKGD1zvOfJXFTXH7oiZBF6VS4bOw8agu86ec8SKuHENvarR178retZcXNGmAa-QGCpvSpS99ZY3_a_Ka0Zqf5yr5wQfUnyKJbO4aoxiJhlu2hXvutnjRUYTZw_BvjN607Da3Y3KE5J632cClfP0ixl3W2Wnelw3rHhBKEVG5_ePXkH5wJsDCBYuO4k94SsrR1xBv1_O2EmHY5znxmfRZu7vkoVRuJZOh-Vx5BXlBAi4l_dNTRk) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=242c07601d9a470b94664ca044395609&_e=15KQaXHd0RAfx2GeySK52RpkFCHYyWJJy0P8Uan2uRAnUS3TA0CK3b33f8gul3TZecvw_0X3klsp_EzXoWf0b0gJ3RIvrZQLhR0HUUIzRsvyH7RVpI1HyNFwbgwhl-pFckKvLOuE1Pj8siCFAeRjthl07nR2M7qfNjQOOLe2HmfTx8_mfFMGIJwCUe7ienb0RG5SN03StPEVkntKGD1zvOfJXFTXH7oiZBF6VS4bOw8agu86ec8SKuHENvarR178retZcXNGmAa-QGCpvSpS99ZY3_a_Ka0Zqf5yr5wQfUm4V93uNN4VpmQxafd0Kk0hQVOfS_VUAzZuU8Jy1PkOsYRS9DXgKjGajNrNyNH-MA8fEyTZwTDYiwf7Y_JLSILj84kX79THRsW9HTNqt6trTwZyE98BnlRXbVd_tWGmOoV9N4gh9UwmEZkgSmtKHEf_)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=242c07601d9a470b94664ca044395609&_t=yqazYDfiietDsD-YtUf2MMKx3DTY01q3lEU9NIO_TYWAwD1s-m3_6ABVr20Wqt70go-Tfvemd80dkAA1nQUlkZupQWQpZbkmLVvC1DFWdB1wv6_iQUNTgpNXGgXwut9KMrwFPPv9As86CcSWYZgvq7Bxk9irbgfUdiPwcBVEiEM%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=242c07601d9a470b94664ca044395609&_e=uMmFYuVLN7g0dYYuE_CCY4i6u91ls03k44g5bGeD8BTxa391SmlkD6TkvYpd2ZcG2mupPlb6H_1yePmvjneG7IT8fjHj03J9y3tcd4E8-kdblU1P9wHuVUKLvSlI_SaJfQcENPOynaXnKuc-77JkvSSh_WepA0MnC5xHjYYf4OscVEG60hvEUaMOoNsUf1iVwLNZ7-jArnIhsFjrsFaGihtYyaVEtFl2vLIegWHPgEMBHg3ew2aOANbAT_c1shMdVCk8b0aRiw7KejIwcasXrQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=242c07601d9a470b94664ca044395609&_e=15KQaXHd0RAfx2GeySK52f5cUgGFgGWSE9YjYu2f8OS6KORWiVUYe4SfwCgbk6TiOeE7T0J25qPwtzYJqxHyKkBW6UvWd_sgRL3jSLhnqhDgE3kGLeRYonRl6vRpcNkQPw2NZ2maP_0ZH8-jkkm6fULEXQGk7YRvyxP-VlpnTnGb4AMnNBz33x4RauKBgC8_3-5dh9zLR_IXAXE7q0AUaX0YkyAQx5_BkTzZTKiE4UQ%3D)_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the USDA to support healthy school meals
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081149?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the USDA to support healthy, plant-based school meals for K-12 students! ** Many cash-strapped schools do not have the resources they need to provide sufficient school meal options for all students. Many students prefer or require plant-based meal options due to their concerns for animal welfare, climate change, religious beliefs, or health reasons. Sadly, for some of these students, **school lunches are their only meal for the day!** Students have reported being left with nothing but nut butter and jelly, or even _**just an apple**_ to eat. Young people are going hungry every day. That’s why this is so URGENT, Friend. [_**Please help us reach our goal of 5,282 more signatures by 11:59pm TONIGHT and tell the U.S. Department of Agriculture to ensure plant-based options on school menus for K-12 students!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081150?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081151?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s not just the health of future generations in question, Friend. It’s also the health of our entire planet. Food production contributes **around one-third of climate-warming emissions** and the BILLIONS of school meals served every year are an enormous contributor. School menus are dominated by animal products, which create far more emissions compared to plant-based foods. In fact, **beef burgers have 50x the carbon footprint of black bean burgers!**
Many young people are aware of the impacts that climate change will have on their future. That’s part of why so many students are asking for plant-based options. But many schools don’t have the resources to provide those climate-friendly options. Our research in California found that **ONE THIRD of schools did not regularly offer a plant-based meal beyond nut butter and jelly.** The USDA can help change that. [_**Will you help ensure public school students don’t go hungry and offer support for plant-based meal options?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081152?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081153?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. **His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.**

clean_body: It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor. Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win. You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts. Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate. If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser. After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. subject: My core principals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
To my core, I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom – but those foundations of our great country are under attack. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_t=u-o0z7qjAsb1B6ESEBafIKwEVAG3qDCu6DZmq3awARMCV9r_hyBa3M0IKaYSn4jiLaSi2xfW9jG_pfZc03S4ZAf6mWoNO2K_FUJc6N5jst0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_t=u-o0z7qjAsb1B6ESEBafIKwEVAG3qDCu6DZmq3awARMCV9r_hyBa3M0IKaYSn4jiLaSi2xfW9jG_pfZc03S4ZAf6mWoNO2K_FUJc6N5jst0%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYcYsRsvXYr1CVD_ZKaJarUjfZk3B6_DwBkM9NwPwJCynuMn7fJJne-4aIK5xrPARTFuWYSnUibq3wXtoFt6lA1OqW-4LJ3Rb9XNSlV4kXGK4mblHzJp-QU5TxpG_rMpzpvbuVqg3lAE0L4JNBbOJHtag%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYcNsUEvnEpwg2_I-tYyA4bHjXFH_KNAF-4bsYyjDF0GtxUTLK6SeFHtTNIUZbbdYjiHhchZBevA5nlxAYeUe4QpwKFz2hR12r__Z7jHufHzGq047UN4phwn8jopqHmpzUjNlFo4EXsbeGZe9wL2XnYQg%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYc2WFb8MHweqxCPwj6ok90bXwmCXPB9p6GQSX9CVST-qzU0xEyv1igJvMlspduhdp1t_cKf6HetKrr5qQn9b9ufaNKNpGBNOFGZ3Ujh5tiG9runG7b5eYRXbaG3JNgbqLFBDKKFGpGhaO-eGl6eaWa_g%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYcn_nVvPRwkYiTqUMdXFP00sKgDsxKbz-EvHqc0wpBvDIdtnHI1NSmm1emWx0cNPtxv_AEFzgoqDFS8tQIzfrzG-J14rVjv69S5iiILX6AU3gdF6TDLvXm317zU9JtJLnE5tKPATgd7CJEOb3CCU19qQ%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYcerSsogeHk0Gwu666XB2v4t3FOM5rOX-tLfCC1wo3xdVPOraQDAk2Owo7tf92p1tF95ZV7WCbllnMrPuO1PP1m9Oe8ls1yThZ618FCAD8iS8fIqkE6dscIipCIvDP0m1hfeG3BU9hGmlvozUtFWGWDA%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=71822ad19e8443a9acff8f61d98736d8&_e=KuCiFbI_7P3XHA7I9BGM9zVFRPcMuE9FC9uKeTsfPi0PYc9j5UtUGdt1C6Lcu6rvfWQahPJzbu_2OsTo-ED5VcM7UAARwzyPlEVZgO7svVnMJtYWS4L_bJs9rqGtRJkEV1WP5vEahTYYJ4FIVThSOMcZB9fK5VEYV9EsPzhlb_1NebZq0D9kh-tK5hJ_0v2Vfd0OTmBuSm04cPlRxxdXxopdqi2nORTj5ktbbNoUcgrdDDOmOjEa3tB11ZjebBYcBqVY5PsI5fagI9lDTrGihBPWQwa4PPmXgUEXoQGI5WY18mcekvlx2LvXaaYMLiJIZXat845Am59379RKDKXlhLpCvWHCBncIwCPEsi1gi62mHwa9DmPCgzw4PeCvtitNdlib3LJfebj_GnJKoSKi0Q%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Bad ideas have bad consequences – update from Mississippi’s conservative think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greenenergy-11571287?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Following Hamas’ terror attack on Israel, tens of thousands took to the streets.** They marched in Manhattan and Chicago, as well as London and Paris. Rallies were held on the campuses of colleges across America.

**Were the protesters lamenting the death of Israeli civilians? Not at all.** Were they there to demand the release of young children taken hostage by Hamas? I missed that bit.
---
|
---
_Time Square, New York_
| **Instead, in the wake of a pogrom that saw the murder of 1,400 Jews, tens of thousands of Americans marched in support of their killers.** The protesters literally chanted for the destruction of the state of Israel.

How can it possibly be that the great grandchildren of the generation of Americans that liberated Dachau could think this way?

**_For a generation, ‘woke’ ideas have been left to fester on college campuses. Over the past few weeks, we have started to see the real world consequences. _**

If we are to put this right, we first need to understand what has gone wrong. Looking at the protesters on social media, I was struck by the farcical contradictions.

**Feminists were out there in support of an Islamist ideology that denies women rights.** Self-styled democrats sided with those seeking to establish a theocracy. On social media, I saw a group calling themselves “Queers for Palestine”, holding aloft a rainbow motif. How long do you imagine they would survive in Gaza?
---
|
---
_Don't try this in Gaza_
| This confusion by the pro-Hamas protesters, which would be comical if it were not so grim, points to the root cause of the problem;** for millions of young Americans, a creed of cultural relativism has been allowed to establish itself as a secular belief system. **

**If all cultures were of equal worth, then every culture would be as capable of producing science, innovation and political liberty – not to mention a US Constitution. Most cultures are not.**

The trouble is that if you refuse to accept that some ways of life are better than others, you have no means of measuring what is good. **In your twisted belief system, the head hackers of Hamas are no different from the Golani reservists prepared to take great personal risks to minimize civilian casualties. **

Cultural relativism begins by applying double standards. It rapidly descends to favoring the non-Western over the Western.

**Taught to believe in decolonizing the curriculum at school and university, perhaps you start to see Hamas terrorists as noble savages, battling to decolonize Palestine from the wicked West.** Often unconsciously, we have raised an entire generation to see the human condition as Rousseau perceived it, rather than though the hard-headed realism of Hobbes. No wonder some then think like latter-day Jacobins. No surprise that the BBC, a once credible organization, refuses to call Hamas terrorists.
---
|
---
_Hamas showed what "decolonizing" looks like_
| Ambivalence about the Western way of life slips into open animus.

**“But what do you mean by Western way of life?” some will ask.** “What do people living in the southern US or in Scandinavia possibly have in common with those in the Negev? There is no single Western culture”.

Culture is indeed complex, like the branches of a very tall tree. **But within the tree of culture there is a definable trunk that one might call Judeo-Christian culture, from which extend a multiplicity of off shoots. **

Culture, as with the branches of a tree, can sometimes be grafted, some cultures fused onto another. You even get what arborists call ‘inosculation’, when branches that had separated fuse back together as one again.

**But as any arborist also knows, not every kind of graft will work. Not every kind of culture can be fused with every other. Some are incompatible.** Nor can every way of life coexist alongside every other. Those Western feminists marching in support of Hamas seem not to have understood this. Their children and their grandchildren will.

**Nor, perhaps, have Western progressives understood that Western culture, whether we are conscious of it or not, is a product of a distinctive set of ideas, both secular and ecclesiastical.** I doubt many atheists would appreciate me pointing it out, but even their humanist belief system is a product of something uncontestably Judeo Christian. (Try living under Hamas as a secular humanist and see how long you last).
---
| None of this really matters when everyone around us shares the same underlying Western cultural assumptions. To a degree that might surprise both evangelicals and atheists, they fundamentally do share a common set of assumptions. The trouble is that there is a growing body of those living in the West that don’t. **There are an increasing number of people in the US, Britain and Europe – not to mention the Middle East - whose world view is shaped by the ideology of political Islamism, and Islamism’s principle proponent, Sayyid Qtub. **

When political Islamism comes into conflict with Western ways, as it has with increasing frequency since the Salman Rushdie affair in the 1980s, the cultural relativists living in the West have no idea where to draw the line. Indeed, they do not even appreciate that there is a line to be drawn.

**“But what about the sins of Western culture?” some will counter.** “Weren’t Western countries once at the center of the slave trade? Didn’t women and minorities have to endure unequal treatment within living memory?”

Almost every contemporary non-Western culture around the world today falls short of the standards set by campus progressives. Only in the West are individual rights respected, often at times imperfectly (as the campus puritans are quick to point out). Anyone who does not know that may not know much about life outside America.

That the West today is a far more pleasant place for minorities than it was in the past is not evidence of Western guilt. **It shows that cultural progress is possible. The way we used to live is not as good as it is today. Not every way of living is of equal worth. That cultural progress is possible is proof that cultural relativism is a nonsense, and that some ways of life are worth fighting in preference to others. ** ** **

**At the Mississippi Leadership Academy, we try to teach a cohort of young Americans some of the underlying ideas and principles that underpin Western liberty.** We introduce them to the history of Western thought – Hobbes, Locke and the Founding Fathers. We discuss with them the morality of the free market, and American exceptionalism.
---
|
---
_Mississippi Leadership Academy - learning about the ideas that make our society a success_
| Students graduating from our program will, I hope, see the world very differently from the day they started. The insights and lessons we teach will, I hope, remain with them for life.

**When we launched the Academy two years ago, I saw it was important, but no more than a nice-to-have. After the events of the past few weeks, I see it as perhaps the most important thing a think tank in America could be doing.**

If you know anyone that would benefit from being part of this year’s program, please get in touch.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e48794ad42&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---

Culture, as with the branches of a tree, can sometimes be grafted, some cultures fused onto another. You even get what arborists call ‘inosculation’, when branches that had separated fuse back together as one again. But as any arborist also knows, not every kind of graft will work. Not every kind of culture can be fused with every other. Some are incompatible. Nor can every way of life coexist alongside every other. Those Western feminists marching in support of Hamas seem not to have understood this. Their children and their grandchildren will. Nor, perhaps, have Western progressives understood that Western culture, whether we are conscious of it or not, is a product of a distinctive set of ideas, both secular and ecclesiastical. I doubt many atheists would appreciate me pointing it out, but even their humanist belief system is a product of something uncontestably Judeo Christian. (Try living under Hamas as a secular humanist and see how long you last). | None of this really matters when everyone around us shares the same underlying Western cultural assumptions. To a degree that might surprise both evangelicals and atheists, they fundamentally do share a common set of assumptions. The trouble is that there is a growing body of those living in the West that don’t. There are an increasing number of people in the US, Britain and Europe – not to mention the Middle East - whose world view is shaped by the ideology of political Islamism, and Islamism’s principle proponent, Sayyid Qtub. When political Islamism comes into conflict with Western ways, as it has with increasing frequency since the Salman Rushdie affair in the 1980s, the cultural relativists living in the West have no idea where to draw the line. Indeed, they do not even appreciate that there is a line to be drawn. “But what about the sins of Western culture?” some will counter. “Weren’t Western countries once at the center of the slave trade? Didn’t women and minorities have to endure unequal treatment within living memory?” Almost every contemporary non-Western culture around the world today falls short of the standards set by campus progressives. Only in the West are individual rights respected, often at times imperfectly (as the campus puritans are quick to point out). Anyone who does not know that may not know much about life outside America. That the West today is a far more pleasant place for minorities than it was in the past is not evidence of Western guilt. It shows that cultural progress is possible. The way we used to live is not as good as it is today. Not every way of living is of equal worth. That cultural progress is possible is proof that cultural relativism is a nonsense, and that some ways of life are worth fighting in preference to others. At the Mississippi Leadership Academy, we try to teach a cohort of young Americans some of the underlying ideas and principles that underpin Western liberty. We introduce them to the history of Western thought – Hobbes, Locke and the Founding Fathers. We discuss with them the morality of the free market, and American exceptionalism. | Mississippi Leadership Academy - learning about the ideas that make our society a success | Students graduating from our program will, I hope, see the world very differently from the day they started. The insights and lessons we teach will, I hope, remain with them for life. When we launched the Academy two years ago, I saw it was important, but no more than a nice-to-have. After the events of the past few weeks, I see it as perhaps the most important thing a think tank in America could be doing. If you know anyone that would benefit from being part of this year’s program, please get in touch. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | PS. SCHOOL CHOICE PUBLIC MEETING. We are hosting a lunch on November 15th to discuss how we can make Mississippi a school choice state. Click on the image below for details and to book your place: | | | |

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c7db773d774b6ba593f9aa90256014&_e=Q4AUJ5deJznOzF9i6NyPsXb5Yaf-jk5hrp3jUpSGgZe1c7C0GU49DSFkMWqDH4iZU6D-2uJRmvfEwElVjTQw-bDakKgiKEja5avNafjDLuYphBN86olT7nCVXUuQbyHOiaa5IOAe6JgnL9tC-gq0HTJeQVjTL9xO3yvOF5pe_F6SQl9pnwHstF7gnRhyciq8abOAhgY66S2PSB4NBhwkksLBTXsMjFk5RCg0uMWevXCF0CDdAcuOs8Pjqvvu_HCMZQknUB-l8fnOpUot7ddXdzHi-GpSSgwori8yL-HXRGR96Dyj1fz7L_77Hj7nhM4_GRfv8Y_opUseFf6tvJ_hZuI-PqWfFZqh3O47YvG47OIvUFAPoRLJnUQV81TZBLUEpE93BP9D1iC12EyRwi_E7KtXy-_tlVpSAd1hH7HG_FZnnw5VAnjUtPew89lXtmVT) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c7db773d774b6ba593f9aa90256014&_e=Q4AUJ5deJznOzF9i6NyPsXb5Yaf-jk5hrp3jUpSGgZe1c7C0GU49DSFkMWqDH4iZU6D-2uJRmvfEwElVjTQw-bDakKgiKEja5avNafjDLuYphBN86olT7nCVXUuQbyHOiaa5IOAe6JgnL9tC-gq0HTJeQVjTL9xO3yvOF5pe_F6SQl9pnwHstF7gnRhyciq8abOAhgY66S2PSB4NBhwkksLBTXsMjFk5RCg0uMWevXCF0CDdAcuOs8Pjqvvu_HCMZQknUB-l8fnOpUot7ddXdzHi-GpSSgwori8yL-HXRGTPoysVifIDU_s2idXeUr-aC1iIQNGs7AS69aG247BC9jHc-iUzlKc_nwZ2ESigktSG9kv30oyFRUmOpD3AAltJmA6WS2HN5LSZ-ePuksd7d9OCpV_6dcD9sWXf0vzmlV6Yk-gXoHtHHvXBz5MhF-16)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=d6c7db773d774b6ba593f9aa90256014&_t=lQ3L68Is-qRpqXt3CA2F-7G1OYg-9_YtjlBeHY5zOq1g4RAZKBm_38gY2zeMpc_DkYJ3p7adUgjTD3GokSJIoETHCqmLnE5RrhvZvwcwy1_EdjhvhiFT82IJxGgAB6BQ3Tc91Y2hwn-6QSU756zqXlu_bFlytQfkz1IRhXZJjrE%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c7db773d774b6ba593f9aa90256014&_e=MsHyzhxnQe49lEGrWnp5qwYG889u1ckwzWy0MbpPec5hhVdS0bEkaIFVtwT-uM1D30t5AqQCZ_BYzFKWvaCygpIXcbFlExmrbrmAfCoqQG-Oy1ltcn4_JH5KmLH717Q-dmkEArWvWQC79AxU7HbE7L0L2XIuxn1PXG_E3G31KOC5epzadJOokS7PdHaP_wPfhBTT9McbY56E3qaurZJroaadGuDG_9OLkLWUy6iSOGxsE6xUKj3VWdvA1mMZ4B33rz_CHWJ8Wup9pG-vbLGM5w%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c7db773d774b6ba593f9aa90256014&_e=Q4AUJ5deJznOzF9i6NyPsf5YDlwi3qzJYrhRk5_szt2E60ioZFlsxCOYh-pODkltLpHqqQaoGo05oSC3Jk-UdVh-4I5Bdu1RX128s8RfP96hv3BHxVZ3pjJUEdwVsSZUtb72jfoWPnEhKNPJBTP0H22K07ddDt3R_8bx1khS0bnQ32TRQDVPbfTdh96oLq7jVk6UPe1ss0dD1ZI93mf4RraV9H_t3bH1Ik4KgaXxaVw%3D)_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18a4364ba32e4de68a15e0324a5b06c3&_e=5E91oaeMkBGK6RRRfuabeO7mOS-Bvtgxu1TCF34ZT_xqsYgMGaM3Hzx9mbzesq4jXepM9zLpAIZ0QiR924FROGNrZOwyDxL0Lr_mVwh57vOR84LOtaj12n8oRhweqaAfMTY_b8ZY2mOBAGt76yJVzp5-fajYR3mLJYB54DqA0hB2IWpCXWASziH5QzrHNgvZJdK70ZuLQG2rFAfMIghxisnAqN224ETWgm0-mCI1Qiwhg8AG4GFrUgdaci9Jmc4WThNpOtixJWaKUWSdkmGVPWOjPqXlzXbNdKRs5hdcBEQ6wWWeQ9plepwTqzQlfRd6). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18a4364ba32e4de68a15e0324a5b06c3&_e=5E91oaeMkBGK6RRRfuabeO7mOS-Bvtgxu1TCF34ZT_xqsYgMGaM3Hzx9mbzesq4jXepM9zLpAIZ0QiR924FROGNrZOwyDxL0Lr_mVwh57vOR84LOtaj12n8oRhweqaAfMTY_b8ZY2mOBAGt76yJVzpk0B2yBQT4OMdY0-CODPRAjnlA-aqt6HpeswhFsnVFu5cG6FjSxaZjIjq2sKxV-pNCgKeILqKM5duKquUixsJD9Ehno8HXCMrbmBj17uAGFhHJfJaS7djwim8ohPF9FeqfHcBElHY5PeikBA43kW37BQb6Dr8zJbOgQUXr6yZvP) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18a4364ba32e4de68a15e0324a5b06c3&_e=5E91oaeMkBGK6RRRfuabeO7mOS-Bvtgxu1TCF34ZT_xqsYgMGaM3Hzx9mbzesq4jXepM9zLpAIZ0QiR924FROGNrZOwyDxL0Lr_mVwh57vOR84LOtaj12n8oRhweqaAfMTY_b8ZY2mOBAGt76yJVziAcAWq82Cpk0hzC0-AUMH3194DNBIyyG5I0_DO7vBzd-JRBA4fO2exXk0kDpdFO2V4-UZbtHgF4Um8eff4UcI9uKIqNXUDeaqxtQm-B-uOK_Um80iBRtuMQ2I1ZQUL3NDdVeadCOCNOnD4ZqHf1h1iJa5tHvzWVcuFGBMvYEqDV) on these survival food kits while you can.

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. clean_body: I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom – but those foundations of our great country are under attack. | | Fellow American, To my core, I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom - but those foundations of our great country are under attack. Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - IF conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. clean_body: Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats are laser focused on this deadline.| | | | | Patriot, First, let me fill you in on some fantastic news: Our movement is officially VICTORIOUS over the RINOs! At the end of August, behind closed doors, the special interest “Republicans” imposed a critical deadline upon themselves... They said that 60 DAYS was the specific timetable they had to “beat Trump, ” otherwise, their efforts to stop us were doomed to fail. And now, with their sinister plot having come and gone, all they have to show for it is UTTER FAILURE. We’re winning the primary by a historic 50-POINT margin, and we’re beating Crooked Joe in all the critical battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election! But I’ll be frank, there is a flip side to this victory... Now that Crooked Joe knows 100% of our focus is shifting to our REAL mission of FIRING him for good, the witch hunts will no doubt – and it’s hard to think this possible – get even worse from here on out. Patriot, that means this month’s fundraising deadline just became that much more important... As the FIRST deadline since the RINOs’ plot to stop us was officially deemed their greatest failure, Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats will be laser focused on our October numbers. Which is why, if you’re able, I’m counting on every one of our grassroots supporters to contribute whatever you can – $10, $5, even just $1 – to OUTRAISE the incompetent Crook currently occupying the White House. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: NEW >> Congress introduces resolution to EXPEL Santos!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**BREAKING: House Republicans introduce a resolution to expel George Santos from Congress!**

[_We need 9,000 more people to add their name in support of this resolution! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?source=em231028-90do&akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)
---

Friend -- House Republicans have turned their back on George Santos:

[](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?source=em231028-90do&akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)
Even George's collegues in his own party are waking up to his lies and deceit.

**This is our chance to get rid of him for good:** [_Will you click here to add your name to our petition supporting this resolution to expel Santos from Congress?_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?source=em231028-90do&akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)

[ADD YOUR NAME ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)
**We deserve better.** Will you join us in sending a message loud and clear that people like Santos do _NOT_ belong in Congress?
The man stole funds from a dying dog’s charity...

He lied about his grandparents dying in the Holocaust...

And last month, he was charged with taking money from his own supporters without their permission.

There is a place for people like George Santos and it is _NOT_ Congress – **it’s jail!**

[_If you agree, please add your name to our petition supporting the new House resolution to expel George Santos! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?source=em231028-90do&akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)

[SIGN ON NOW ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/expel-gs/?akid=549%2E8507%2EyKF5co)

Thank you,
Zak for Congress

_"In the upcoming legislative elections, abortion and voting rights are in peril. And that’s just the start..."_
**Mother Jones**
---
The alarm bells are ringing, and we cannot ignore the threats to abortion and voting rights looming over our democracy. In states like Virginia, the specters of "Stop the Steal" and election denial still cast a long shadow.
[**If we don't act now, the consequences could be dire. Take action to boost our efforts to protect fairness in states like Virginia and nationwide. ➡️**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72334035/435010843/494086034?refcode=20231028_AOTL_F_VAUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNTI0ZWVhLTkxNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a5AWczYpmecVnuHyUd7FgakRcHBdPXJPgajAkme8Bp4=)

**First, on November 8, 2020, in Purcellville, Virginia, extreme lawmakers sounded an ominous alarm, seeking to disrupt the peaceful transfer of power -- the very cornerstone of our democratic process.**
The events that unfolded were just the beginning of an unprecedented assault on our democracy, culminating in the horrifying attack on our Capitol on January 6, 2021.
**Now, these same forces are attempting to dismantle our democratic system, seeking to impose their extremism at the ballot box.**
[**This is our call to action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72334041/435010849/494086034?refcode=20231028_AOTL_F_VAUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNTI0ZWVhLTkxNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a5AWczYpmecVnuHyUd7FgakRcHBdPXJPgajAkme8Bp4=) [**Help amplify our efforts to ensure fairness, equity, and justice prevail in our elections in states like Virginia and nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72334044/435010852/494086034?refcode=20231028_AOTL_F_VAUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNTI0ZWVhLTkxNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a5AWczYpmecVnuHyUd7FgakRcHBdPXJPgajAkme8Bp4=)

[**"The right to vote is the foundation of our democracy."**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72334062/435010868/494086034?refcode=20231028_AOTL_F_VAUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNTI0ZWVhLTkxNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a5AWczYpmecVnuHyUd7FgakRcHBdPXJPgajAkme8Bp4=)
**President Obama**
We must honor those words and come together, resolute in our commitment to a democracy that truly represents every voice.
We can forge a path towards fairness and justice in our democracy, free from the influence of extremists and bad actors. [**But we can’t without your support.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72334066/435010875/494086034?refcode=20231028_AOTL_F_VAUpdate_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNTI0ZWVhLTkxNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a5AWczYpmecVnuHyUd7FgakRcHBdPXJPgajAkme8Bp4=)

clean_body: | "In the upcoming legislative elections, abortion and voting rights are in peril. And that’s just the start..." Mother Jones The alarm bells are ringing, and we cannot ignore the threats to abortion and voting rights looming over our democracy. In states like Virginia, the specters of "Stop the Steal" and election denial still cast a long shadow. = = First, on November 8, 2020, in Purcellville, Virginia, extreme lawmakers sounded an ominous alarm, seeking to disrupt the peaceful transfer of power -- the very cornerstone of our democratic process. The events that unfolded were just the beginning of an unprecedented assault on our democracy, culminating in the horrifying attack on our Capitol on January 6, 2021. Now, these same forces are attempting to dismantle our democratic system, seeking to impose their extremism at the ballot box. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We must continue to rise above partisan lines, uniting against any forces attempting to manipulate power for the few. = President Obama We must honor those words and come together, resolute in our commitment to a democracy that truly represents every voice. We can forge a path towards fairness and justice in our democracy, free from the influence of extremists and bad actors. = = Together, we will ensure democracy remains a true reflection of the will of the people. \-- Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: Vote Early Starting Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
Here is what's on the ballot. Hope to see you there! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=a1af6e463b&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

Early voting starts today! [You can find your poll site here](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=3384167385&e=2de202398d).

The ballot will feature two New York State ballot questions that you should know about.

Proposal #1 allows school districts in smaller cities to issue more debt in order to finance increased investment in their educational programming and facilities. This would place small-city spending on par with large municipalities.

Proposal #2 would allow municipalities to continue making investments in sewage projects that would not count toward any constitutional debt limits.
---
| [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=d463236d18&e=2de202398d)
---
| New York State Democratic elected officials, educational organizations, and infrastructure advocates are supporting these initiatives.

I plan to vote "yes" for both proposals to allow for continued investments in education and infrastructure here and throughout New York State. I hope you will, too.

Carlina
---
| | |
---
| **More Info and News**
---
| **New Poll Site for District 2: Nathan Straus Houses Community Center**
Some residents of Kips Bay will note that their November 7 poll site was moved to the Straus Houses Community Center, which reopened with advocacy from the tenant association, Carlina, and other stakeholders. Make sure to [check your poll site](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=1100c9c59b&e=2de202398d)!

[Patch: ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=d940695727&e=2de202398d)[**Spend $1 Million in West Village Funds with Participatory Budgeting**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=9f449bdaaa&e=2de202398d)
Residents of the West Village and all of Council District 2 can decide how to spend city capital funds by engaging in participatory budgeting. Submit your ideas to Carlina's team [here](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=5c4600381f&e=2de202398d).

[Commercial Observer: Grand Street Settlement Gets New Home on Pitt Street](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=bb9a895e6f&e=2de202398d)
Carlina was proud to have allocated millions of discretionary dollars to the renovation of Grand Street's 80 Pitt Street location, a hub for Lower East Siders of all ages and backgrounds.
---
|

body:
... and he’s now the speaker of the House. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72337469/435022946/-1047396217?amounts=10,24,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=24&refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231026_fr_newmanager_cm_nc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM3ZDg4OC05NTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OhJKZX_r5UtlRA8cGizh4QY4FSZWj-5pGJueAYLEuY=) | _Right-wing extremists have installed an anti-LGBTQ+, anti-trans congressman as the speaker of the House._ [**_Please read about Rep. Mike Johnson's bigoted agenda below and chip in to help elect Sarah in 2024._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72337472/435022948/-210368639?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231028_fr_speaker_team_nc_act_xx_hdr&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM3ZDg4OC05NTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OhJKZX_r5UtlRA8cGizh4QY4FSZWj-5pGJueAYLEuY=)
---
******We’re sure you've heard all the ways the new speaker of the House, Rep. Mike Johnson, is bad on the issues that matter most — the issues that matter most to working families, to young people, to our allies abroad, to protecting our democracy.** But we want to dig a bit deeper. This isn't about an issue or a talking point — Johnson's beliefs are dangerous to LGBTQ+ folks, especially trans folks. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72337476/435022952/-210368639?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231028_fr_speaker_team_nc_act_xx_img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM3ZDg4OC05NTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OhJKZX_r5UtlRA8cGizh4QY4FSZWj-5pGJueAYLEuY=) Johnson made a name for himself **crafting and defending legislation backed by religious extremists**. He called "the homosexual lifestyle" "morally wrong and physically dangerous." And he said same-sex marriage was akin to giving equal protection to pedophiles and polygamists. He spent one term in the Louisiana legislature. His primary accomplishment? **Introducing legislation that would've allowed businesses to discriminate against LGBTQ+ folks based on religious beliefs.** At the time, one of his Republican colleagues even called him "a despicable bigot of the highest order." With a national platform, Johnson has a larger platform to attack LGBTQ+ Rights. **He sponsored a national "Don’t Say Gay" bill, led a Congressional hearing spreading lies about healthcare for trans youth, and even co-sponsored a bill with Marjorie Taylor Greene** that would strip trans youth of their healthcare and imprison the doctors who care for them. In short: there's a lot on the line in 2024. And now, an anti-LGBTQ+, anti-trans extremist is in charge of the House of Representatives.**** **But can you imagine anti-LGBTQ Speaker Mike Johnson having to serve with Sarah McBride as the first out trans member of Congress?** As Democrats, we have a lot of work ahead of us — but if we do the work, it _will_ pay off. We have the power to stand up to right-wing hatred. We have the power to take back the House and send Johnson packing. We have the power to elect LGBTQ+ champions and protect the most vulnerable among us. Let's show Speaker Johnson and the rest of the MAGA Republicans that our democracy is big enough for all of us. **We've _never_ elected a trans member of Congress — but we can change that next year with your help. [Can you chip in to Sarah's campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72337479/435022960/-210368639?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231028_fr_speaker_team_nc_act_xx_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM3ZDg4OC05NTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OhJKZX_r5UtlRA8cGizh4QY4FSZWj-5pGJueAYLEuY=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: ... and he’s now the speaker of the House. | = | Right-wing extremists have installed an anti-LGBTQ+, anti-trans congressman as the speaker of the House. = ****We’re sure you've heard all the ways the new speaker of the House, Rep. Mike Johnson, is bad on the issues that matter most — the issues that matter most to working families, to young people, to our allies abroad, to protecting our democracy. But we want to dig a bit deeper. This isn't about an issue or a talking point — Johnson's beliefs are dangerous to LGBTQ+ folks, especially trans folks. = Johnson made a name for himself crafting and defending legislation backed by religious extremists. He called "the homosexual lifestyle" "morally wrong and physically dangerous." And he said same-sex marriage was akin to giving equal protection to pedophiles and polygamists. He spent one term in the Louisiana legislature. His primary accomplishment? Introducing legislation that would've allowed businesses to discriminate against LGBTQ+ folks based on religious beliefs. At the time, one of his Republican colleagues even called him "a despicable bigot of the highest order." With a national platform, Johnson has a larger platform to attack LGBTQ+ Rights. He sponsored a national "Don’t Say Gay" bill, led a Congressional hearing spreading lies about healthcare for trans youth, and even co-sponsored a bill with Marjorie Taylor Greene that would strip trans youth of their healthcare and imprison the doctors who care for them. In short: there's a lot on the line in 2024. And now, an anti-LGBTQ+, anti-trans extremist is in charge of the House of Representatives.** But can you imagine anti-LGBTQ Speaker Mike Johnson having to serve with Sarah McBride as the first out trans member of Congress? As Democrats, we have a lot of work ahead of us — but if we do the work, it will pay off. We have the power to stand up to right-wing hatred. We have the power to take back the House and send Johnson packing. We have the power to elect LGBTQ+ champions and protect the most vulnerable among us. Let's show Speaker Johnson and the rest of the MAGA Republicans that our democracy is big enough for all of us. We've never elected a trans member of Congress — but we can change that next year with your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thanks for hearing us out, Team McBride = ** | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | **= = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. | | _PETER, THERE IS ONE BLACK WOMEN IN THE SENATE!!_ **GOOD NEWS:** There are 3 extremely qualified Black Democratic women running for Senate in 2024 — Angela Alsobrooks, Barbara Lee & Lisa Blunt Rochester!

**BAD NEWS:** These are all open seats and MAGA Republicans are going to fight like hell to try and pick them up in 2024.

**GOOD NEWS:** We’re no strangers to tough races. In 2020 we provided over 70,000 rides to the polls in the Georgia runoffs. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters and invested over one MILLION dollars into Black Democratic candidates.

**BAD NEWS:** Doing that work costs money, and we’re already starting to fall behind on our End-of-Month fundraising goal. If we can’t pick up the pace now, we might not be able to power ANY of our endorsed candidates to victory on Nov. 7 — that's less than 3 weeks!

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | PETER, THERE IS ONE BLACK WOMEN IN THE SENATE!! GOOD NEWS: There are 3 extremely qualified Black Democratic women running for Senate in 2024 — Angela Alsobrooks, Barbara Lee & Lisa Blunt Rochester! BAD NEWS: These are all open seats and MAGA Republicans are going to fight like hell to try and pick them up in 2024. GOOD NEWS: We’re no strangers to tough races. In 2020 we provided over 70,000 rides to the polls in the Georgia runoffs. In 2022, we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters and invested over one MILLION dollars into Black Democratic candidates. BAD NEWS: Doing that work costs money, and we’re already starting to fall behind on our End-of-Month fundraising goal. If we can’t pick up the pace now, we might not be able to power ANY of our endorsed candidates to victory on Nov. 7 — that's less than 3 weeks! GOOD NEWS: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. It is time to stop. If the killing of human beings continues and accelerates in a genocidal fashion as is now occurring in Gaza, all of mankind may find itself over the cliff. The terror attack carried out by Hamas in Israel, which left over 1400 dead, was not the beginning of this, and the death of 1.5 million or more Palestinians, including 600,000 children will not be the end. The end will be thermonuclear annihilation of all life on this planet, and the cause will have been the inaction by the American people in the face of four assassinations in the 1960's, the incarceration of our greatest thinker Lyndon LaRouche, and the lack of interest in finding out how the September 11, 2001 terror attacks on our nation were allowed to occur.
I am running for U.S. Senate because the nation which could immediately halt the carnage and the rush to Armageddon is the United States, but our president is a senile and vicious old man, and our Congress is a pack of fools or worse. Therefore the fourth branch of government, We the People must act. Please join my emergency call Monday evening and review the documents below in preparation for that discussion.

name: Roy Cooper

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Republicans have thrown the 2024 NC election cycle into chaos.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72339868/435032421/823540626?refcode=ea.78b1b799-9975-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.78b1b799-9975-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGIxYjc5OS05OTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWRfn828L8-q_KThngZhvfpGoXfuS2HfBLoNXDpFDR4=&emci=dea6afa8-fb74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=78b1b799-9975-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, as you know, radical Republicans launched an unprecedented assault on North Carolina’s democracy this month. Between their extreme gerrymander of our legislative districts and new election laws designed to make it harder for some North Carolinians to vote, the GOP’s one-seat supermajority in Raleigh has thrown the 2024 election cycle into chaos. Democratic candidates will need to work twice as hard to ensure voters have the resources and information they need to cast their ballots. It won’t be cheap or easy. That’s why our team set a $50,000 end-of-month goal to help defeat Republicans next year. Hi Peter,
There are just 10 days until the November 7th election!
We are in the homestretch of election season, but we need your support to make it through. Our goal this November is to elect champions for affordability who will keep drug costs low, housing costs down, and keep Virginia families a priority. Just $10 from you can help us achieve that goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-va-general]
Our endorsed candidates are ready to fight for what families in our commonwealth need. These economic champions will support legislation that allows us all to thrive here in Virginia.
With your help we can get these candidates elected. A $10 contribution today will keep us fighting until election day on November 7th [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-va-general] . Your support will help elect champions for Virginia families.
Contribute today
We'll see you at the polls!

subject: Winning in 2024 starts NOW!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: I Stand with Israel 🇮🇱 (2 min update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
House Republicans are united under Speaker Mike Johnson. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=73a48dbb97&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

I'm proud to report that House Republicans are united under our new Speaker Mike Johnson. This week we passed legislation to support Israel and uncovered even more Biden corruption.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICANS ARE UNITED 🇺🇸**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f3cfe2ae06&e=1050d051da)
---
| **Earlier this week House Republicans elected our new Speaker of the House—Congressman Mike Johnson from Louisiana****. **
Mike is a God-fearing husband and father of four. He has served on the Judiciary Committee alongside Jim Jordan and has a proven record of protecting our Constitutional rights and freedoms.

The Biden administration is failing our country at home and causing chaos on the world stage. House Republicans are the last line of defense to stopping the left from destroying America.

I was proud to support Jim Jordan for Speaker, but once Jim dropped out, I knew Mike was the right man to lead us as the radical left continues to wage war on our conservative values.

**_Under Speaker Mike Johnson, we are going to tackle:_**
* _The crisis at our open Southern border_
* _Biden’s attacks on American Energy_
* _Skyrocketing inflation_
* _Failing law and order_
* _The Radical Left’s war on our God-given rights_

---
|
---
| **I STAND WITH ISRAEL 🇮🇱**
---
|
---
| **For decades, Israel has stood as a beacon of freedom and democracy for nations across the globe.**

The ruthless, barbaric attacks we have seen against innocent civilians by Iran-backed Hamas terrorists are evil. Thousands of Israeli civilians killed, women raped, children beheaded, families kidnapped.

I will not stand for it. I fully support Israel's right to defend herself and I will _**ALWAYS**_ stand with America's strongest ally in the Middle East.

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9dc845beb2&e=1050d051da)
---
| _**Under President Trump, we had peace through strength. Under Joe Biden, we have chaos fueled by weakness.**_
On the anniversary of 9/11, President Biden paid a **$6 BILLION** ransom payment to the Iranian regime. A few weeks later, Iran-backed terrorists waged a ruthless war on Israel.

I signed on to legislation to **STOP** this money from being used to fund terrorism. Not another penny to a regime that chants Death to America.

It's disgraceful.

---
|
---
| I was proud to vote for legislation this week to _**SUPPORT**_ our ally Israel and _**CONDEMN**_ the evil terrorists that murdered so many innocent Israeli citizens.

It is truly abhorrent that **15 EXTREME HOUSE DEMOCRATS** stood with Hamas and voted against this resolution. Congress has **NO PLACE**** ** for Hamas terrorist sympathizers.

These Democrats have refused to condemn the barbaric Hamas attacks and repeatedly let their dangerous antisemitic views come to light. I will continue pushing back against the left's hateful, dangerous, and destructive rhetoric.
---
|
---
| **FROM ONE BIDEN TO ANOTHER 💰**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=60aead8a0f&e=1050d051da)
---
| **The Oversight Committee has found a DIRECT PAYMENT to Joe Biden from his brother Jim Biden.**
_**After reviewing thousands of new bank records, here's what we found:**_

Joe Biden’s brother, James Biden, paid Joe Biden $200,000 under the guise of a “loan repayment” the **SAME DAY (!)** James Biden was wired a $200,000 loan from Americore Health LLC, a crumbling U.S. healthcare company.

James Biden promised Americore that with the power of his last name and political connections, he could help the company receive large investments from the Middle East.

I find it hard to believe that this is just a coincidence. Joe Biden has repeatedly lied to the American people about his involvement in his family's shady business dealings—don't let him lie his way out of this one too.

The swamp and mainstream media are trying to push this evidence under the rug. As one of the top GOP investigators, I will**NEVER** let that happen. The American people deserve the truth.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d2f4fcd712&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country
#

_Hey there. I know it’s the weekend, so I’ll be quick, but I wanted to share this message from Jacky Rosen in Nevada. CNN has ranked Nevada one of the likeliest Senate seats to flip in 2024, so I’m hoping for a lot of contributions today to show Jacky that we’ve got her back. Thanks -- Alex_
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.xBdjrJ&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=1&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
* * *

[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.xBdjrJ&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=2&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)
---
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service -- **because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today.**
**In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
**Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me 2 _points down_ in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you -- if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love -- will you chip in $5 or more today -- to split between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s -- to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.xBdjrJ&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=3&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Jacky Rosen and Alex Padilla:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2338?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.XPgVJU&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=22&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2339?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.SeFscb&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=23&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2332?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.7Rrzka&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=24&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2333?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.-NqGJ_&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=25&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2334?c0=ap-em-october23-rosen.wjDQz3&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=26&akid=1583%2E159979%2E5c1V5_)**
---
****

****
Thank you so much,
Jacky

name: Tim Scott
subject: I'm humbly asking for $1
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY TIM SCOTT VICTORY FUND
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsYyE5kisN

Although we've enjoyed strong support from many loyal supporters
around the country, I need more donors like YOU to confirm my
spot on the debate stage.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osYyE5kisN

Friend,

My team and I have been reviewing the updated requirements for
the third debate in Miami next month, and I need to be honest
with you.

Although we've enjoyed strong support from many loyal
supporters around the country, we're still short of the 70,000
donor threshold!

I'm humbly asking you to chip in $1 to help me appear in the
next Republican presidential debate!

PLEASE CHIP IN $1 NOW

My team tells me you're a reliable conservative supporter and a
true American patriot. I would be so thankful to have your
support as I fight to share my message and defeat Joe Biden.

My message is simple, but clear:

If you're able-bodied, you work.

If you take out a loan, you pay it back.

If you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

And if you're a man, you should play sports against men.

America needs more victors and fewer victims.

I know America is NOT a racist country. We're the land of
opportunity! Joe Biden and the radical Left are destroying our
country, but I will NEVER BACK DOWN in the fight to defend our
conservative values and restore faith in America.

PLEASE CHIP IN $1 NOW

I know I may not look like your typical Republican, but don't
be fooled. I grew up in tough circumstances. I know how to fight!
And I'm the most consistently conservative candidate in this
race!

I believe Republicans need an optimistic, conservative
messenger to speak plainly, tell the TRUTH, and grow a nationwide
movement in order to beat Joe Biden. My experiences, beliefs,
ideas, and message uniquely position me to be Joe Biden's
greatest nightmare!

Will you help me share my message on the Republican debate
stage? Just $1 can help guarantee a positive, optimistic voice on
a stage full of mudslingers and negativity.

PLEASE CHIP IN $1 NOW

Thank you,

Tim Scott

PS - Seriously, all it takes is a donation of $1. But if you
would like to go further, I deeply value your prayers and hope
you will forward this email to a few of your friends and family
members who may also agree with my message.

PAID FOR
BY TIM SCOTT VICTORY FUND

7620 Rivers Ave, Ste.
370 #312
North Charleston, SC
29406
