clean_body: Your support is critical to our early efforts taking place right now. | | | Peter, We hate to bother you on the weekend, but we wouldn't be reaching out again if this wasn't so important. Our October fundraising deadline is coming up in a few short days and we could really use your help to hit our goals this month. Your support is critical to our early efforts taking place right now. Each time you or someone else donates, you are helping us to scale up our organizing work in critical states so that we can make sure Joe and Kamala's message is reaching voters in every corner of the country. We hope you can see the impact your early support has on this campaign and why it’s crucial that we ask you to give for the first time to help reelect Joe and Kamala. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for being the driving force behind this movement -- together we can continue building on the progress we’ve made and work towards creating a future where everyone can thrive. \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I would love to earn your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)

Friends -
In just a few days, we’ll close the books on an October fundraising drive. It’s not an official FEC deadline, but we do have some very real goals to hit this month that are especially important now that we have a few Republican opponents in the race. Plus, with all the chaos that’s happening in Washington, this has been a rough month for fundraising.
The path to keeping our Senate majority depends on our race here in the notorious swing state of Michigan. It’s why keeping up with our (very real) internal fundraising goals is such a critical part of defending this seat.
The number one source of individual contributions to this campaign is from emails like this. I am very proud of that fact.
But today, I am asking YOU to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate.
**One of the potential Republican opponents in this race has raised $46,200 from the Betsy DeVos family – and we know that this is just the beginning of big donors trying to influence this race.** We are staying focused on sharing our positive, affirmative message with voters. But we need to stay on top of our internal fundraising efforts and ensure we have the resources to continue getting our message out to voters.
We have just over a year to reach as many voters as possible to keep Michigan blue, but it’s going to take all of us working together. That’s why I would love to earn your support today. [**Will you consider making your first online contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=2&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=21&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23.1KsVSv&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=22&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-oct23.bbeHIu&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=23&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-oct23.fqQJeL&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=24&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-oct23.oc0oAM&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=25&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct23.GGwPD1&refcode=em231028-1-15&t=26&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=754%2E135344%2ECeYo4q).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Fellow Conservative, I can’t thank you enough – I'm so grateful to have you standing behind me in our fight to Keep Texas Red next year and save our great nation from the Marxist left. We’ve been hitting our grassroots fundraising goals one after another in recent months. Now, we need to do it again as we close out October – we're quickly approaching the one-year countdown to Election Day 2024! **[Will you pitch in today to help us stay on track?](http://trk.tedcruz.-1Zcvs2XNjd9S6espHQ)**

[](http://trk.tedcruz.-nN3LBSWMGYSV-E4ug)

_Joe Biden, the Democrats in Congress, and the woke radicals that now infest the federal bureaucracy will DESTROY the America we know and love if we don’t defeat them at the ballot box and fight to defend our liberty and way of life!_ Here are a few different ways to help: _
_ 1\. **[Make a one-time donation](http://trk.tedcruz.-eMval000RQ) **
2\. **[Become a Cruz Monthly Benefactor](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
3\. **[Shop at our Team Cruz online store](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Thank you for any support you can send to help us reach our October end-of-month goal. For Liberty,

name: Team NPP
subject: Why judges matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
This interactive tool shows how judges can impact the issues that matter most to you.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72342818/435043306/-708856094?refcode=EM_C_231028interactive_N_TN_90DO_6_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYWQ0NzYxLTljNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ur7uq_dzbUkQ7RnGG-ZCJUY3VxUSYPgaQYfcnu70XlI=)
| Hi there,

In just 10 days, voters will head to the polls in Pennsylvania to vote for a State Supreme Court Justice, two new Superior Court judges, a new Commonwealth Court judge, and several local/municipal positions.

Our PA courts can and will issue rulings on some of the Commonwealth’s most fundamental issues, **_including our very freedom to vote_** – yet many people don’t know what’s at stake, and these elections tend to have low turnout.

As _Spotlight PA_ states, “Once on the court, **judges often stay there for decades** — interpreting state laws, striking them down completely, and determining guilt and punishments.”

To prove this point, this article includes an incredible interactive tool that shows how cases in front of these judges will impact Pennsylvania voters for years to come, from abortion rights to gun safety and education.

**We invite you[to take a moment](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72342819/435043307/90232615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYWQ0NzYxLTljNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ur7uq_dzbUkQ7RnGG-ZCJUY3VxUSYPgaQYfcnu70XlI=&emci=bfe16c40-3b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a0ad4761-9c75-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1522179) to look through the issues that matter most to you, and when you are done, [please consider making a $5 to help support our Get Out The Vote programs today →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72342820/435043308/-708856094?refcode=EM_C_231028interactive_N_TN_90DO_6_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYWQ0NzYxLTljNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ur7uq_dzbUkQ7RnGG-ZCJUY3VxUSYPgaQYfcnu70XlI=)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72342821/435043309/90232615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYWQ0NzYxLTljNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ur7uq_dzbUkQ7RnGG-ZCJUY3VxUSYPgaQYfcnu70XlI=&emci=bfe16c40-3b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a0ad4761-9c75-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1522179)**

clean_body: This interactive tool shows how judges can impact the issues that matter most to you. = | Hi there, In just 10 days, voters will head to the polls in Pennsylvania to vote for a State Supreme Court Justice, two new Superior Court judges, a new Commonwealth Court judge, and several local/municipal positions. Our PA courts can and will issue rulings on some of the Commonwealth’s most fundamental issues, including our very freedom to vote – yet many people don’t know what’s at stake, and these elections tend to have low turnout. As Spotlight PA states, “Once on the court, judges often stay there for decades — interpreting state laws, striking them down completely, and determining guilt and punishments.” To prove this point, this article includes an incredible interactive tool that shows how cases in front of these judges will impact Pennsylvania voters for years to come, from abortion rights to gun safety and education. We invite you to look through the issues that matter most to you, and when you are done, = = As you can see, this election will directly impact PA voters for years to come, including what happens in 2024. We only have 10 days left to turn out voters ahead of November 7, and we are depending on your support. Thank you, Team via New Pennsylvania Project | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. name: VoteVets
subject: Why chip in to VoteVets?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
2024 is going to be the fight of our lives, the most important election of our lives.
#
Derek,
The work VoteVets does right now will pay dividends in the long run. Every dollar we invest a year out from the 2024 elections is worth double next year.
That is why we are working so hard. We know that 2024 is going to be the fight of our lives, the most important election of our lives. It’s a flashpoint — either Trump and the MAGA GOP take back control and continue their assault on our democracy, or we defy the odds, hold the line, and continue the progress we’ve made over the last few years.
The stakes are high. It’s a lot of pressure. We’re certainly feeling it, and we’re sure you are, too. But we are not powerless — and you have a choice on how involved you can be. So:
If electing candidates who served in our Military or worked in National Security professions and will put our country and our priorities first sounds good, please:
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=1&akid=18243%2E3013755%2EwxH463)

VoteVets will spend millions of dollars in the leadup to the 2024 elections. We will support candidates up and down the ballot, from school board all the way up to President Biden. We will flip seats, and take back the House.
[**But we can’t do any of that without your support. So please, if you can, make your first donation of $5 to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=4&akid=18243%2E3013755%2EwxH463)

My new opponent has already made it clear he’s running a far-right campaign, and has zero intention of finding common ground with Democrats -- _or anyone who doesn’t agree with him._ **In his launch announcement, he came out swinging as anti-science and outspokenly pro-Trump. In fact, he’s already backed by MAGA-loving, Republican leaders in our state.** At a time when Congress has been brought to a standstill by extremists, the last thing we need is another MAGA hardliner. Our community deserves leadership that’s willing to work together to solve problems and deliver results.
Here’s the kicker: National Republicans have already promised to spend enormous sums boosting their preferred candidate and on attacks against me. We need to step up right now, and I’m confident that if we put in the early work, we will win. **[Help us reject the “chaos caucus” so we can get work done for the American people. Donate $5 to make clear to national Republicans that we stand together to represent _us_ , not the MAGA right.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2QbO3Owho7iHl7iVl5u4aNwZRJE3ONry2_JcjYuNXiSMWn9CFQ_5A8b51mi8dohzEVKi8ECSLB1DV0hsZdCRYYC5h-Cmr7zREvi13wC38vTME3cJaANDykLRCKD0aSgakd7Z5BH_6azP5Uxfc8wH9rX_yjuOCwINKBMCBBZetvElIOLCjRaJeFOV7m0OrR6Z2ekUziPzR5kh6mXmkaZBRQLgrt5tyVemeTnhQKfpP9-UU2JhPSZoaJfSzs7-bE3Bcyq8Sf7c8PJeGt3BWJdwLXmP03BKAGQQNC1UaBON93hGm_eIyZl8cxK4Rve8ncNaMjAAuOGI2jLPZmNlFjrMYm1cuRBrG9z0gUQsnNyBCsvsIfoOzZzu6eXul0Iv_EcWchld2BT05COIlzAmGsTd1IY/40t/dbuYxSOIRCSMEO-yqnJg9Q/h5/sv1lFRrT3HljZscBhW7kvXH2h9hAqeg-f26qUxQwQh4)**

clean_body: | | Peter, it's official: The national Republicans’ hand-picked candidate has officially launched their campaign to unseat me. | | My new opponent has already made it clear he’s running a far-right campaign, and has zero intention of finding common ground with Democrats -- or anyone who doesn’t agree with him. In his launch announcement, he came out swinging as anti-science and outspokenly pro-Trump. In fact, he’s already backed by MAGA-loving, Republican leaders in our state. At a time when Congress has been brought to a standstill by extremists, the last thing we need is another MAGA hardliner. Our community deserves leadership that’s willing to work together to solve problems and deliver results. Here’s the kicker: National Republicans have already promised to spend enormous sums boosting their preferred candidate and on attacks against me. We need to step up right now, and I’m confident that if we put in the early work, we will win. Thank you, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Katie Porter
subject: It’s no secret: lobbyists line up behind Mike Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32194%2E3422442%2E5G3i79)
Sometimes corruption is covert. **Other times, you get this: Lobbyists bragging to Politico about their plan to buy off our new Speaker.** All three of these were published in Politico this week.
1. “There are too many corporate PACs who are still sort of reluctant to” donate to members viewed as too close to former President Donald Trump, regardless of whether they voted to certify the election or not, one lobbyist said. Now, “I’m sure there are people all over D.C. who are looking around saying, ‘Wow, we need to revise the criteria that we’re using to give.’”
2. “Looking at his PAC and overall cash raised, I’d say he doesn’t have a huge network in DC,” “But obviously, that’s all about to change.”
3. Before the vote was final, one Republican on K Street said they were about to start calls to plan one of Johnson’s first fundraisers as speaker. “That reminds me, I need to get a date on the books,” the person said, noting the expectation of other firms to hold events for Johnson soon. The goal was to host it as early as next week, the person said. It would be the “easiest hundred grand,” said the lobbyist, a former House GOP leadership aide who said they were offering advice on staffing to Johnson’s office.

**[I don’t take a dime of federal lobbyist money. I’m the only candidate in this race who has made that commitment, and I’ll always stand up to this BS. Can you join our team today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231028-1?refcode=EMAM28_1_COR_20231028_V1_F&refcode2=32194_3422442_5G3i79&akid=32194%2E3422442%2E5G3i79)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231028-1?refcode=EMAM28_1_COR_20231028_V1_F&refcode2=32194_3422442_5G3i79&akid=32194%2E3422442%2E5G3i79)
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM28_1_COR_20231028_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32194_3422442_5G3i79&akid=32194%2E3422442%2E5G3i79)**

clean_body: Are you with me or not?! | = = Here's a little dose of reality, Peter: We're 10 days out from a make-or-break election in Mississippi. The polls are extremely close. Cook Political Report just swung this race towards our favor, but my friend Brandon Presley is already falling behind on his most critical public filing fundraising goal of the election. Brandon tells me he only has 24 hours left to hit his $130,000 online goal to keep his GOTV program in full force. And right now, it’s not lookin’ good. = There’s no sugarcoating it: If Brandon loses, Mississippi's in for four more years of corruption and backward leadership — plain and simple. Mississippi can do better. And that’s why we’ve got to pull Brandon Presley through this GOTV fundraising push and get him elected. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s get it done. James Carville | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Colin Allred has what it takes to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
People are taking notice of the strong Senate campaign my friend Colin Allred is running here in Texas.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231028split_ca?refcode=lpfe231028split_ca [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231028split_ca?refcode=lpfe231028split_ca]

Colin has what it takes to win. There’s growing momentum for his campaign—Colin outraised Ted Cruz in the second quarter of the year!—and polls show he’s running within single digits of Cruz. Not to mention the fact he’s done it before! In 2018, Colin and I made history by defeating long-time Republican incumbents and helping Democrats take back control of the House.
Colin can do this, but he needs our help. Will you split a contribution between his campaign and mine before our end-of-month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231028split_ca?refcode=lpfe231028split_ca]
Now more than ever, we’re reminded of the importance of electing responsible leaders. Colin is productive, effective, and focused on the issues Texans care about, like affordable health care and common-sense gun violence prevention.
Cruz, on the other hand, voted against certifying President Biden’s election in 2020, and a month ago, he voted to shut down the government—which would have hurt hundreds of thousands of Texans, including active-duty service members.
We need someone like Colin in our corner in the Senate. Please split a contribution between his campaign and mine before October 31. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231028split_ca?refcode=lpfe231028split_ca]
Together, we can do anything—including flip the Senate seat in Texas!

When Monica De La Cruz’s campaign sees their numbers dropping like this, all they have to do is reach out to one of the many super donors they have in their pockets. And like magic, their numbers are back up.
**That’s not who we are.**
We’re a people-powered, small-dollar, grassroots campaign that relies on working people like you.
**Your contribution is paramount because it’s not one super donor giving thousands of dollars — it’s thousands of families like you pitching in to make it happen.**
Peter, I absolutely believe that we can turn this ship around. But for me, believing alone isn’t enough.
**[We need action — we need your support. Please make a $10 contribution right now so we can meet our End of Month deadline.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_PAkwc5-DP6J2lppO85H_zHaftE9Gd5Sb-hlCXexT4_R_0hV-b9RL3YT3Y9Ui5MaYb737o5q6JECcSqovDdv-qUe_5QmNGVt8KdwUp7XAHuomJ-tP-A5uTOZs2gdXctDMK4XKSjAsuugA7EDdXZf1ZbS1yFCMbePFN3JetOzOfcpzx4jFmG-a51_jNsLvN-jz7GMqckI-Cnlycrwis63gpfWvY2rwYdgsayCKmAWZlfldHGQv38lvqVUK6Zr_6vR4_yJTyI1lueRsxvkASbAJeg/40t/5jl6pXi5R6-7oclXBQEmMQ/h8/S0hyUcWiOMsJ-3zuvfHFqDhdifkxORvBwn_7ZoG1aD4) **

clean_body: We can turn this ship around to meet our goal. | | | Peter — I have bad news. Really bad news. With only 3 days left until our End of Month deadline, we’re still not where we need to be. Just recently, I shared with you a screenshot of our ActBlue account explaining how our fundraising numbers have taken a major dip. And that dip still hasn’t changed. But as Michelle’s campaign manager, it’s my job to make sure we can overcome any obstacle that comes our way. So I spent this morning crunching the numbers, and here’s what I found: We have a shot. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | When Monica De La Cruz’s campaign sees their numbers dropping like this, all they have to do is reach out to one of the many super donors they have in their pockets. And like magic, their numbers are back up. That’s not who we are. We’re a people-powered, small-dollar, grassroots campaign that relies on working people like you. Your contribution is paramount because it’s not one super donor giving thousands of dollars — it’s thousands of families like you pitching in to make it happen. Peter, I absolutely believe that we can turn this ship around. But for me, believing alone isn’t enough. Talk to you soon, Kirby Chandler Campaign Manager | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

# Your help is needed to fight Washington Democrats!
My campaign has been making great progress and we are a position to win Fort Wayne for the Republicans for the first time in a generation. We know things must be getting close because the 16-year incumbent mayor Tom Henry has been raising money like it is going out of style. Yesterday, I learned **Tom Henry received $20,000 from Indiana's Democratic Congressional Victory Fund**!

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: As your speaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/742ATKIj3v6U680qhah1Cw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnH9kYP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9zcGVha2VyYmlvLXBhLXI_c2M9MjAyMzEwMjdfTUpPSE5TT05fRUVfUEFfU1BFQUtFUi1CSU9fUkVWX1JPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMDI4JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmV2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNwZWFrZXJiaW9XA3NwY0IKZTgOHz1linQpZFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Tina Smith
subject: It’s abundantly clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Next time you hear them claim they won’t support a nationwide abortion ban, call them on their B.S. |
#
Folks — If you have any doubts about the intentions of the GOP when it comes to abortion rights in this country, just take a look at the record of the guy who was just _unanimously_ voted as the new Speaker of the House by House Republicans:
* He celebrated the day _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, calling it an “extraordinary day.”
* He suggested doctors who perform abortions should be imprisoned and fined.
* He argued that women should be denied their reproductive rights to solve our nation’s fiscal problems by forcing them to bear more “able-bodied workers.”
* He is cosponsoring _multiple_ bills to ban abortions across the country.

**His record on abortion is extreme — and every last House Republican voted for him.** So next time you hear Republican elected officials say abortion rights should be decided in states, **call them on their B.S.** Next time you hear them claim they won’t support a nationwide abortion ban, **call them on their B.S.** **[And please, chip in to support my work to make sure voters know the truth about Congressional Republicans so we can _kick them out and defend reproductive freedoms._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346100/435055194/1669815119?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231028_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhmMjJmOC1hMTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xpaoo46Pgbai1H-DFdaH0NIJamm9qR0LV5a9-KidhPo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346102/435055198/1669815119?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231028_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjhmMjJmOC1hMTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xpaoo46Pgbai1H-DFdaH0NIJamm9qR0LV5a9-KidhPo=)

clean_body: Next time you hear them claim they won’t support a nationwide abortion ban, call them on their B.S. | Folks — If you have any doubts about the intentions of the GOP when it comes to abortion rights in this country, just take a look at the record of the guy who was just unanimously voted as the new Speaker of the House by House Republicans: He celebrated the day Roe v. Wade was overturned, calling it an “extraordinary day.” He suggested doctors who perform abortions should be imprisoned and fined. He argued that women should be denied their reproductive rights to solve our nation’s fiscal problems by forcing them to bear more “able-bodied workers.” He is cosponsoring multiple bills to ban abortions across the country. His record on abortion is extreme — and every last House Republican voted for him. So next time you hear Republican elected officials say abortion rights should be decided in states, call them on their B.S. Next time you hear them claim they won’t support a nationwide abortion ban, call them on their B.S. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for stepping up — I’m going to fight like hell to defend abortion rights. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=559e54e35f9a45a29acc820adbcf7637&_e=96ukhO-3COqLCZMzvZ9XdpyvL_BWhsImfZZOfIH5GI9aIMnwTDJrooRp38c9mIG3sQ8N-Hw1N3YF9kmDBOPWIwxWGesLAP0GxiMrzjSq-zSYAVohos5jvpe0DXcka0jLZivEcDhGSLvbd1aw8B21CisScLojUCgWMcXmoMGTwsrDlBK15MCgrk20dNJfsma6rybiLagnQy32UkDZY4N_R0AP3LYmcJe2cO9txcut3ZIPshAwb5DDDmqTuXSnaJGh2M0tquBOug81jedoL7PKhxGuUU9zThaVXAFibnMMP8lk45NinY7ODP5eiK0ESE_HaTib2Hv9UW7rrxvDGBaKexX8o1O1hTgEcawvdIZirOmEOIHKQ-f2FKYvRnlCjPMq)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=559e54e35f9a45a29acc820adbcf7637&_e=96ukhO-3COqLCZMzvZ9XdpyvL_BWhsImfZZOfIH5GI9aIMnwTDJrooRp38c9mIG3sQ8N-Hw1N3YF9kmDBOPWIwxWGesLAP0GxiMrzjSq-zSYAVohos5jvpe0DXcka0jLZivEcDhGSLvbd1aw8B21CisScLojUCgWMcXmoMGTwsrDlBK15MCgrk20dNJfsma6rybiLagnQy32UkDZY4N_R0AP3LYmcJe2cO9txcut3ZIrKzGKqpeh779mvA281dUz7Zbd6UAafGwmYzb61sKiHdlZM44Uk2iZ6Bx4o2LHctp8v1Xu1vPeyuidFy-lDLsYtf7XNu1cC1FIkuSdnNp84nMnbKpxBKrhNlXiLYIo_bQD5jUpbvW-pYlNiLvpQpBI) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=559e54e35f9a45a29acc820adbcf7637&_e=96ukhO-3COqLCZMzvZ9XdpyvL_BWhsImfZZOfIH5GI9aIMnwTDJrooRp38c9mIG3sQ8N-Hw1N3YF9kmDBOPWIwxWGesLAP0GxiMrzjSq-zSYAVohos5jvpe0DXcka0jLZivEcDhGSLvbd1aw8B21CisScLojUCgWMcXmoMGTwsrDlBK15MCgrk20dNJfsma6rybiLagnQy32UkDZY4N_R0AP3LYmcJe2cO9txcut3ZLqmLFwR18w0jWz0JBygPuBqReWVvvyffiR2yLxw7VHNol8XAf7ezCZHbln0kBP0CmDhPSvlmnSFVedoVBETa1SshRC4Xi4GOHdMp8SaohVzrKNkRNzfJJQYHo9waPMNLzQo67nte27_G7PiOTmA1dB)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=559e54e35f9a45a29acc820adbcf7637&_e=96ukhO-3COqLCZMzvZ9XdpyvL_BWhsImfZZOfIH5GI9aIMnwTDJrooRp38c9mIG3sQ8N-Hw1N3YF9kmDBOPWIwxWGesLAP0GxiMrzjSq-zSYAVohos5jvpe0DXcka0jLZivEcDhGSLvbd1aw8B21CisScLojUCgWMcXmoMGTwsrDlBK15MCgrk20dNJfsma6rybiLagnQy32UkDZY4N_R0AP3LYmcJe2cO9txcut3ZJp3YyDSJcmtyme4Q_5o6WBqqmkgO0xht_KXXDfbA6yOF6kejxu-iTdOy-Kes-kXKThFhAkGci8PnMj1Mva9_Ut52V6RXXubAvLOvl_ZwiYZI8NGceqvdFsYiCdTMyIg0nO-43Fbsr1qpZXZtgab4_5)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=559e54e35f9a45a29acc820adbcf7637&_e=96ukhO-3COqLCZMzvZ9XdpyvL_BWhsImfZZOfIH5GI9aIMnwTDJrooRp38c9mIG3sQ8N-Hw1N3YF9kmDBOPWIwxWGesLAP0GxiMrzjSq-zSYAVohos5jvpe0DXcka0jLZivEcDhGSLvbd1aw8B21CisScLojUCgWMcXmoMGTwsrDlBK15MCgrk20dNJfsma6rybiLagnQy32UkDZY4N_R0AP3LYmcJe2cO9txcut3ZLQAcCvTfjPoraTPizYJNhhRB4aA3z7W10vUR8B3tL2PVMZELK64Qa0j_81iaGWcEOdpCy3VBSte2F35Z_8Tm0cbx9Qb4tjaC_4YyCNl9ELtUoJfJV20ej35vw8FUpmPphCohFNXFuaYYML-pp75K_Q)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Hi there, Peter —

I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails this week, but we email you only because it’s important.

[_**We’re quickly nearing our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now, we are short of our monthly projections. Could you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Valerie Foushee now? Let me explain further:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346336/435056585/-317582022?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231028-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVlY2FhZC1hMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3RZnJLvIZe3bT51lFelSif0R5oRFIL2Co8AsiJrJG-c=)

What’s involved in a winning campaign? It starts with talking to as many voters as possible. There are also bills to pay – like our HQ office for staff and volunteers to work out of – and travel costs as I continue to hit the road and talk to voters and community leaders.

Some of our biggest expenses are in our voter communication and engagement budget. Next summer and fall, our campaign will make huge investments in TV and digital ads, direct mail pieces, and an aggressive ground campaign to get out the vote before the election. What we raise now plays a major role in determining how big our budget can be and how many voters we can reach.

**Early polling shows me in a dead heat with my extremist Republican opponent. This campaign will be won or lost by the smallest of margins. We really can’t afford to miss any of our internal budget goals because failing to hit our monthly projections translates into budget cuts on direct voter outreach.**

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346403/435056688/265476937?code=jtk1234-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVlY2FhZC1hMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkU_LU2NwRbyCIK5hd-gunbYIbOZFxJwCrbnvtM6yDU=)

**Peter, last November, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346404/435056689/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1234-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVlY2FhZC1hMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkU_LU2NwRbyCIK5hd-gunbYIbOZFxJwCrbnvtM6yDU=&emci=ba67edeb-9772-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3c5ecaad-a275-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346405/435056691/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1234-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVlY2FhZC1hMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkU_LU2NwRbyCIK5hd-gunbYIbOZFxJwCrbnvtM6yDU=&emci=ba67edeb-9772-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3c5ecaad-a275-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

With the GOP controlling the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down last summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72346406/435056693/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1234-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzVlY2FhZC1hMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkU_LU2NwRbyCIK5hd-gunbYIbOZFxJwCrbnvtM6yDU=&emci=ba67edeb-9772-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3c5ecaad-a275-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, last November, reproductive freedom was on the ballot. And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent. | | With the GOP controlling the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom. Let me be clear: I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down last summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made real progress. I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue. But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we all work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now. | | Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
I’m the Democrat running to finally defeat Ted Cruz.
And here’s why: Ted Cruz refuses to do the job.
❌ When Texans died and suffered in the middle of an unprecedented winter storm, he fled to Mexico for a luxury vacation.
❌ As mass shootings continue to plague our communities all across Texas and the United States, he refuses to support gun violence prevention measures.
❌ And while crises unfold all across the world, he won’t commit to confirming the Ambassador to Israel or breaking the GOP’s hold on military nominees.
Peter, Texans are fed up with Ted Cruz — and they’re ready for a candidate who can defeat him.
I’ll be that Senator, but I need your help.
So please, I’m asking you personally: Can you pitch in $25 or more to help me DEFEAT spineless Ted Cruz once and for all? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
I’m ready to send Ted Cruz into political retirement. Are you?
Thanks for your support,
Roland Gutierrez

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: When will enough be enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

After Sandy Hook we said never again.
After Las Vegas we said never again.
After Uvalde we said never again.
But on Wednesday night, a horrific mass shooting took place in Lewiston, Maine. Now, a community is reeling after 18 innocent people were senselessly killed, and dozens more were injured.
**When will enough be enough?**
While there is no single solution that can prevent every tragedy, our elected leaders can and must do more to solve our nation’s gun violence epidemic.
When all of us do our part, we send a strong message to our leaders, and to our gun lobby adversaries, that we aren’t backing down in our fight to end gun violence.
[**So please, will you consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work to save lives from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231028-1-30&t=1&akid=6798%2E3935704%2EwiOfna)

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: Today is National Immigrants Day!
body:
Immigrants are an undeniable force. | | | Peter — Today is **National Immigrants Day!** October 28 is a day that celebrates the achievements, resilience, and power of immigrants in the United States. Our country is at its best when we welcome immigrants and asylum seekers. The Statue of Liberty says on its base: **“Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free”.** We want our country to start living up to those values. Everyone deserves a safe place to call home, and our country has the power to give migrants and asylum seekers in dangerous situations a better life. **Immigrants are an undeniable force.** We are resilient amidst attacks on our character, our rights, and our freedom to move. Immigrants fight back against injustice, and most importantly — we show up and support each other, time and time again. It takes all of us to create the conditions to be able to not only survive but thrive. That’s why I’m so proud to be a part of this community. Immigrants are the leaders of the movement and the change makers who will propel our country forward — and the immigrant youth at UWDA are leading the charge. Today, on National Immigrants Day, we are counting on the generous support of grassroots donors like you to sustain our fights to abolish ICE, dismantle the deportation machine, and win permanent protections for ALL undocumented people. It’s going to take immigrants and allies alike to build the future we want to see. **Join us in our National Immigrants Day celebration by making a donation to keep up our work for immigrant justice in the weeks and months ahead.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP81y7pIAIwPiJutN4BKoxe0UGqcn4CCz5OFbOWhU4b73bgEoPesmpUYVF_rRw-VXjkm558PTykOAvzQ9K8uzdRDsAWa6TDkyG6VOGmjN0WPT26VJA6tAlpyaO5KhmNuOEqnKjV-P2DAShzM__HGHuHoL7z9h2TCewn5GEnVUkwv3u3M6cGH573XUvn4qHhvhS4yOHSpBpMfZrOMlRb9OHGmPlVqKp7_F2oCKGeDS16UrmWwuVdMnF_8EaEDdQp4QeY1ov9QSBki3DdgulpwgXGYEvgpwlVleotgHiVDOPWMhI5M3xZtt-6-BSnsSuabkTfEkpAa88ONetHiG2d3wZ3zR3nkg7IDhI7TD77HD31-h-7gwTONmrhehEuqeSHHstCdb9dfDqK-FOEWbcqT_X-pjh_MwB6MU9WyTUtE1OiwethUKqIxosARDx4_TW8_fkHVwNWss5aP-cMiPr6dZ2ImPH2Y2SSv57dMgC5CTk1oE0/40t/1i5_x0i3Sgm8d3yGak8nYA/h0/59BsAJQoWt2aRQHh1HewKASSsUa1exTMP-8brL5y4cM)

body:
Meet the new Speaker of the House... |
#
---
Friend, After weeks of legislative gridlock, the House of Representatives has officially been handed over to MAGA extremists. **[But before we introduce you to the new Speaker, chip in today before next week’s October fundraising deadline to help Democrats fight like hell against MAGA extremists.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72347945/435061667/1443130511?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU3NjRkYjgtYTQ3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oTYWkx22rwB8MKbltH92XNH3qb6xb2J725A7Jw1UZnw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72347946/435061668/1443130511?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU3NjRkYjgtYTQ3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oTYWkx22rwB8MKbltH92XNH3qb6xb2J725A7Jw1UZnw=)
---
The new Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, is a dangerous MAGA extremist who's a threat to our freedoms and democracy. In his short time in Congress, Johnson has:
* Tried to **overturn** the 2020 election
* Cosponsored a **near-total abortion ban**
* Argued in favor of **gutting** Social Security and Medicare
* Voted **against** protections for same-sex and interracial marriage

Gretchen Whitmer started Fight Like Hell PAC to help support Democrats who would put their heads down and go to work to defeat MAGA extremists like Johnson.
**But it won’t be easy.** MAGA extremists are busy raising millions of dollars to spread lies and try to hide their records. We need to outraise and out organize them at every turn, but that takes resources.
The good news is that we’ve got momentum, and it does not take much to make an impact. Because we’re grassroots funded, every contribution helps Gretchen and other Democrats educate and mobilize voters. In his short time in Congress, Johnson has: Tried to overturn the 2020 election Cosponsored a near-total abortion ban Argued in favor of gutting Social Security and Medicare Voted against protections for same-sex and interracial marriage Gretchen Whitmer started Fight Like Hell PAC to help support Democrats who would put their heads down and go to work to defeat MAGA extremists like Johnson. But it won’t be easy. MAGA extremists are busy raising millions of dollars to spread lies and try to hide their records. We need to outraise and out organize them at every turn, but that takes resources. The good news is that we’ve got momentum, and it does not take much to make an impact. Because we’re grassroots funded, every contribution helps Gretchen and other Democrats educate and mobilize voters. It all helps us respond to MAGA extremists, defend candidates’ records, and support their work to deliver for Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight. name: Team Pramila
subject: An update on our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Small dollar donations from dedicated supporters like you is what keeps our fire alive.
#
Peter, we know it’s the weekend, so we’ll keep this brief:
Right now, we’re just 3 days away from reaching our end of the month fundraising goal before midnight on Tuesday. **Here’s our progress so far:**
**[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46750?refcode=em20231028-3094&t=1&akid=3094%2E420207%2EHcypLZ)**
Together, we’ve been able to raise over $10,000 towards our October goal, but we need all hands on deck to ensure we can close the gap and keep our campaign on track.
This is a grassroots-funded movement, we don’t rely on corporate PACs or mega-donors to bankroll our campaign. **Small dollar donations from dedicated supporters like you is what keeps our fire alive.**
[**We did the math, and if just 4 people who open this email who live in 18326 can chip in $3, we’ll be able to reach our goal well before our deadline. Can we count on you?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46750?refcode=em20231028-3094&t=2&akid=3094%2E420207%2EHcypLZ)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46750?refcode=em20231028-3094&t=21&akid=3094%2E420207%2EHcypLZ)**
Let’s do this,
Team Pramila

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Why I ran for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Washington needs advocates for lower prescription drug costs, abortion access, equal rights, and an economy that works for everyone - not just the wealthy donors and corporations.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72348261/435062909/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.28_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlMGY3OS1hNTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5qBoCz73W-8GWVoaXhrtS_43V7ZMxwzNToQjZ7WprEc=)
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo.

As we get closer to 2024, I want to take a minute to explain to you why I ran for Congress last year - and why I’m running for reelection.

I grew up in Adams County, watching my hard-working parents give back to the community. Their example inspired me to go to college, give back, and enter the medical field as a pediatrician. There, I quickly realized that truly helping families and communities would take more than what I was able to do as a doctor.

**I’m running because of you, Peter.** Too many working families nationwide are struggling with higher costs of living and lower pay. Washington needs advocates for lower prescription drug costs, abortion access, equal rights, and an economy that works for everyone - _not just the wealthy donors and corporations._

I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, because I want to keep your interests at heart. That means in times like this - _as my next fundraising deadline at the end of the month approaches_ \- I count on this grassroots movement to help me win reelection and continue advocating for progress in Congress.

**[That’s why I’m humbly reaching out for your support. Can you pitch in $25 or any amount to my campaign before my end of month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72348262/435062910/537837852?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.28_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODNlMGY3OS1hNTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5qBoCz73W-8GWVoaXhrtS_43V7ZMxwzNToQjZ7WprEc=)**

clean_body: Washington needs advocates for lower prescription drug costs, abortion access, equal rights, and an economy that works for everyone - not just the wealthy donors and corporations. | = Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo. As we get closer to 2024, I want to take a minute to explain to you why I ran for Congress last year - and why I’m running for reelection. I grew up in Adams County, watching my hard-working parents give back to the community. Their example inspired me to go to college, give back, and enter the medical field as a pediatrician. There, I quickly realized that truly helping families and communities would take more than what I was able to do as a doctor. I’m running because of you, Peter. Too many working families nationwide are struggling with higher costs of living and lower pay. Washington needs advocates for lower prescription drug costs, abortion access, equal rights, and an economy that works for everyone - not just the wealthy donors and corporations. I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, because I want to keep your interests at heart. That means in times like this - as my next fundraising deadline at the end of the month approaches \- I count on this grassroots movement to help me win reelection and continue advocating for progress in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** My team is hoping to see another $5,000 come in the door online by the end of the month, and I have unwavering faith we can do it if this team steps up. =** Thank you, Yadira Caraveo | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: this is my American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
As an immigrant to America, I know firsthand how difficult it can be for working families to get by.
But I've also seen the incredible opportunities that are only possible in America — and now, I'm running for Senate to safeguard those opportunities that self-serving politicians like my opponent, Rick Scott, want to destroy
If you're ready to pitch in and help this team reach our critical $150,000 end-of-October goal, you can click here to split a gift between my campaign and Serve America — but first, I hope you'll let me explain why I'm fighting to keep the American Dream alive. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
My American Dream came true because my mother left our home in Ecuador and bravely brought my sisters and me to this country to give us a chance to build the future she dreamed of.
My American Dream came true because my mother worked day and night to afford rent in our one room apartment and provide us with a better education, a better home, and a better future.
My American Dream came true because I was able to go from working a minimum wage job to help my mom make ends meet to serving in Congress.
My American Dream came true because I had a strong community to lean on, opportunities to grow, and the right to live my life as I wanted.
I'm fighting to protect those same opportunities, which are now out of reach for far too many working families.
See, my opponent has made a career — and nearly a quarter-billion dollars — off trampling vital programs, dividing communities, and threatening the opportunities upon which American Dreams like mine were built.
With a massive fortune built through in-roads with corporate special interests, he's not beholden to hard working Americans.
And that's why I'm running for Senate — because Florida deserves better.
I'm running so that everyone is equipped with the support they need to achieve their dreams. And unlike my opponent, I'm relying on the help of this grassroots community to win in Florida and keep the American Dream alive.
But the only way I can do that is by hitting critical fundraising deadlines like the one coming up in less than 48 hours — so if you're with me in the fight to make the American Dream come true for all of us, will you please rush $15 — split between my team and Serve America — before 11:59 p.m. tomorrow night to help me flip Florida's Senate seat blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
With love and gratitude,
Debbie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]

clean_body: In less than 72 hours, we’ll close the books on a critical October fundraising drive. It's critical because MAGA Republicans are running ads against us, and we're spending big to fight back. | | | As Team Biden-Harris’s campaign manager, I have access to all kinds of information. Here's one for you: A small percentage of Joe Biden supporters have already made an online contribution to our campaign. Now, if everyone reading this email decided to contribute today, we'd CRUSH every fundraising objective we have for the race and never have to ask again. But the truth is, not everyone gives. That's why the president is counting on those who know just how important this race is -- and just how important reaching our early fundraising goals are. In about 72 hours, we’ll close the books on a critical October fundraising deadline. It's critical because MAGA Republicans are running ads against us, and we're spending big to fight back. We have to reach our goals to keep it up. | Biden for President Supporter Record: Name: Peter Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Reelection Donor: Not yet! ❌ Fact: A small amount of President Biden’s supporters have made their first donation to our campaign. We really need to grow that number before this deadline. ❗️ | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | If you make your first online donation today, we can add your name to the list of amazing grassroots supporters who have stepped up to help reelect the president. Thank you, Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024 | |

name: Lisa
subject: Here's why these emails matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

It’s Lisa, Finance Director for Rick Scott.

I wanted to take a moment and explain why our emails ahead of our end of month deadline are so important.

**Senator Scott is gearing up for one of our final pushes before the end of the year. Once we get through this quarter, we’ll _OFFICIALLY_ be in an election year - and then it’s GAME ON. **

We need to make sure that Florida voters know what’s on the line in this election. That means funding advertising and voter contact across the state - and we can’t do that without you.

I know it can be a big ask to contribute in Joe Biden’s economy, but we’ll never get America back on track if we don’t take back the Senate. This is an investment worth making.

**[With our end of month deadline approaching in just three days, can you pitch in now? We can’t win this race and take back the Senate without you.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e7a7cc58e23442c69bef2a87b91e0197&_e=UAFu2zb9bbwENrIxw0iYKFu5apJu2MegYvYd6HrLRKgl6xMVwLamWtMc-TiPOFaL3SxZ-yuiZkfgC3Rod3Q-drvxDXdZDzf8aaynZ95SZxYgImfJan4x57K8s6Ua5ObzQgQ_8AIXICNZZ4cFY514mdAa5TXakBiXMExdXK1KhljxzWo9t2N9u61qwcjOAKdsNuyrOsuyZKp0n4ai7-saaGcNcdPXkvM6HBMz62LocgWNkFjf3KMWUPM915UodEVfJSk-MEfYi96SSuQUcC7A3pJI1WFhgDTS1SWMYQo2bKvmuEsa-L2IznHsJRMT2AfGlEwVdvHr6w0VdNNz7vlRw3FX2SPFbtOR5MMPjTnSbKQ%3D)**

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: The Constitution – use it or lose it!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here’s the latest shocker: There are 20,822 border wall panels currently sitting in storage.
That’s no exaggeration.
On Biden's first day in office, his administration suspended wall construction at the southern border. The government suddenly abandoned everything, including contractors AND materials that the previous administration had organized.
Instead of assembling millions of dollars of supplies along the border, the **Department of Defense is paying a whopping $160,000 per month** to store over 20,000 panels, fiber optic cables, and lighting.
This waste must be _stopped_. Our border must be _secured_. American taxpayers must be _represented._
**[Friend, I’m asking you to please, right this second, simply sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America.](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckT-PnDAQxT-N6UBmDAYKiiSENLkrrkhKa7AN65X_IGyOcJ8-YrWJojQunp_ezPsNutWa-exJ85kA3IyKBICwTwRg-fF-39_g4yXl_nzt8q93951ev_CFAKRz1X-tz5RCOzT2UpshU30ldVvxKdN9ybu2pg2nPLv1E2oouVQc5VTWfGbtXLcNMl5D1_JKZqYHCqyk0JY162payIZ2swbWTAiK0ZlU9BpUBK_R6c1I9LPFpZDBZba_pbTGx14jgVGGWPhdWr3HFRcdLxOB0aJXxi8ExilsSm_5gdbmB8akcyBs3JMTTiuzO8KGZy1-iTHsm9SEDf_ikVY8ETxdEt2KZvGEDVeTssuvR8gQhTUxiU37hFZMG3olvD6EDOspps2g9yjiPt21TIKJgPOfxOCT9omwwUubf5Pv1fLywX9FAlx4axRhw3_i45hsON_YIe-vw89s69V6GGtN5A2p6PJgKIP7HQAA__9io6fy)**

| | MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars have been wasted on nonfunctioning supplies, and we can expect this ridiculousness to continue as political control swings back and forth.
If you’re tired of watching your money go to failed government projects, you can find hope in Convention of States. Article V of the Constitution was written for times like this. Our state legislatures give us the means to correct the federal government and Article V gives us the power.
Our current path is unsustainable, and action is critical NOW. Liberty-minded endorsers like Ben Carson, Rand Paul, Charlie Kirk, and Mark Levin are vocal supporters of COS, and you can be too.
Time is running out, and you have the ability to say you’re in this fight, not just standing by silently.

American taxpayers must be represented. | | | | | MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars have been wasted on nonfunctioning supplies, and we can expect this ridiculousness to continue as political control swings back and forth. If you’re tired of watching your money go to failed government projects, you can find hope in Convention of States. Article V of the Constitution was written for times like this. Our state legislatures give us the means to correct the federal government and Article V gives us the power. Our current path is unsustainable, and action is critical NOW. Liberty-minded endorsers like Ben Carson, Rand Paul, Charlie Kirk, and Mark Levin are vocal supporters of COS, and you can be too. Time is running out, and you have the ability to say you’re in this fight, not just standing by silently. | | | | | For America’s future, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action | |

We've done the math, and we know what it'll take to close the gap on reaching our fundraising goal by the end of the month. We need 528 donors to donate just $64 or more by 11:59 PM ET on October 31st to hit our next $250,000 goal.

We wouldn't ask for your support if we didn't need it to keep up with the pace of this intensifying race. We know we can't afford to take our foot off the gas, but we need your help to keep it up. Winning this race, stopping Washington from prioritizing elitist swamp creatures over YOUR needs, and saving our country from radical Leftist control will require giving everything we've got. If you're willing to help us, we want you to have a special piece of merchandise to show that you're willing to fight today for a better tomorrow.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis 🐊

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d797aea5dd035224ae7b699549086fb6612857353f45b4a1557c9d43a0b056953d17d0b461a22fa92f4594b3e4e9163086fce2ffe42dd633c38f52559dbcb981
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d797aea5dd035224a27f531e349eb0f6a04e225184abcf67515821107e0e23a063898342e5f1fee0a544503dfd609f466b3e612b25112c8349097e5a710526d6

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d797aea5dd0352242e5a66a4b3e4071ead19d7c5d5ed7152ce0182a432d44f1fcc3d1c682f22bdbdea46f70a558390f41007b3a3aad4bcff2e532b24afc94ef5

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
| We can’t let history repeat itself this cycle.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1419%2E35263%2EBHPlXV)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1419%2E35263%2EBHPlXV) You NEED to see this, Peter: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1419%2E35263%2EBHPlXV)— _NBC News_ Wisconsin’s Senate race looks quiet on the surface — _but that’s exactly what the GOP wants you to think._ In reality, **TWO megamillionaires** are making the rounds meeting with Senate Republicans’ campaign arm, hiring top GOP strategists, and pledging to spend up to $20 million of their own personal wealth to defeat Tammy. I like to call this the “Ron Johnson playbook,” announcing late in the cycle to put off personal financial disclosure for as long as possible — all while being propelled by a personal fortune. All of this was part of Republican Ron Johnson’s winning strategy when he challenged Democratic incumbent Russ Feingold in 2010. And we all know how that ended... **We can’t let history repeat itself this cycle, Peter, which is why I’m asking you to get involved NOW by supporting Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign.** **[Will you chip in a few bucks or whatever you can afford to defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat? name: Ohio Dems
subject: We need 5 more donors from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
to help us reach our end-of-month goal
|
Team, People from every corner of Ohio have joined Team Ohio Dems over the past year to help fight for our reproductive rights. 88 counties in Ohio and we have dedicated supporters in _every single one_. It’s what makes this a truly grassroots movement. Unlike Republicans in the Buckeye state, we don’t want special interests to make our decisions for us. We believe Ohioans should be in charge. body:
|
