Peter,

When I first announced I would be running for the Senate, I pledged that we would build a grassroots movement that wouldn’t leave anyone behind.

For the past nine months, that’s exactly what we’ve been doing.

My team and I are leaving no stone unturned to reach voters in every corner of California. With tens of millions of voters across the state and more than 1⁄3 of voters undecided in the latest poll, we have a lot of ground to cover to reach every single person.

**[Will you pitch in $5.80 to help George Whitesides and my campaign reach voters in all of California’s 58 counties? I’m working to build the largest grassroots movement this state has ever seen, and I’ll need your help to do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72350328/435070490/-845506036?refcode=em-10.28.23-all&amount=5.8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI2MGUwZi1hYjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJHvvDu9NpKkjnzHGrcf8uVPkLmBe6N72baGNy-sjFc=)**

Because it’s critical we share our message to voters in Siskiyou.

And win tough districts in the Central Valley.

And boost Democratic turnout in Bakersfield.

And stand up to the GOP’s attacks wherever they come — from San Diego to Santa Rosa.

clean_body: | = Peter, When I first announced I would be running for the Senate, I pledged that we would build a grassroots movement that wouldn’t leave anyone behind. For the past nine months, that’s exactly what we’ve been doing. My team and I are leaving no stone unturned to reach voters in every corner of California. With tens of millions of voters across the state and more than 1⁄3 of voters undecided in the latest poll, we have a lot of ground to cover to reach every single person. = | **= I won’t beat around the bush, Peter: Reaching voters across California’s 58 counties will take a lot of resources. But I’m up for the challenge. Because it’s critical we share our message to voters in Siskiyou. And win tough districts in the Central Valley. And boost Democratic turnout in Bakersfield. And stand up to the GOP’s attacks wherever they come — from San Diego to Santa Rosa. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, — Adam Schiff | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: Chrissy
subject: Your October Newsletter
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY

On Wednesday, after 21 days at a standstill, the House finally elected a Speaker and we are back to work. Although Mike Johnson is not the Speaker I wanted - he’s an election denier and supports a national abortion ban - I am hopeful that we can find enough common ground to fund critical government programs, support our allies, and generally do the hard work for our communities that we were elected to do. I have hope. Here’s what else we’ve been focused on:

https://chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com

Southeast PA Slated for TWO Federal Hubs
In a huge win, Philadelphia was selected by the Biden Administration as one of seven regional hubs for the creation of a national network to accelerate the development and commercialization of low-cost, clean hydrogen. Created by the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, this hub will help our country meet our climate goals and produce new, good paying jobs and greater investment in our region. One week later, we learned that our region was also being selected as one of five biotechnology Tech Hubs in the country for the development of Precision Medicine. Created by the CHIPS and Science Act, this hub will bring more investment and good paying jobs to the region while cementing the region’s reputation as a home for cutting-edge healthcare advances.

Leading the Charge for Service Member Reproductive Care

In recognition of my leadership on issues of importance to men and women serving in the military, I was recently named to the team negotiating the annual defense bill (aka National Defense Authorization Act or NDAA). Every year, after this bill passes the House and the Senate, House negotiators meet with Senate negotiators to work out the differences between the House and Senate versions of the bill. In the same way that I have been fighting in committee and on the House floor for the rights of servicewomen to receive reproductive care, I will do so here. No woman – especially those who give so much to serve our country – should be denied the ability to make important choices about their own reproductive health.

Medicare Open Enrollment Town Hall
It’s that time of year! Not just Halloween and all things pumpkin spice, but Medicare Open Enrollment. I’ve been a staunch supporter of this incredibly vital government program that thousands of our neighbors depend on. That’s why next week, on Oct. 31, I’ll be hosting a Medicare Telephone Town Hall at 10 a.m. to answer all of your questions about the current open enrollment period. If you’re interested in enrolling in Medicare, I hope you’ll join us in conversation!

Through months good and bad, I’m so lucky to have you on my team. Thank you for supporting my fight for a better future for all Pennsylvanians, and I’ll be in touch again soon.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4jeffries?amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk893-ot-text

There’s work to be done.

– Chrissy

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=y2d51ZMCDxTGkAuQJSsXyrLRqZhZU3zLvy15tDJm2CVawBOn8J%2F4IipbuEQCr83wAR4v2WMAyjKnEHKiNgIQbj6AbLK4AXs%2Ftleeo%2BbwHzDkkBzL9jXGqy0Os09DmLJgw%2Fyt4VdkcSnA6icm1vJj%2FV3eEb%2Boe5f9Tg7ilj%2FPrpckh%2Bdf4wsMKGklyvDXiO2Pdsuw4Fhf3VzaNgYlRL40yRoAvdCD2wLp%2Ba2tfvaBXL45uzXCDWO4S12S71ZXGlFtJCrYlDyqb2xQHt4ehmB0qGrmJpGtZRuoINYTIgHqhCtoMO8Ndl0dG5b8gUUkaCIJJIfDyoODEeHrWaaFaB%2Fd5iZS%2Forkn4SadsjNS4fR74fGBUKRbbn6hrJj4eBiz0xXDyrj6l48itOEMTjY3eKiYVZGIxuJ4OP5IGTtKpiFTBeYK9kLGio1TcafkJfO%2FZKz

Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States

Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/umOwNNYDOkWBBmk0KPHJaw2

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

clean_body: | | | = I’ve spent a lot of time on the water over the years, so I hope you don’t mind if I throw in a few nautical puns to help me get my message across. This year, Defend Democracy PAC has been on a mission to stem the tide of MAGA extremism in the Commonwealth of Virginia. But it hasn’t exactly been smooth sailing. In fact, this has been one of the most expensive – and most consequential – elections in state history. Republicans have flooded Virginia’s most competitive districts with a tsunami of cash in a bid to control the General Assembly. In September, Gov. Youngkin’s PAC shattered fundraising records by raking in $4 million in 48 hours. But with you on board, we’ve made some financial waves of our own. So far, we’ve disbursed $315,000 to Democrats in Virginia’s most competitive races. However, we just learned that Youngkin is pouring $1.4 million into a last-minute attack ad blitz, and we need a boatload of resources to keep VA Democrats afloat. I’m calling for a groundswell of grassroots support to boost Democratic candidates at every level of government, from School Board to State Senate. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Stay the course, Elaine | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Defend Democracy PAC Defend Democracy PAC PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72351204/435073108/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk266-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI1MTA0YmUtYWI3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=musJd4Nu4TWM286wW1TmyMDPl1_CbeOnEV8awRC6Puo=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72351207/435073109/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk266-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI1MTA0YmUtYWI3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=musJd4Nu4TWM286wW1TmyMDPl1_CbeOnEV8awRC6Puo=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72351209/435073110/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk266-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI1MTA0YmUtYWI3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=musJd4Nu4TWM286wW1TmyMDPl1_CbeOnEV8awRC6Puo=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72351210/435073111/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk266-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI1MTA0YmUtYWI3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=musJd4Nu4TWM286wW1TmyMDPl1_CbeOnEV8awRC6Puo=)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| Peter, We are just days away from Virginia’s General Assembly elections. National Republicans view this upcoming Virginia election as an opportunity to turn this purple state red — meaning this election will be a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2024. We can’t afford to let National Republican groups gain momentum in November. We have to show the strength of our movement and demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress. We are a Commonwealth filled with individuals who deserve public servants who will never sell them out and care as much for their neighbors as they do themselves. That’s why my team must meet our goal this month. We must have the resources to continue our fierce campaign against extremism and National Republican groups in Virginia. clean_body: We have to show the strength of our movement and demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress. | = | Peter, We are just days away from Virginia’s General Assembly elections. National Republicans view this upcoming Virginia election as an opportunity to turn this purple state red — meaning this election will be a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2024. We can’t afford to let National Republican groups gain momentum in November. We have to show the strength of our movement and demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress. We are a Commonwealth filled with individuals who deserve public servants who will never sell them out and care as much for their neighbors as they do themselves. That’s why my team must meet our goal this month. We must have the resources to continue our fierce campaign against extremism and National Republican groups in Virginia. = | = | = Thank you for standing with Virginians everywhere, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. **Help us reach our $13,000 goal by the end of October with a donation of $20:**

**_[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/october-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72352490/435076809/-1326395607?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20231028_FR_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTY5MWYyMi1hZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfAu_iBR6Te1DdtyAdSXuIt-GxqMmy7zvez1FcsD7Cs=)_**

— Team Sharice
* * *
**_Sharice’s email from yesterday→_**

Here are three things to know before October ends:
* One of my opponents attended a Kansans for Life Political Action Committee event
* Another would not answer if she supported a national abortion ban if elected to Congress
* Our NRCC backed opponent told the KC Star that he didn’t even bother to vote on the anti-abortion ballot measure last year

Our opponents are out-of-step with the people of KS-03, where over 70% of voters voted to keep our reproductive rights. Now, as we approach one year out from Election Day, we need to make sure we defeat these opponents too. My team and I have a $13,000 goal to reach by the end of the month, and I believe we can do it. **_[Will you make a donation of $20 to help us hit our one year to Election Day goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72352491/435076810/-1326395607?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20231028_FR_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTY5MWYyMi1hZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfAu_iBR6Te1DdtyAdSXuIt-GxqMmy7zvez1FcsD7Cs=)_** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

While all that is going on in KS-03, we’re seeing the effects of House GOP leadership in Congress: After weeks of infighting, my House GOP colleagues elected a new Speaker who has never held a leadership position in Congress before and is best known for his support of the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen, despite the total lack of evidence.

**As Speaker, he’s expected to push for a total abortion ban to pass in the House, as well as cuts to Medicare and Social Security.**

I ran for Congress because I am dedicated to showing up for you and will continue advocating for Kansans like you. I'm not in Congress for self-serving interests or to make the biggest news headline. Unlike many of the House’s GOP members, I'm not playing around.

I'm fighting for your freedoms and to make life better for the Third District. And this is what I'm here to do every single day.

With the election happening in almost exactly a year, it's really time for us to gear up and be ready for any attacks or obstacles that are going to come our way up through Election Day. Grassroots supporters like you are the reason I've been able to get this far, and I believe you can help us keep pushing through.

Help us reach our $13,000 goal by making a $20 donation today.

Thank you,

Sharice

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: here's what you need to know about my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72352503/435076851/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231028_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZjZWU0NDAtYWU3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E-1KtPyE4qq0zQ9qm6cWVIvtRiJk3ODnVDJeDLvLcNA=)
---
Peter, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race: **_First,_** election analysts from _CNN, FiveThirtyEight, and Roll Call_ ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024. **_Then,_** a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! name: TonyEvers.com
subject: Tony’s note about our next deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
Tony’s note? Republicans in Wisconsin and across the country are unfit and
unwilling to do their jobs and are too focused on scoring political
points.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1001&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]We have a $41,793 budget gap to close before the end of the month. Can
you chip in today to stand with Tony?

— Begin Forwarded Message —

Derek,

We’re coming up on a major deadline next week.

It’s our last monthly deadline before we’re officially one year out from
the 2024 election. It’s thanks to you that we’ve been able to lay the
groundwork to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and keep Wisconsin
blue next year.

Just look at what Republicans have been focused on nationwide and right
here in Wisconsin:

* The GOP presidential candidates are racing to see who can be the most
extreme while they avoid attacking frontrunner Donald Trump.
* House Republicans kept Congress paralyzed for over three weeks as they
fought over who should be the next Speaker.
* Republicans in our state legislature have advanced bills that attack
vulnerable communities in Wisconsin to score political points.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1002&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Enough is enough. We need to raise another $45,826 before the end of
the month to stay on track with our early organizing across Wisconsin.
With Election Day just over a year away, we can’t fall short of this goal.
Please chip in what you can to stand with Wisconsin Democrats.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2167?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1003&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2167?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1004&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2167?amount=50&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1005&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Donate $50 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2167?amount=100&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1006&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2167?amount=500&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1007&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Donate $500 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_eom.1.3&t=1008&akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh ]Another Amount

Onward,

Tony

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6457%2E1827488%2EP1Eknh

Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | | Peter, It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor. Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win. You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts. Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate. If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser. After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Peter,
Our October end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in about 72 hours, and as of right now, we still need to raise $13,409 by 11:59 pm on Tuesday to reach our budget target.
Getting back on track and reaching this goal isn’t just a formality. Your support fuels Keith’s work as he fights for us as the People’s Lawyer and is our only line of defense when special interests go on the attack against us.
We have a long way to go, but here’s the good news: This grassroots team is tens of thousands of people strong. We can make up the difference in no time if everyone pitches in what they can today.
Whether it’s holding opioid manufacturers accountable or taking on Amazon or defending reproductive freedom, Keith always has our back no matter what. Now, it’s time to step up and show him that we have his.
Looking at our records, you’re still eligible to use Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. You can make a donation of up to $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State.
[**Peter, only your support ensures we can have Keith’s back every day as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. body:
Vote about it.

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72355266/435087060/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE4ZWZmNS1iNDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7blfQ5_WtUZxI8XyX7LrhbL9BPn-fbSf6uPwa43-rA=&emci=087a4435-d871-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dea8eff5-b475-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72355268/435087061/245229599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE4ZWZmNS1iNDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7blfQ5_WtUZxI8XyX7LrhbL9BPn-fbSf6uPwa43-rA=&emci=087a4435-d871-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dea8eff5-b475-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72355269/435087063/245229599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE4ZWZmNS1iNDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7blfQ5_WtUZxI8XyX7LrhbL9BPn-fbSf6uPwa43-rA=&emci=087a4435-d871-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=dea8eff5-b475-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) This is one of our favorite quotes, team. It’s a reminder to all of us that, as much as we want to raise awareness on the issues that matter, those issues don’t get solved by just talking about them. If we want to solve problems, we have to vote. If we want to make a difference, we have to vote. If we want a more representative democracy, _we have to vote_. **Friend , I started my first small business with a pickup truck and a shovel more than 35 years ago. ** Hard work made the difference for me and my family, just as it has for so many others across the entire country. **As Governor of Georgia, my mission from day one has been to put hardworking Americans and their families FIRST. **

**We were the first state to reopen during COVID.** We didn’t listen to the politicians _(from either party)_ and bureaucrats who wanted schools closed and our economy locked down. We’ve cut through red tape, slashed spending, and issued historic tax rebates to working families. We’ve suspended the gas tax to help families fight inflation. We’ve cracked down on gangs and given law enforcement a pay raise. And we stood down the cancel culture to secure our elections and make Georgia the #1 state in the country for election integrity. **[My mission was to put hardworking Americans first, and that’s what I’ve done.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=69932378918c451cbb1589811ed3fb9c&_e=lozwM7V-RQL_GLEZbnFNWIQfGIu5vaVV0oF08zph1yZW8m-5gXRwG7QkVOm93nLK1mrxn7ibojxxYfR-nas4Je03ogFO-mYV5XRhtys9wTUAHuNvCi7nXtwpl2lRWOdf4cqM_rMUg1WLWoNZOuOaVeLk4gqhQiNIwl6FxsNHU8cwPpaZMKVQbNCgc_uzXHKHLIOcd2t9IJkz_McOJhEjEBVrkQ1ryOm0TsTJz4Yhj84sxfpUp2r5wnWsrjHCzgpX-zUihgrZBbkhzCaRZwP7dnKHCcav-0q2bPQfgDBe991g_pPsxZcdJNkG4af0lOKeOC_T_oNQMUeKumgBmGWi7uQT34BFFOa3kjEcrnvrGOE%3D)**

But in order to put hardworking Americans first across the country, we need to support and elect candidates who share our vision. That’s why I’m reaching out to you about Hardworking Americans. This group is made up of a team that’s won tough elections, and they’re going to be the tip of the spear for victory in Georgia and beyond in 2024. Investing in this group is investing in candidates who put hardworking Americans first, and investing in a team that knows how to make a difference in their campaigns. Governor Brian Kemp | Governor Brian Kemp kept Georgia open, cut taxes for hardworking families, and stood with law enforcement to keep communities safe. Hardworking Americans is inspired by his fight. We support federal candidates who will always put hardworking men and women first — and we need your help. Every dollar raised helps us stand with the families and communities that are the backbone of this country.

Elections have consequences.

**Right now, we have a front-row seat to the consequences of electing far-right extremists like Gabe’s opponent:** After weeks on end without a Speaker of the House, they’ve handed the Speaker’s gavel to an election denier who wants to ban abortion nationwide and cut Social Security and Medicare.

We honestly can’t believe it. After three weeks of petty political games and holding Congress hostage, **they somehow elected someone even WORSE than Kevin McCarthy.** How is that possible?!

At this point, it goes without saying: It’s beyond time for Democrats to take back the House majority, and **holding Gabe’s seat is key to making that happen.** But we won’t be able to do that if we don’t hit this goal.

**[We simply can’t afford to fall short. Right now, we have a front-row seat to the consequences of electing far-right extremists like Gabe’s opponent: After weeks on end without a Speaker of the House, they’ve handed the Speaker’s gavel to an election denier who wants to ban abortion nationwide and cut Social Security and Medicare. We honestly can’t believe it. After three weeks of petty political games and holding Congress hostage, they somehow elected someone even WORSE than Kevin McCarthy. How is that possible?! At this point, it goes without saying: It’s beyond time for Democrats to take back the House majority, and holding Gabe’s seat is key to making that happen. Supporters like you have helped make some incredible victories possible:

✅ In **Alabama** , the Supreme Court blocked the GOP’s efforts to keep manipulated maps in place for the 2024 election. Now, Black Alabamians will have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice in two congressional districts.

✅ In **Ohio** , voters strongly rejected an anti-democratic effort from Republicans that would have made it harder for the people to make their voices heard and protect reproductive freedom.

✅ In **Florida** , a judge ruled that Ron DeSantis’ gerrymandered map was unconstitutional, opening the door for a fair map to be put in place before the next election.
**“Your support has proven to be critical to our fight year after year. And with your continuous support, I firmly believe we will forge a future where every voice resonates, where every vote holds weight, and where our democracy authentically mirrors the people it serves.”

_– Attorney General Eric Holder_**

[**_Donate to help the NDRC continue fighting for a strong democracy >>>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72355526/435087925/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231028_FR_10X_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGYzODhhLWI1NzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QtOkgmPCPwLEfgUioeHCK85Ukj6YHuUtjqEWbq-Acy0=)

While our movement has seen great success, now is not the time to grow complacent – attacks on our democracy are still mounting across the country.

❌ In **North Carolina** , Republican lawmakers rammed through a massive voter suppression bill ahead of the 2024 election, even overriding the Governor's veto.

❌ In **Ohio** , Republicans have ignored court orders in order to rush through manipulated maps that undermine the will of voters.

❌ In **Wisconsin** , the GOP legislature is working to protect their unearned power by passing a so-called redistricting “reform” that really just protects gerrymandering politicians.
[**_Team, those who seek to undermine our democracy are not giving up, so neither can we. Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting for fairness nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72355527/435087926/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231028_FR_10X_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGYzODhhLWI1NzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QtOkgmPCPwLEfgUioeHCK85Ukj6YHuUtjqEWbq-Acy0=)

clean_body: | Team, Across the country, we’ve seen some incredible victories for our efforts to defend our democracy – but we’ve also seen escalating efforts to undermine our system of free and fair elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Supporters like you have helped make some incredible victories possible: ✅ In Alabama , the Supreme Court blocked the GOP’s efforts to keep manipulated maps in place for the 2024 election. Now, Black Alabamians will have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice in two congressional districts. ✅ In Ohio , voters strongly rejected an anti-democratic effort from Republicans that would have made it harder for the people to make their voices heard and protect reproductive freedom. ✅ In Florida , a judge ruled that Ron DeSantis’ gerrymandered map was unconstitutional, opening the door for a fair map to be put in place before the next election. “Your support has proven to be critical to our fight year after year. And with your continuous support, I firmly believe we will forge a future where every voice resonates, where every vote holds weight, and where our democracy authentically mirrors the people it serves.” – Attorney General Eric Holder = While our movement has seen great success, now is not the time to grow complacent – attacks on our democracy are still mounting across the country. ❌ In North Carolina , Republican lawmakers rammed through a massive voter suppression bill ahead of the 2024 election, even overriding the Governor's veto. ❌ In Ohio , Republicans have ignored court orders in order to rush through manipulated maps that undermine the will of voters. ❌ In Wisconsin , the GOP legislature is working to protect their unearned power by passing a so-called redistricting “reform” that really just protects gerrymandering politicians. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | Patriot,

---
I am currently flying on Trump Force One to the GREAT STATE of Nevada – one of the earliest primaries.
---
The quicker we can wrap up the GOP primary, the quicker we can unite our Party and put all of our many resources together to accomplish our REAL MISSION: _firing Crooked Joe_.

---
And right now, we’re very close to ending the primary once and for all.

---
**_Two Republican presidential candidates – for whom I have a lot of respect – have already DROPPED OUT and endorsed our campaign._**
---
**_We have a 50 – and in some cases – 60-point lead in the polls NATIONWIDE._**
---
**_And we are outraising all of the other candidates – and it’s all thanks to grassroots donors like YOU,_**_**_not_**_** _a handful of special interest donors writing massive checks._**

---
Now, with the October end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up in about 72 hours, this is our chance to move even closer to ending the primary and beginning the General Election earlier than EVER BEFORE!

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72355956/435089511/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5M2NlYmEtYjc3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UH1Kkdoy1nlss6MuYdd1OkfEpYz_7eakUxuJ_2JCyhc=)
Hi there,

Today is National First Responders Day. I hope you will join me in taking a moment today to honor the men and women who bravely put their lives on the line to keep us safe.

**I am especially proud to share with you that our campaign recently received the endorsement of the Professional Firefighters of Arizona.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72355961/435089521/-381882994?refcode=em-10.28.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5M2NlYmEtYjc3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UH1Kkdoy1nlss6MuYdd1OkfEpYz_7eakUxuJ_2JCyhc=)
Here’s why this endorsement means so much to me:

**For far too long, firefighters and other critical first responders have not had their needs met by MAGA Rep. David Schweikert.** Schweikert would rather cut their benefits than honor the important work that they do for our AZ-01 community.

Not to mention, if the House GOP does not work across the aisle to stop the impending government shutdown next month, firefighters and other essential workers will go without pay. Thousands of Arizona families would be affected by Schweikert’s pandering to the far-right.

**[I am prioritizing firefighters, first responders, and other groups who are misrepresented by our current leadership in Congress in this race. With your support, I know we can flip this seat and have community-centered leadership in Congress. Will you chip in $3 today to help us get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72355981/435089531/-381882994?refcode=em-10.28.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5M2NlYmEtYjc3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UH1Kkdoy1nlss6MuYdd1OkfEpYz_7eakUxuJ_2JCyhc=)**

Thank you and enjoy your weekend,

Marlene

name: Dan Steiner, PreBorn!
subject: Fear and death v. hope and life
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Pro-Life Friend,

Last year, PreBorn!, through the Lord's work, was able to save
more than 53,452 babies and lead 9,544 mothers to commit
themselves to Christ.

Will you help save a preborn baby's life today?

One abortion occurs every minute in America. More than 1,600
abortions occur every day.

But when a mother facing an unplanned pregnancy receives a free
ultrasound session from PreBorn! -- when she sees her baby's tiny
hands and feet and hears her baby's heartbeat -- by God's grace,
everything changes.

When she sees her baby on an ultrasound, she will choose life
(instead of abortion) 80% of the time. Without an ultrasound, one
out of every three preborn babies will tragically perish.

Pro-Life Friend, will you make a gift of $28 today so that PreBorn! can
provide ONE MORE free ultrasound session to a young mom at a
crossroads?

Sponsor 1 life-saving ultrasound ($28)

Sponsor 2 life-saving ultrasounds ($56)

Sponsor 5 life-saving ultrasounds ($128)

Our Christ-centered, church-based, and integrity-focused
ministry was started to help save lives created in God's image -
and to give young moms the opportunity to hear the Gospel of
Jesus Christ, perhaps for the first time in their lives.

Your gift of $28 will provide a free ultrasound for one mother
-- $56 will reach two mothers in need -- $128 will reach five
mothers -- and rescue their children from abortion.

Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound!

While the abortion debate rages in state legislatures and
courtrooms, PreBorn! has taken a different approach: leading the
nation in empowering women facing unplanned pregnancies by
offering compassionate, Christ-centered care.

Please let me tell you the story of just one young woman that
PreBorn! has reached.

Lauren was terrified when she discovered her unplanned
pregnancy.

Facing extreme pressure from her boyfriend, she sought an
abortion in her home state of Ohio … but she was turned
away due to the state's new legislation.

Lauren's boyfriend put her on a plane to Washington, D.C. to
send her to the largest abortion clinic in the region.

But on her way to the abortion clinic, Lauren got lost - and
when she walked into the doors of the PreBorn! Network Clinic,
she was embraced with compassion and love like she had never
known.

Lauren saw her preborn baby thanks to a free ultrasound and
heard the steady "whoosh" of her little one's beating heart.
Lauren heard the Gospel, opened her heart to Jesus' abundant
grace and love … and she chose life!

Pro-Life Friend, every day we hear more stories like this.

We praise God for His intervention on behalf of these women and
their children. To Him alone be the Glory!

To help more women see their preborn babies on an ultrasound
and choose life, please support PreBorn! with your gift of $28 or
more today.

clean_body: Please read the following message from our sponsor. Pro-Life Friend, Last year, PreBorn!, through the Lord's work, was able to save more than 53,452 babies and lead 9,544 mothers to commit themselves to Christ. Will you help save a preborn baby's life today? One abortion occurs every minute in America. More than 1,600 abortions occur every day. But when a mother facing an unplanned pregnancy receives a free ultrasound session from PreBorn! -- when she sees her baby's tiny hands and feet and hears her baby's heartbeat -- by God's grace, everything changes. When she sees her baby on an ultrasound, she will choose life (instead of abortion) 80% of the time. Without an ultrasound, one out of every three preborn babies will tragically perish. Pro-Life Friend, will you make a gift of $28 today so that PreBorn! can provide ONE MORE free ultrasound session to a young mom at a crossroads? Sponsor 1 life-saving ultrasound ($28) Sponsor 2 life-saving ultrasounds ($56) Sponsor 5 life-saving ultrasounds ($128) Our Christ-centered, church-based, and integrity-focused ministry was started to help save lives created in God's image - and to give young moms the opportunity to hear the Gospel of Jesus Christ, perhaps for the first time in their lives. Your gift of $28 will provide a free ultrasound for one mother -- $56 will reach two mothers in need -- $128 will reach five mothers -- and rescue their children from abortion. Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound! While the abortion debate rages in state legislatures and courtrooms, PreBorn! has taken a different approach: leading the nation in empowering women facing unplanned pregnancies by offering compassionate, Christ-centered care. Please let me tell you the story of just one young woman that PreBorn! has reached. Lauren was terrified when she discovered her unplanned pregnancy. Facing extreme pressure from her boyfriend, she sought an abortion in her home state of Ohio … but she was turned away due to the state's new legislation. Lauren's boyfriend put her on a plane to Washington, D.C. to send her to the largest abortion clinic in the region. But on her way to the abortion clinic, Lauren got lost - and when she walked into the doors of the PreBorn! Network Clinic, she was embraced with compassion and love like she had never known. Lauren saw her preborn baby thanks to a free ultrasound and heard the steady "whoosh" of her little one's beating heart. Lauren heard the Gospel, opened her heart to Jesus' abundant grace and love … and she chose life! Pro-Life Friend, every day we hear more stories like this. We praise God for His intervention on behalf of these women and their children. To Him alone be the Glory! To help more women see their preborn babies on an ultrasound and choose life, please support PreBorn! with your gift of $28 or more today. Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound! With the support of our pro-life friends like you, Pro-Life Friend, we can continue saving babies … and saving souls … by the power of the Gospel! Please join us in praying that the Lord will bless our efforts this coming year, trusting and believing that He will help us accomplish the goals He has placed on our hearts for 2023. Choosing life, Dan Steiner PreBorn! Sponsor a life-saving ultrasound! body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

It's the spookiest time of the year, and here are some things way scarier than zombies and vampires.

We're talking about the awful policies pushed by out-of-touch politicians in Washington, like:

*
The
targeting
of
transgender
and
LGBTQ+
youth
and
gender
expression
in
sports,
schools,
and
bathrooms.
37
U.S.
states
have
introduced
at
least
142
bills
to
restrict
gender-affirming
healthcare
for
trans
and
gender-expansive
people
this
year,
nearly
three
times
as
many
as
last
year.
*
Rampant
attacks
on
reproductive
rights
nationwide
since
the
fall
of
Roe
v.
Wade.
Preventing
millions
of
women
and
pregnant
folks
from
accessing
the
care
they
need.
*
Escalating
attacks
against
migrants
and
immigrants.
We
are
seeing
more
hateful
rhetoric,
inhumane
conditions
and
blatant
mistreatment
of
migrants
being
transported
in
buses
across
the
U.S.
This
crisis
requires
compassion
for
human
beings
and
a
pathway
to
citizenship,
not
hatred
and
cruelty.

Friend, we're not asking for candy. We want to create a better world and stop these dehumanizing forces from causing even more suffering. Will you pitch in $24 or more to help Sepi Shyne win this race and be an advocate for all who need a voice in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231028_team_halloween_l1]

SUPPORT SEPI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231028_team_halloween_b1]

Thanks for being part of this! Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and fun Halloween.

Team Sepi
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m glad to have you on our team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=997%2E552475%2EoAhzuQ)
Hi Peter, it's Bob.
From day one, I’ve said that national Republicans will stop at nothing to flip this seat and try to regain control of the U.S. Senate.
Now, the stakes are even higher. **CNN just upgraded our race to the 4th most competitive Senate seat in the 2024 elections.**
I’m asking for your help so we can have what it takes to win. No matter how many millions our opponent and national Republicans spend attacking us and trying to tear us apart, if we come together, we will be ready for this fight.
**[Will you chip in to our re-election campaign before our upcoming deadline on October 31st? In a race with consequences this high, every contribution and every dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231028-1?refcode=em20231028-1&refcode2=997_552475_oAhzuQ&akid=997%2E552475%2EoAhzuQ)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231028-1?refcode=em20231028-1&refcode2=997_552475_oAhzuQ&akid=997%2E552475%2EoAhzuQ)**
We’ve got a lot of battles to fight in this campaign. I’m glad to have you on my team every step of the way.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=997%2E552475%2EoAhzuQ)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Josh Stein
subject: Let me explain why I am asking for $10 today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I am reaching out to you because this is important.

| Hi there, Peter –

I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails this week, but we email you only because it’s important.

[_**We’re quickly nearing our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now, we are short of our monthly projections. Could you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress now? Let me explain further:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72356507/435091326/1635010129?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231028-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMmFjYjAwLWJhNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpO03ZWugzHet0ZAl5SdGQRi_8eEaYKu3Sp1AI2fy1I=)

Hitting every single monthly online fundraising goal is critical to building a winning campaign.

What’s involved in a winning campaign? It starts with talking to as many voters as possible. There are also bills to pay – like our HQ office for staff and volunteers to work out of – and travel costs as I continue to hit the road and talk to voters and community leaders.

Some of our biggest expenses are in our voter communication and engagement budget. Next summer and fall, our campaign will make huge investments in TV and digital ads, direct mail pieces, and an aggressive ground campaign to get out the vote before the election. What we raise now plays a major role in determining how big our budget can be and how many voters we can reach.

**Early polling shows me in a dead heat with my extremist Republican opponent. This campaign will be won or lost by the smallest of margins. We really can’t afford to miss any of our internal budget goals because failing to hit our monthly projections translates into budget cuts on direct voter outreach.**

[_**That’s why your contribution today is so deeply important. It’s an investment into winning this campaign for a brighter future for North Carolina. Please split a contribution of $10 – or whatever is right for you – before the end of the month:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72356508/435091327/1635010129?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231028-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMmFjYjAwLWJhNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CpO03ZWugzHet0ZAl5SdGQRi_8eEaYKu3Sp1AI2fy1I=)

| Peter,

This month has been a **DISASTER** for Republicans and a clear indictment of their ability to lead.

Congress spent a total of _**22 days**_ without a speaker, and this week, Republicans elected extremist election denier Mike Johnson to lead the House.

That’s 22 days without action on critical spending bills, gun violence prevention legislation, and legislation to strengthen Social Security. **And now Mike Johnson’s speakership poses a risk to our democracy, reproductive freedoms, and LGBTQ+ rights.** **❌** He supports a national abortion ban.
**❌** He sought to overturn the 2020 election.
**❌** He supports a ban on same-sex marriage.

clean_body: The Republican majority created this disaster. We must get them out of office and take back the House next year. | = | Peter, This month has been a DISASTER for Republicans and a clear indictment of their ability to lead. Congress spent a total of 22 days without a speaker, and this week, Republicans elected extremist election denier Mike Johnson to lead the House. That’s 22 days without action on critical spending bills, gun violence prevention legislation, and legislation to strengthen Social Security. And now Mike Johnson’s speakership poses a risk to our democracy, reproductive freedoms, and LGBTQ+ rights. ❌ He supports a national abortion ban. ❌ He sought to overturn the 2020 election. ❌ He supports a ban on same-sex marriage. | = The Republican majority created this disaster. We must get them out of office and take back the House next year. As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I’m working to elect Latino progressives up and down the ballot next year. Peter,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bad557ad48494dd0b05829ba83937cae&_e=Gkrnb5_RxKNR91qYREI54crk3FKBVSjyBXjKaiiWWBugE2v2ytJTJwkJnIo03aJ1xj4P4jp4coKZcZvxRhSgdP9rdfckimpR-IPGKSygrT6yMVPrEH0m4EvfzYHUjB3Wj_bJg5_rC3DxgTreTwAEhcpb6e4ExvIBntNaSqRDIsaXE3LKMZP6xhLYwNrIw6MIU7gdN042-N-Z-DUGfgHlgzDc_e33Bqd6JUYpwcxkiQuHl9WEPySHyaXt4anzpg8NenRZpYufaRQcySZ-NysmsahxxY3i8Ska-tntT2xLWo26FshNYZGtceuRKXjY4sC0v0KCvmfG8ibzp4sxJbMmlBk52qttJOHoBeHXyya8LeRH1_u3GgcebSPr9PQPTIO4hPrmb0Ts-prpcxlja2hUfw%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bad557ad48494dd0b05829ba83937cae&_e=Gkrnb5_RxKNR91qYREI54crk3FKBVSjyBXjKaiiWWBugE2v2ytJTJwkJnIo03aJ1xj4P4jp4coKZcZvxRhSgdP9rdfckimpR-IPGKSygrT6yMVPrEH0m4EvfzYHUjB3Wj_bJg5_rC3DxgTreTwAEhcpb6e4ExvIBntNaSqRDIsaXE3LKMZP6xhLYwNrIw6MIU7gdN042-N-Z-DUGfgHlgzDc_e33Bqd6JUYpwcxkiQuHl9WEPySHyaXt4anzpg8NeH1JNms0WoOsAPO_-vd85LoJo-v4X3OBV2IiiEQo-eYXdl673OEBkdUJbO0f3IxsaSiKkKzPUAVqQta5JiWz7LLahO6bxRSa8qxL3K5cdE7LEmbjmFcj69NdZ3CfBZAmcSGBhVdA1cqfjS8L7155nQ%3D%3D)

Peter, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bad557ad48494dd0b05829ba83937cae&_e=Gkrnb5_RxKNR91qYREI54crk3FKBVSjyBXjKaiiWWBugE2v2ytJTJwkJnIo03aJ1xj4P4jp4coKZcZvxRhSgdP9rdfckimpR-IPGKSygrT6yMVPrEH0m4EvfzYHUjB3Wj_bJg5_rC3DxgTreTwAEhcpb6e4ExvIBntNaSqRDIsaXE3LKMZP6xhLYwNrIw6MIU7gdN042-N-Z-DUGfgHlgzDc_e33Bqd6JUYpwcxkiQuHl9WEPySHyaXt4anzpg8NGbYbxoA93XzGbXPDBlBKQICTdl2AbnZlfR2cWv-qDGvbxq78YcTpqbkGVA3TzT08NmG_eBae_CYN8kJzzWjPS4A3Vg7elir7hVte0UIBCQzY0VA321ocsNTtQD4O6FCijeleBguSvQxYowEsUSgodw%3D%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bad557ad48494dd0b05829ba83937cae&_e=Gkrnb5_RxKNR91qYREI54crk3FKBVSjyBXjKaiiWWBugE2v2ytJTJwkJnIo03aJ1xj4P4jp4coKZcZvxRhSgdP9rdfckimpR-IPGKSygrT6yMVPrEH0m4EvfzYHUjB3Wj_bJg5_rC3DxgTreTwAEhcpb6e4ExvIBntNaSqRDIsaXE3LKMZP6xhLYwNrIw6MIU7gdN042-N-Z-DUGfgHlgzDc_e33Bqd6JUYpwcxkiQuHl9WEPySHyaXt4anzpg8Np4mRT7DgqXP5DvgSsQIea_cB5M-cV5HEC6tpzAjjenJgIeR_SzWUtdEVgKYBzjK0g52nDunAZz7CUXm9Cr4XmU1KCYG2u1gM8U-MgozGNJ7QH8uBYnWeCksk6eFqCE82eKRruiE33kCHYUvDecZLxQ%3D%3D)

God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: I need two minutes of your time, Peter

body:
| | |
---
Peter, it's Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**support Emerge with a donation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72357439/435094676/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkY2JiNTg1LWJjNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jcAQ2616rD0hJbfaP6vhWNl825tAWLuYh_ujeaSw_70=) – but first, will you give me a moment to explain why their work is so important?
I've seen Emerge's impact firsthand: Emerge alums in the House have helped Democrats make headway on so many issues that impact women's lives: health care, workplace protections for pregnant workers, child care, reproductive freedom, and more.

**I'm so proud of the progress we've already made together – but we've still got work to do. At a time when women's rights are under attack by the GOP, we need to elect even more women to Congress and to down-ballot offices as well.**
**[So I'm asking you to help Emerge change the face of power at this critical moment for women's freedom: Can I count on you to give $10 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower Democratic women candidates?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72357440/435094677/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkY2JiNTg1LWJjNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jcAQ2616rD0hJbfaP6vhWNl825tAWLuYh_ujeaSw_70=)**

The first time I got involved in politics, I ran for school board because I wanted to help kids and families succeed. I won that race – one of the hardest and most rewarding positions I’ve ever had! Then I ran for State House because I wanted to fix our broken child care system – then State Senate. I made the decision to run for Congress with a laser focus on supporting women, working families, and enhancing child care in every sector. Now, I am the second woman to ever serve as Democratic Whip.

I've dedicated my career to fighting for women's rights, and I know how important it is to invest in the next generation of women leaders – especially at a time when the GOP is attacking our freedom. I am proud to be a voice advocating for change, but have often been the only woman at the table. This has never been a one-woman job, Peter, and I am committed to encouraging and supporting more women in leadership positions. **_Will you join me?_**
**By investing $10 in Emerge’s work right now, you can help us get strong women candidates on the ballot and ensure bright new voices are heard at every level, from the school board to Congress.

[So please, will you donate $10 or more now – as much as you can – to help Emerge empower more Democratic women to run for office and win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72357445/435094682/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkY2JiNTg1LWJjNzUtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jcAQ2616rD0hJbfaP6vhWNl825tAWLuYh_ujeaSw_70=)**
Thank you so much for your support,

Katherine Clark Congresswoman & House Democratic Whip
U.S. House of Representatives, Massachusetts' 5th District

At a time when women's rights are under attack by the GOP, we need to elect even more women to Congress and to down-ballot offices as well. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | = | | = | | = | | = The first time I got involved in politics, I ran for school board because I wanted to help kids and families succeed. I won that race – one of the hardest and most rewarding positions I’ve ever had! Then I ran for State House because I wanted to fix our broken child care system – then State Senate. I made the decision to run for Congress with a laser focus on supporting women, working families, and enhancing child care in every sector. Now, I am the second woman to ever serve as Democratic Whip. I've dedicated my career to fighting for women's rights, and I know how important it is to invest in the next generation of women leaders – especially at a time when the GOP is attacking our freedom. I am proud to be a voice advocating for change, but have often been the only woman at the table. This has never been a one-woman job, Peter, and I am committed to encouraging and supporting more women in leadership positions. Will you join me? By investing $10 in Emerge’s work right now, you can help us get strong women candidates on the ballot and ensure bright new voices are heard at every level, from the school board to Congress. = Thank you so much for your support, Katherine Clark Congresswoman & House Democratic Whip U.S. House of Representatives, Massachusetts' 5th District | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States |

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: What terrifies elites more than our campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
As you may know, I recently declared myself independent from both political parties.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_non3&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, As you know, I recently declared myself as an independent candidate for President. **“Independent” doesn’t just mean I’m independent of the two parties. It also means I’m independent of their traditional funders, all the corporate donors, Big Tech, Big Pharma, Wall Street and the rest.** But let me tell you who I’m NOT independent of. **I’m not independent of you! And I don’t want to be.** When I’m President, YOU – **the people** – are going to be my boss. YOU are going to be who I listen to. Not the lobbyists or the influence peddlers or the whole out-of-touch culture of Washington DC. And that means I’m also dependent on you to fund my campaign. Those mega corporations and insiders won’t touch me with a ten-foot pole. **Instead I’m relying on thousands and thousands, soon to be millions, of small donations from people like you.** **** Close to two-thirds of American voters say they want an alternative to the two party candidates. **If you’re serious about that, I’d like to ask you to donate to my campaign so we can get on the ballot on all 50 states.** Now is the time to show everyone an independent candidate is for real.**A[$25 contribution](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_non3&n=2) will help so much -- especially now.**

**Thank you!**
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Believe me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
It's clear: MAGA Republicans have rallied around Mike Johnson because he is a threat to our democracy and a threat to our freedoms. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72358087/435096704/-1601421226?sourceid=1052217&refcode=20231028_WarrenOnMike_v1s3&refcode2=WTEFH1057&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNmZTYxYi1iZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Pu9LMK1gp3-0_fwMyz_-DDEHQLg4g_4om0ozuQXoB0=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72358088/435096705/-1601421226?sourceid=1052217&refcode=20231028_WarrenOnMike_v1s3&refcode2=WTEFH1057&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNmZTYxYi1iZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Pu9LMK1gp3-0_fwMyz_-DDEHQLg4g_4om0ozuQXoB0=) Hi Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren

On Wednesday, House Republicans elected anti-abortion extremist Mike Johnson as their new speaker. Across the country, people were looking at the headlines and asking one question: "Wait — who's Mike Johnson?" So I wanted to reach out and share a few things about his extreme record.
* He didn't just vote against certifying the 2020 presidential election results — he helped **lead the charge**. _The New York Times called him "the most important architect of the Electoral College objections."_
* **Donald Trump** says he'll be a "fantastic" speaker (see the point above).
* He voted _against_ establishing the bipartisan **Jan. 6 commission**.
* He introduced a national "**Don't Say Gay** " bill to block federally funded institutions — _including public schools_ — from discussing sexual orientation and gender identity with students under 10 years old.
* **And finally, he's a staunch anti-abortion extremist who's supported nationwide bans. After _Roe v. Wade_ fell, he tweeted this message for abortion providers in Louisiana: "Perform an abortion and get imprisoned at hard labor for 1-10 yrs & fined $10K-$100K." Check it out:**

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72358089/435096706/-1601421226?sourceid=1052217&refcode=20231028_WarrenOnMike_v1s3&refcode2=WTEFH1057&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNmZTYxYi1iZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Pu9LMK1gp3-0_fwMyz_-DDEHQLg4g_4om0ozuQXoB0=) | [FIGHT BACK NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72358090/435096707/-1601421226?sourceid=1052217&refcode=20231028_WarrenOnMike_v1s3&refcode2=WTEFH1057&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNmZTYxYi1iZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Pu9LMK1gp3-0_fwMyz_-DDEHQLg4g_4om0ozuQXoB0=)
---
**It's clear: MAGA Republicans have rallied around Mike Johnson because he is a threat to our democracy and a threat to our freedom. **

I'm fighting to stop their dangerous agenda, protect our fundamental freedoms, and pass policies that put our government on the side of families — and I'm proud to do this work alongside EMILYs List candidates in Congress. That means passing national abortion protections. That means strengthening our democracy and protecting voting rights. That means defending LGBTQ+ rights.

**But if Republicans gain any more power,_and they're fighting for it_ , there will be nothing stopping them from passing their extremist agenda and enshrining MAGA politics into law.**

[**, Peter believe me, it has never been more important to protect our Senate majority, flip the House, and elect pro-choice champions everywhere. So, I'm asking personally: Can you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List to push back against right-wing extremism?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72358091/435096708/-1601421226?sourceid=1052217&refcode=20231028_WarrenOnMike_v1s3&refcode2=WTEFH1057&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTNmZTYxYi1iZTc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Pu9LMK1gp3-0_fwMyz_-DDEHQLg4g_4om0ozuQXoB0=)

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: This was a one-sided resolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After the House GOP settled on a far-right, Christian nationalist as their
new Speaker on Wednesday, Congress immediately passed a one-sided
resolution giving Israel our country’s stamp of approval to enact genocide
against the people of Palestine under the guise of ‘self-defense.’

With the Meeks-McCaul resolution, both Republicans and Democrats are not
just ignoring, but actively approving the death of thousands of
Palestinians at the hands of the Israeli government — in addition to the
harm and displacement of millions of people.

Only ten members of Congress stood on the right side of history and
opposed this measure, including Justice Democrats-endorsed Representatives
Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Summer Lee, Ilhan
Omar, and Rashida Tlaib.

These courageous progressive leaders were already facing a barrage of
hateful attacks for demanding a ceasefire; now, it’s only going to get
worse.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231028.rMhIKe&refcode=em20231028-31569&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa ]Will you stand with Justice Democrats and our brave incumbents in
Congress by making a $3 grassroots contribution before our
October fundraising deadline?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231028.rMhIKe&refcode=em20231028-31569&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa ]Contribute $3

The passing of this resolution comes after President Biden requested
another $14.3 billion for Israel, $11 billion which is dedicated to more
missiles and other military weapons being used to wipe out Gaza.

Our diverse, progressive bloc refused to greenlight this unconditional
military funding for a far-right government hell-bent on eradicating the
Palestinian people. Instead, we are calling for a ceasefire and all
hostages to be released to end this scourge of violence.

AIPAC was already spending millions of dollars and recruiting candidates
to challenge and unseat Summer, Ilhan, and Jamaal in 2024. Now, we need to
be even more prepared with the resources needed to fight back and defend
the Squad next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231028.rMhIKe&refcode=em20231028-31569&amount=3&t=1021&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa ]Justice Democrats is doing everything in our power to re-elect the
Squad and keep human rights champions in Congress: if you can, pitch in
ANY amount you can afford to fuel our work before Tuesday’s end-of-month
deadline.

Your support is always appreciated, especially now.

Thank you,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231028-31569-footer&t=1024&refcode2=31569_1203867_HZHfpa&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=31569%2E1203867%2EHZHfpa

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
