AIPAC was already spending millions of dollars and recruiting candidates to challenge and unseat Summer, Ilhan, and Jamaal in 2024. Now, we need to be even more prepared with the resources needed to fight back and defend the Squad next year. [ ]Justice Democrats is doing everything in our power to re-elect the Squad and keep human rights champions in Congress: if you can, pitch in ANY amount you can afford to fuel our work before Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline. Your support is always appreciated, especially now. Thank you, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Cinde will defend us against the extremist political games that we've seen take over too many states.

We need Cinde in the corner office, and if we keep working hard together, we can get her there.

Let's keep up this campaign's momentum. The support of our grassroots base is critical to our success.

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Susan and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Susan Wild and I represent two of the most competitive districts in Pennsylvania – and the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72358332/435097525/-1055896010?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231028-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQwNzQ0Yy1jMDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNTkg5rGja-7u1EAsHe0rBp5i_CE-Wof7IyBE2fsU3s=)

Peter,

This is Congressman Matt Cartwright from Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District – and Susan Wild and I need your help to keep Pennsylvania blue.

My friend Susan and I represent neighboring districts in Northeast Pennsylvania, but that’s not all: We represent two of the _most competitive districts in the country._ **So we need your help to win our “toss-up” races and take back the House majority next year.**

[_**Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or any amount you can between my campaign and Susan Wild’s to help us keep Pennsylvania’s most competitive districts blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72358333/435097526/-1055896010?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231028-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQwNzQ0Yy1jMDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNTkg5rGja-7u1EAsHe0rBp5i_CE-Wof7IyBE2fsU3s=)

**Securing these two seats is crucial, and the margins will be razor-thin.** In 2022, I won PA-08 by just 2.4%, and Susan won PA-07 by 2%. Holding these seats isn’t just about taking back our House majority, it’s about ensuring our government functions effectively for ALL Americans.

**But the road to victory won’t be easy.** Both Susan and I are top targets for National Republicans, and our opponents’ dark money groups are ready to spend millions in our districts to protect their narrow majority. That’s why we need the resources to fight back.

[_**Will you stand with me and Susan Wild today by splitting a contribution before our end-of-month deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72358341/435097534/-1055896010?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231028-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQwNzQ0Yy1jMDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNTkg5rGja-7u1EAsHe0rBp5i_CE-Wof7IyBE2fsU3s=)

Thank you,

Matt Cartwright

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: America is the greatest country on earth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=eee503a93b0641318015ddfe51e20db9&_t=_D4c7VhRLbfXoz5YAcIpTDnvgvl9RGlXODatbr7MNWpcyFa1f8Bwtei59Gv_1nVEDIrG6FnqmSSI5QpxhKDnWHXOiAxgNzbYwYycAySyAZM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=eee503a93b0641318015ddfe51e20db9&_t=_D4c7VhRLbfXoz5YAcIpTDnvgvl9RGlXODatbr7MNWpcyFa1f8Bwtei59Gv_1nVEDIrG6FnqmSSI5QpxhKDnWHXOiAxgNzbYwYycAySyAZM%3D)
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eee503a93b0641318015ddfe51e20db9&_e=fnHU_R8ocmD2mvnPHMjJThMFV6BO9wi9JZ1gSveQ4HzI9XR84NdK1SadYbtg-FdnqU_9ZwNNoTcUmVV_RoMedygfUJe1xA_fnAJNfMFDcSe8VcJrjIW4uBIUc5rM4s9ehG-YPjyHkMA9qRAVSltTFdpF6Uei-8KyGO2cFP9V6XQjKhgPSL1laA4PqQlKJPukSJCUgFn6_yT3vT3VMOck1qVfnMOh9qCKH8Q3vSwRToHF8fzgU2YgQLRYlpyrD9qPRJmmKh7su0tvkhgTZnAfktIvT9CzWrQFx1TPEcNHhiS0pEkhdCR0kWjbdUSGAuXxi_BBCFfCFnZsEIL935uTUesFPXdtPdlSIEC4vVUIOjtLGgef9h4PXkD3DC8MSNwz12QmiDQ9O7AlcKHy_g45TQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=eee503a93b0641318015ddfe51e20db9&_e=fnHU_R8ocmD2mvnPHMjJThMFV6BO9wi9JZ1gSveQ4HzI9XR84NdK1SadYbtg-FdnqU_9ZwNNoTcUmVV_RoMedygfUJe1xA_fnAJNfMFDcSe8VcJrjIW4uBIUc5rM4s9ehG-YPjyHkMA9qRAVSltTFdpF6Uei-8KyGO2cFP9V6XQjKhgPSL1laA4PqQlKJPukSJCUgFn6_yT3vT3VMOck1qVfnMOh9qCKH8Q3vSwRToEM1PQFnmgidNle0NZB3P-AFAT8CUR8u7c-HAgkGR280b-uQ-UZ2FHvfg_sk--boYN-Emqo8hGeAUXDf7RnlVEc0MhMZci4s2nKemRwhlWLzF8BbO4b5k4bbL5p8DB06Qfx_z61tJo_iFul79Nq9v9GAYP3EKjAL-xDmiNEo7Xcqw%3D%3D) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: Help us get there. | | Team, We’re rapidly approaching our first big deadline of the fourth quarter. Although the year is coming to an end, our work is just getting started. Election Day in Ohio is just around the corner — and our slate of 2024 campaigns is quickly growing. And we definitely can’t break our stride now, team. Our friends on the ground are working around the clock during these final days to protect reproductive freedom. But throughout this campaign, extremists have continuously thrown countless curveballs our way. With less than two weeks to go before Election Day, we can bet that they won’t be slowing down. = = The work doesn’t stop in Ohio — Nebraska and Arizona are both working nonstop to get reproductive freedom and paid sick leave on the ballot in 2024. Allowing voters to make their voices heard at the ballot box and securing both of these victories next year will have a massive impact on hardworking Americans' everyday lives. Here at The Fairness Project, we’re prioritizing building grassroots campaigns to create a country that is fair for all. Fair wages. Fair access to health care. And fair benefits. But we can’t do that without you, team. Every dollar we raise helps empower voters to show up and participate in direct democracy because we know when voters are allowed to decide, progress wins. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: You might not know me, because I’ve been busy working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction, otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=ed6ef413341f4afd89d291f909b3e8c0&_t=Q0TcCzvhT9y53c_tD2SxO3nNnPs7ob56WAYRxgwRsCxln4LRk3yTL8GzWcAu538buTeJcaFntpzbyv2nNcbuoafEGllMviSTA348iaaV5pg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=ed6ef413341f4afd89d291f909b3e8c0&_t=Q0TcCzvhT9y53c_tD2SxO3nNnPs7ob56WAYRxgwRsCxln4LRk3yTL8GzWcAu538buTeJcaFntpzbyv2nNcbuoafEGllMviSTA348iaaV5pg%3D)

Peter,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for. To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. body:
| We are officially 100 days away from early and mail voting beginning in California — and considering the number of votes expected to be cast early and by mail, it’s a countdown to Election Day.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4321%2E5257348%2EtNzxVC)
**It’s Adam with an important update: We are officially 100 days away from the start of early voting in California — _and considering the number of votes expected to be cast early and by mail, it’s a countdown to Election Day._**
**[Can you chip in $3?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4321%2E5257348%2EtNzxVC)**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4321%2E5257348%2EtNzxVC)
[DONATE $3 NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=6&akid=4321%2E5257348%2EtNzxVC)
---
It has been an honor to stand alongside the people of California in this fight. Since launching this campaign for U.S. Senate, I have crisscrossed California’s 58 counties and heard directly from people on what they want from their next U.S. Senator.
We’re fighting for affordable housing, an economy that works for everyone, to attack climate change and protect reproductive freedom, and so much more. We are also sharing a positive message that what’s right matters. Truth matters. Democracy matters.
And we’re running this campaign the right way: I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs.
This campaign is powered by (and for) hard working people — just like my service has been in the House and will be as your next U.S. Senator.
Now, as the people of California start receiving their ballots soon (_and our advertising is starting even sooner_!), I’m counting on your help so we can reach every voter possible to win.
**[My team is doubling-down on our organizing efforts in these next 100 days. Will you rush in $3 to help us reach everyone in California’s 58 counties — from Siskiyou all the way down to San Diego — before Tuesday’s October deadline?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=7&akid=4321%2E5257348%2EtNzxVC)**

---

clean_body: before the election | | | Well, Derek, it’s that time again: Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is only a few days away. But this one bears great importance. It’s our last big fundraising goal before Election Day in Virginia. My team and I are making sure that we’re exploring every avenue possible to set Democrats up for success at the polls. That includes asking this team to step up and donate towards our October fundraising goal so we can give those Democratic candidates the support they need in their final get out the vote push. Mark Warner end-of-month election supporter record Supporter: Derek Did you donate this time last year? No, but there’s still time. This is when we need your help the most! Suggested Action: = When we were in this position last October and outlets across the country were certain that the GOP was going to have a sweeping victory in Congress, you all dug deep and stopped that red wave in its tracks. Now we need to do it again here at home. = Thank you, Mark Warner ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

Daniel Ortega, who became president of Nicaragua again in 2007 after a 17-year hiatus, is allegedly attempting to extract concessions from the White House by allowing undocumented migrants to use his country as a waystation| | | | Mike Pence announced the suspension of his 2024 presidential campaign Saturday afternoon. Pence's withdrawal from the race comes amid poor fundraising numbers and recognition that today's GOP has left the former vice president behind. NBC News' Sarah Dean reports: He made the unexpected announcement at the annual Republican Jewish Coalition convention in Las Vegas. “I Via Bearing Arms By Cam Edwards | 10:01 AM on October 27, 2023 As local, state, and federal law enforcement continue to search for the man believed to be responsible for the murder of 18 people and injuries to 13 others in Lewiston, Maine on Wednesday evening, information about the suspect continues to trickle out from official sources. One place you don't see a lot of robbery attempts is at gun stores. I'm going to guess there's a pretty good reason for that. That's not to say theft never happens. Not everything is behind the counter, after all, and shoplifting is likely to be something of an issue for any retail store. But The man leading the campaign to expose antisemitism on college campuses received a frightening call from authorities Thursday night. The situation could have been far worse. Adam Guillette, president of Accuracy in Media (AIM), has received national media attention in recent days for his doxxing campaign. Using trucks with electronic billboards, Guillette has legally identified PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

Right at this moment, Mississippi voters are casting their ballot for who they want to be their next governor. And boy, are folks turning out:
**_Northeast Mississippi Daily Journal:_ "Mississippi absentee ballots already close to half of 2019 total"**
We’re seeing some amazing voter turnout — but I’m not taking a break until polls close on Election Day. I’m going all across the state to mobilize every last voter. Nobody is getting left on the sidelines.
In 2019, the governor’s election came down to just a handful of votes. Every poll that we’ve seen points to an even tighter race this year. That’s why we’ve spent a historic amount on voter turnout.
**Here’s the truth: If we have the resources to fully fund our voter mobilization efforts, we will win this race. But creating historic voter turnout is _expensive_.**
**[That’s why I’m counting on you, Peter. Can you chip in $25 right now to make sure we have the resources to fully fund our GOTV program? In a race this close, any amount makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72359830/435102254/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.7981980e-c575-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7981980e-c575-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk4MTk4MGUtYzU3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Extd0_xAMmjegkzm1ZrdN13Rho97chK2IglsNLIVACo=)**

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
In four days, our campaign has our October fundraising deadline.
This is one of the most competitive races in the whole country. The stakes are high, which is why Senator Mark Kelly is all in.
Senator Kelly has a video message waiting for you explaining why our race is so important. Will you take less than a minute to watch it and then consider chipping in to our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]
With all the insanity in Congress right now, it’s critical that we have leaders in the House who will put their constituents before political games or the party line.
In 2022, Kirsten came within one percentage point of winning this district — even though our campaign was outspent 6:1.
Next year will be different. We already have more national support than we did at any point last cycle. But there’s still going to be a ton of Republican money pouring in to support Kirsten’s opponent.
Senator Kelly knows how important this district is. If we hit our October goal, we’ll have the resources we need to get our message out, flip this seat, and take the House back from Republican extremists. That’s why we have to ask: will you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]
Thank you, Peter!
Engel HQ

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024-kellyvid?refcode=X_102823_EOM_C_KellyVideo_actrs]

Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

clean_body: My first message as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. | | Fellow American, I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement. My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve. In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign. As we move forward, I need to know that we have your support. For liberty, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m going to ask for just $5 to help CAPT Hung Cao meet his critical end-of-month goal. Things are getting serious in the Commonwealth. Tim Kaine has the full backing of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the deep-pocketed Democrat establishment. There are a lot of political campaigns out there. But I chose to work with Hung because I believe in his vision for America. He spent his life putting service over self as a Navy Special Operations Officer, retiring as a Captain. Now, he’s bringing a new fight to Virginia, and I’m proud to be by his side. Raising enough money to take down an establishment, entrenched politician like Tim Kaine isn’t easy. It’s an uphill battle, and we won’t give up until the last vote is counted. In today’s Bidenomics economy, I know a dollar doesn’t go as far as it used to at the grocery store. But the only way we can solve America’s problems is by electing principled conservatives like Hung who will stop out-of-control spending, support hardworking Americans like you, and END giving billions to the radical Left’s woke priorities. But if you’re in a position where you can spare just $5, we need your help. Our end-of-month goal is in just three days, and we need to make sure our incredible momentum lasts through election day. Tim Kaine has had years to prepare for this election. He’s been calling up mega-donors and toeing the line to keep the establishment happy. Hung didn’t even get into politics until just a year ago, Peter. Right now, I’m helping him build the campaign infrastructure we need. That means building out our staff, engaging volunteers, making yard signs, and much more. It takes long hours and a lot of dedication - and a lot of money. We have deadlines like the one coming up in just three days to keep us on track to raise the resources we need to win tough races like this. If we meet our goal, we’ll have the funds we need to build out our campaign to a winning powerhouse to take on Tim Kaine. But we can’t do it without you. Thank you, John Campaign Manager | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Even just a dollar or two makes all the difference.Thank you for standing with us! | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hung Cao for VirginiaPO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

name: Finance Team, Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: Re: Our mistake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We made a mistake.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1420%2E35263%2EtA12Qh)
We’ll be honest, Peter: **We made a mistake.** We’ve warned you before that it won’t be easy defending this seat against self-funding opponents with virtually unlimited warchests. So when we planned our budget earlier this month, we knew we had to be ambitious to match the tens of millions of dollars Republicans are preparing to spend in Wisconsin. But we made an error in our reporting, and now we’re facing a _much larger gap_ to our grassroots fundraising goal than we previously thought... Peter, mistakes happen. **But the reality is, campaigns like ours don’t have the luxury of missing out on critical fundraising goals.** Tammy doesn’t have a $20 million personal warchest like her potential megamillionaire opponents to self-fund her campaign for Senate. Instead, she relies on generous donations from folks just like you to make up the gap. **[So we’re humbly asking: Will you rush in a quick donation right now to help us make up the surprise gap in our budget? Tammy’s counting on your support to deliver Wisconsin for Democrats.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231028_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1420%2E35263%2EtA12Qh)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-oct23.p1cCjd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231028_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1420%2E35263%2EtA12Qh)

name: Jerry Evans
subject: In Case You Missed It
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
I want to share some exciting news, in case you missed it earlier this week.
We are excited to announce seven endorsements from:
Josh McBroom Naperville City Councilman Rich Janor Naperville Park District Commissioner Nicole Prater Winfield Township GOP Chair and Winfield Township Supervisor Ed Bessner 5th Ward Alderman St. Charles Richard Artz Kane County Regional Board of Schools Trustee Shane Nowak Elgin Community College Trustee Cody Holt a Former U-200 School Board Member
These patriots, along with our other endorsers former IL Supreme Court Justice Bob Thomas, the Dupage Township GOP and the Dupage Township GOP Chairman Antonio Timothee, know the importance of electing a Republican to this seat. We are laying the groundwork for the type of campaign it takes to flip a seat from blue to red. Will you [join our team](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00108mfUFBas2bQWr6UVuemlTYg-I8GEisVjXOGfoqZw5M0vHnyvUhmnVGqixlmP_h7jcRPan-KvCe4F34NJLt1BX4Tk09Kt-olQ8F3kgnDkdT8Ese3LpZIk7bSmQWsizWD39Vwqbypi5iinVjeox_B0g_nkPWkLlo9mQZSNl07npmZqa0ZolCLphvc9zcO-GGPrKe1twBPHpHzQk-WKdV6jptUctXNEBZz3zmWCKKKyHMrH-NjuCxS1RMf42V98sIZ&c=NbwC3eCVyS8d6nZkHG0fB0DTGtvMdQfETIeeT9FNdxwtlk0QOJin3w==&ch=ZnZX5Iil6oZF4DtD6H39vPBXBG1sZNrPAn1afiRphifevvCBleKfEg==)?
I want to thank you again for your constant support of this campaign. In just 19 days we were able to raise over $100,000 for our campaign! In the last few weeks alone, we have shown why we are the front-runner in this race. Our fundraising strength, endorsements, and our overall support from voters in the district show that our campaign is the one that will be victorious against Bill Foster in November!
While we are honored and thrilled to have received so much support, we know that more must be done to prepare for victory in the General Election. That is why I am once again asking for your support in our shared mission. By [donating here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00108mfUFBas2bQWr6UVuemlTYg-I8GEisVjXOGfoqZw5M0vHnyvUhmncD_yUpF3T8eIB6KH0z7v9GhjLyuPywPX8065finyR5kg-2iv_tmVAujSiS12wVwgndKi9qm62wFFzXWJaf3ofoTu5MKGhnaSJOtclxgyxYsZaDpiqiYkJnBqACE5IeAij-27uWkBXX7ymK9vOaiZhg=&c=NbwC3eCVyS8d6nZkHG0fB0DTGtvMdQfETIeeT9FNdxwtlk0QOJin3w==&ch=ZnZX5Iil6oZF4DtD6H39vPBXBG1sZNrPAn1afiRphifevvCBleKfEg==) you can help us continue fighting for a new path forward in the 11th District and to finally bring back common sense to Congress. So please join us at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00108mfUFBas2bQWr6UVuemlTYg-I8GEisVjXOGfoqZw5M0vHnyvUhmnVGqixlmP_h7rvlFvKUwCG-6UFSvzFqt94auVVP1xRkaK7PIIrhSATiXni3QmE8HhFe-sttGusu6MALLrRPde-1UjDuHnoIbVRgvzmCfiA4o&c=NbwC3eCVyS8d6nZkHG0fB0DTGtvMdQfETIeeT9FNdxwtlk0QOJin3w==&ch=ZnZX5Iil6oZF4DtD6H39vPBXBG1sZNrPAn1afiRphifevvCBleKfEg==) to learn more and [join](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00108mfUFBas2bQWr6UVuemlTYg-I8GEisVjXOGfoqZw5M0vHnyvUhmnVGqixlmP_h7RZKX9w2EQULl9DjQAa4zdDQwG2pYc87l7nN1neXo_lKIpyaWXHHUoNEzwRFOVcRAAPlpFrLym3LVhLATQSzApd3c_MpfOspDJguAOVz6EmzOdyYnZxFnnu4BQ-pxTw6D-jHNjPecIfWBm2C5yzdwB0T9AxNM9i9uh1pk-B1I6YndlB_53efeP3wLx0i7BLrI&c=NbwC3eCVyS8d6nZkHG0fB0DTGtvMdQfETIeeT9FNdxwtlk0QOJin3w==&ch=ZnZX5Iil6oZF4DtD6H39vPBXBG1sZNrPAn1afiRphifevvCBleKfEg==) our campaign today!
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. Do you want to add your name to the growing list of endorsements for the campaign? If so, email the campaign at info@jerryevansforcongress.com and we will get in touch with you.

name: Team Shapiro
subject: big things are possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, when Josh Shapiro was first elected Governor, he promised to get big things done for Pennsylvanians. And Derek, he’s delivered. From rebuilding I-95 within days, making universal free breakfast available for every student, and implementing automatic voter registration, Pennsylvania is proof that when we work together, we can improve the lives of millions of people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72360918/435105419/1284884800?refcode=email_102823_accomp&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTQ1NzcyYS1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bw0f4GEUbH3Z1BuKmiNQZAwgyV1dvXzHmU4CWMThxUY=) Josh knows that working Pennsylvanians don’t want to hear about partisan games on the news — that’s why he’s worked with both sides of the aisle to deliver **real results** throughout PA. **Derek, Pennsylvania’s progress is incredible— but we also know that the work isn’t over.** [_**We need to keep fighting to protect our democracy, defend abortion rights and make sure every Pennsylvanian has access to real freedom and real opportunity. And if we want to continue doing big things across the Commonwealth, we need your help. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today? Fellow American,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=11b53316c6074f14b850e769d4b8a5cc&_e=OZPIxtFpBH6TFLfQ_e3s-D6fNcJqnrP8XkIyvGaC0-2dRFCRwPnFU7W8yRWECWwChhX2xER8QNryBkBLIy_EREUVsUiWgbzXcwDSIvIozm-fPWkSq9OzrrZE7OjkPmRK67BElpN1iPxFFS2qZRSA8GzpI6m1AVnaAtEh0MdBd4rV2nwCcknrtYmhSnbLpFL7YNC1gbosrkL9MVIVicne_-y1zpVCUKMmJyjgzQsEgpnMSzTVnUZaR2OjY025gz3cdFDaW7kYVD8gQbL9QLFYCWl5W9JvRRSzOQu_j5OOjaNz7SvCEWaEW-4-5rafzi1QMKnKQvsbmJLzR5G7fRFLNqdaM5X5fr3wZgIcrV8JssSKcAA182qpEwGIHBLN3EZTQFE9PbJh3KBgEh_zgw2WfA%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=11b53316c6074f14b850e769d4b8a5cc&_e=OZPIxtFpBH6TFLfQ_e3s-D6fNcJqnrP8XkIyvGaC0-2dRFCRwPnFU7W8yRWECWwChhX2xER8QNryBkBLIy_EREUVsUiWgbzXcwDSIvIozm-fPWkSq9OzrrZE7OjkPmRK67BElpN1iPxFFS2qZRSA8GzpI6m1AVnaAtEh0MdBd4rV2nwCcknrtYmhSnbLpFL7YNC1gbosrkL9MVIVicne_-y1zpVCUKMmJyjgzQsEgpnMSzTVnUZaR2OjY025gz3cZNursxJRr4r282PwgQH7kKbdAS9qTuas-lMMXfV9O_gYv7Z7FRyDdX7Uiid5jOlH4cLqpLjTFyHpOvwZQ2YsjbgZt1cTl8cserNNiGt-v4AGnuXs_Ipg7D95xoa-MvIO-BJO4mkktf81g3gy1ZMWBA%3D%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=11b53316c6074f14b850e769d4b8a5cc&_e=OZPIxtFpBH6TFLfQ_e3s-D6fNcJqnrP8XkIyvGaC0-2dRFCRwPnFU7W8yRWECWwChhX2xER8QNryBkBLIy_EREUVsUiWgbzXcwDSIvIozm-fPWkSq9OzrrZE7OjkPmRK67BElpN1iPxFFS2qZRSA8GzpI6m1AVnaAtEh0MdBd4rV2nwCcknrtYmhSnbLpFL7YNC1gbosrkL9MVIVicne_-y1zpVCUKMmJyjgzQsEgpnMSzTVnUZaR2OjY025gz3cRyqfpcai0eXlnxkGEGgIL8dPPydPbsv5qmXIBkwGbxnwMZjJ6B0bt-LeAG2SbjpudEcSWFkUJ64gQVGM2mIF31A84PsCsSwbtZQZ7sbLwG3rMAuakmj28V4ylvXs1nAiz-pRo0DZca_6EYzjgU4ICA%3D%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=11b53316c6074f14b850e769d4b8a5cc&_e=OZPIxtFpBH6TFLfQ_e3s-D6fNcJqnrP8XkIyvGaC0-2dRFCRwPnFU7W8yRWECWwChhX2xER8QNryBkBLIy_EREUVsUiWgbzXcwDSIvIozm-fPWkSq9OzrrZE7OjkPmRK67BElpN1iPxFFS2qZRSA8GzpI6m1AVnaAtEh0MdBd4rV2nwCcknrtYmhSnbLpFL7YNC1gbosrkL9MVIVicne_-y1zpVCUKMmJyjgzQsEgpnMSzTVnUZaR2OjY025gz3cRPOBLze_IauqR5R02Jw9bWlatqtUaj5OUuP-OK9Wy81vab1ARdaFs3haNLs0IOzh4ZswNbsWN4RAc2jL_ypwsMGWYztSh6BArLOljcNCxNwD-vDst5P6yjzMmRjuHWYmZZ87hOciDBCvQEFYF_5m2g%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=11b53316c6074f14b850e769d4b8a5cc&_e=OZPIxtFpBH6TFLfQ_e3s-D6fNcJqnrP8XkIyvGaC0-2dRFCRwPnFU7W8yRWECWwChhX2xER8QNryBkBLIy_EREUVsUiWgbzXcwDSIvIozm-fPWkSq9OzrrZE7OjkPmRK67BElpN1iPxFFS2qZRSA8GzpI6m1AVnaAtEh0MdBd4rV2nwCcknrtYmhSnbLpFL7YNC1gbosrkL9MVIVicne_-y1zpVCUKMmJyjgzQsEgpnMSzTVnUZaR2OjY025gz3cuodDHP_JBOznVsR2o7kWpp-ENojUE1I_3iLUx-v-XNaa7Tqt-CUcB2D75rDKb0jvGDKMGpPYHcnBbwkCtKccqH8GaER7IMLiFdiBrtXzcEe0yaPr8kCD3Huwp0K8OFz2sJ0cjsKbMkS_XtIoOBHfNg%3D%3D)

God bless,

subject: The GOP has unabashedly embraced extremism.

| Peter,

Republicans elected an extremist election denier as Speaker of the House.

Republican Mike Johnson couldn’t be more representative of the exact type of extremism we’re fighting back against. **❌** He supports a national abortion ban.
**❌** He led the charge to overturn the 2020 election.
**❌** He supports a ban on same-sex marriage. Peter, let’s not forget: **Johnson's election as speaker comes after 22 days of chaos and instability that set us back on critical legislation.**

Taking back the House has never been more urgent. It won’t be easy, but we have to do everything we can to take back the House next year. Right now, we also have to do everything we can to fight back against the extremist legislation that will come out of his speakership.

**Supporting campaigns like mine are crucial to keeping the momentum going on critical voting rights legislation, reproductive justice, and strengthening LGBTQ+ rights.[_Can I count on your support with a $10 contribution today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72361023/435105908/-329851188?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231028-z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQxOTc5Ni1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MSENmO4sr-1h04ahTUgMMs_tOXOt-nJvEte262yoL2I=)**

| | Hi Peter,

I'm writing to introduce myself as a candidate for the House of Delegates in the 89th District of Virginia. [**I hope to earn your support so I can continue my lifetime of service to this community and this state.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72361215/435106503/1879123592?sourceid=1052215&refcode=20231028_KarenJenkinsSplit&refcode2=WTEFH1058&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2QyOTc5Ni1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFlVI4_UiCt4e7qb4YVlsz04Q60WrQWomoV7F-TmbcI=)

I grew up in rural Virginia, where I learned the value of a hard day's work and a thriving community. As a mental health professional working in a classroom setting, I know firsthand the challenges both students and teachers face. And as a mother, I have the same concerns about the future of Virginia as you. As a lifelong resident of the City of Suffolk, I'm dedicated to fighting to make our community the best it can be.

[**That's why I'm running to represent the 89th District of the Virginia House of Delegates. It's also why, today, I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72361216/435106504/-51573401?sourceid=1052215&refcode=20231028_KarenJenkinsSplit&refcode2=WTEFH1058&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2QyOTc5Ni1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFlVI4_UiCt4e7qb4YVlsz04Q60WrQWomoV7F-TmbcI=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72361217/435106505/1879123592?sourceid=1052215&refcode=20231028_KarenJenkinsSplit&refcode2=WTEFH1058&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2QyOTc5Ni1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFlVI4_UiCt4e7qb4YVlsz04Q60WrQWomoV7F-TmbcI=)

Donations from people just like you help this campaign better connect with our community. At this critical time, we need to reach out to every last voter through digital marketing, events, and canvassing — and help seize this opportunity to improve education, make health care more affordable for more Virginians, and fight for economic opportunities.

My whole life, I've been a problem-solver. In every personal and professional experience, I've led with empathy and tried to bring people together to reach real solutions. That's the kind of delegate our community, our children, and our families deserve.

Together, we can win this district in November, and help Democrats reclaim a controlling majority in the House of Delegates. [**I'm ready to do the work, and take on every challenge that lies ahead of us on the road to Richmond. Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72361218/435106506/-51573401?sourceid=1052215&refcode=20231028_KarenJenkinsSplit&refcode2=WTEFH1058&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2QyOTc5Ni1jYzc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFlVI4_UiCt4e7qb4YVlsz04Q60WrQWomoV7F-TmbcI=)

name: Amanda Nichols, Our Revolution
subject: Combating misinformation in OH

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

In a little over a week polls will close in Ohio, where Our Revolution staff, volunteers, and activists have been organizing turnout efforts for the Yes on 1 Campaign to enshrine abortion rights into the state constitution. If we lose this election, abortion will be illegal in Ohio.

As usual, on the other side of the fight are extremists with deep pockets who are willing to say whatever they need to get their way. They’ve been lying nonstop about what this law will actually do, and we’re worried that it’s confusing voters (which is exactly what they want).

This is where you come in. The best way to combat their lies is to make sure we have as many one-on-one conversations with voters as possible to lay out the stakes and clear up any confusion. As the biggest progressive turnout organization in the country, this is what Our Revolution does best.

We are trying to raise $5,000 by midnight tomorrow to make sure we have the resources we need for voter turnout and we have about $2,300 left to raise. Can you pitch in now? name: Team Slotkin
subject: Three numbers that tell a story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=758%2E135344%2EwyLxtm)

Friend -
Since former Republican Congressman Mike Rogers filed his FEC report, we have been learning a lot about who is funding his campaign and where his contributions are coming from. Here are three important numbers you should know:
> **$120,000:** That’s how much PAC money Mike Rogers received in the first 24 days of his campaign – from other Republicans supporting his race as well as from corporate PACs backed by a private prison company and Elon Musk’s SpaceX PAC.
> **$4.8 million:** This is how much corporate PAC money Rogers took throughout his time in Congress. Corporate PACs loved supporting Mike Rogers because they knew he would take their check and then vote their way on the floor of the House. Whether it was defense contractors, big pharmaceutical companies, or Wall Street PACs, Mike Rogers cashed in at the expense of Michiganders.
> **$0:** Elissa has taken $0 in corporate PAC money since she first ran for Congress in 2018. She never wanted her constituents to question why she was voting a certain way, or have any doubt that she was fighting for their interests, and their interests alone. And unlike some, she stuck to the pledge even when she got elected.
Despite not taking corporate PAC money, Elissa has gone toe-to-toe with corporate-backed GOP opponents and won. How? By relying on lots and lots of people giving what they can, when they can over time. And the number one sources of individual contributions to this campaign? Emails like this one.
**So while we know that Mike Rogers will see a flood of corporate PAC money throughout his campaign, we also know that contributions to emails like these add up in a big way.** They are what power our operation and help us make strategic decisions about when we hire staff, when we will air TV ads, and how we build out our ground game.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $3 to help us send Elissa to the Senate? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because they all really do add up.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231028-2-15&t=2&akid=758%2E135344%2EwyLxtm)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: BREAKING: The GOP’s new House Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team, after 22 painstaking days, Republicans finally chose a House Speaker: **MAGA Rep. Mike Johnson, who led the House effort to overturn the 2020 election results, also happens to have been a fierce opponent of my efforts to investigate and impeach Donald Trump.**

Tom Emmer voted to certify the 2020 election result. Johnson voted to overturn it.

That’s why Emmer failed and Johnson became Speaker — **the Big Lie was the litmus test, and every single MAGA Republican got behind him.**

When a reporter asked Johnson about leading the effort to overturn the 2020 election, Republicans at his back drowned out the question with boos and told the reporter to “shut up.” **But our democracy cannot afford for us to “shut up” or stay silent in the face of _another Big Lie advocate_ taking control of a chamber of Congress.**

[Folks, this is another pivotal moment for the future of our democracy. I’m personally asking you to split $10 to help the Voter Protection Project and my campaign respond to an election denier becoming House Speaker. Please chip in.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56015?t=6&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56016?t=7&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56017?t=8&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56018?t=9&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56019?t=10&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56015?t=11&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
Mike Johnson is MAGA extremism all dressed up in a suit and tie.

As two senior members of the Judiciary Committee, Johnson and I have fought over a host of key issues from guns to immigration to his penchant for deep state conspiracy theories. He’s anti-reproductive freedom. Anti same-sex marriage. And supports the gutting of Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. That’s just for starters.

_But honestly, that’s most Republicans these days._ Johnson is different because **he was the lead architect behind House Republican efforts to overturn the 2020 election and still pushes out the Big Lie to this very day.**

But our run-ins long predate our service together on the Judiciary Committee, and go back to the first impeachment of Donald Trump.

**Mike Johnson served on Trump’s defense team during the first Senate impeachment trial.** While I presented facts and evidence about Trump’s wrongdoings, Mike Johnson proudly parroted MAGA talking points to defend Trump.
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56015?t=12&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
And just like Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and so many others, I’ve earned Mike Johnson’s vehement opposition and attacks. **And I’m honored by it.**

[Speaker Mike Johnson is the most extreme House Speaker in the history of our country, and as a solid ally of Donald Trump we can count on him to join the corrupt former president in doing all he can to try to block me from making it to the Senate. I need you with me today to help me stand up to his MAGA extremism. Please split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign, if you can.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56015?t=13&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56016?t=14&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56017?t=15&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56018?t=16&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56019?t=17&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56015?t=18&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
If this is the best Speaker that the Republican conference can offer, then it’s our duty to ensure this is the last one they ever have a chance to elect.

Thank you,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11519%2E878179%2EmJaUUb)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: There are still a couple of days left to make an impact. Help me reach our October donor goal. | | Fellow American, I will make this quick. There are only a couple of days left in October. But here's the good news - you still have time to make a critical impact! The next Presidential Debate is just around the corner, so we cannot afford to miss any deadlines or goals. Please, before midnight on Tuesday, chip in any amount - Every dollar helps us build this outsider campaign. Every dollar will help us spread our winning message. I know we can win next November, but we've got to start now. I am ready to take this America 2.0 campaign to the next level, but I can't do it without you, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. clean_body: A look at October: | | | | Hey Peter, did you catch this email from Mark earlier this week? When we first set our October goal at $75,000, we were looking at what tools we need in these last 4 months before Election Day to help us win — things like polling, voter outreach, and canvassing. Ads, voter engagement, and events are critical components of ensuring our community learns about our movement and has an opportunity to get involved. But the costs add up quickly, especially in a place like Los Angeles where the entry point to get an ad on TV is so high. Here's the latest: October Goal: $75,000 Current Fundraising: $73,714 = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = = Thank you in advance and for your enthusiasm thus far! Nick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark Hatton [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Tue, Oct 23, 2023 at 1:22 PM Subject: Heating Up: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Lately we've seen a lot of fundraising emails hit our inboxes. With the end-of-month fundraising deadline looming, everyone — Nick included — needs to show strong numbers.Here's a look at where things stand for digital fundraising: October Goal: $75,000 Current Fundraising: $71,887 The race for the CA-30 Congressional seat is heating up. We are running against 19 other candidates — and in this crowded field, it is critical that we keep up the fundraising and momentum that will fuel this campaign and our movement to victory in 2024. = We have just a little over four months because the Primary Election Day and no shortage of voter outreach opportunities we need to act on. Your support now will make a huge difference in getting us over the finish line and getting Nick to Congress. = = Mark Hatton | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: STOP dirty corporate factory farming
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081436?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Protect people, animals, and our planet from abusive factory farms!** Picture this: filthy pigs CRAMMED together **_with barely enough room to breathe._** Hens wedged into cages so small _**they can’t even spread their wings.**_ There’s no frolicking under the sun on this farm -- just a megacorporation doing what it does best: maximizing profits regardless of the consequences to people, animals, and the environment. **Animal waste from factory farms often contaminates local waterways,_killing fish and other living things._** In fact, industrial-scale farming produces **3x more fecal waste than humans.** And as result of lax regulations, manure and other toxic waste often **contaminate our air, water, and food.** **[Friend, we need 4,322 more petition signatures immediately to tell the USDA to STOP supporting factory farms. Add your name now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081437?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Greedy multinational corporations often locate their polluting factory farms in low-income Black and Brown communities. **And because of the unsanitary and crowded conditions for animals, factory farms become dangerous breeding grounds for bacteria and disease.**
We need our public dollars invested in more humane, sustainable food production. **Every day we wait to act is another day of manure and toxic waste inflicted on communities and our planet.** **[Take action to stop the USDA from using our tax dollars to further enrich these corporations. Sign by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081439?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you protecting people, animals, and the planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: In my own words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for. To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country. I believe that God is not done with America yet. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_t=AomLb2fiAGev-XOo2Od-FxfT_FpxZjvQG25VUKx444tWbV2onFqKJdqwlUjzGgA83LCKShmQlucMy5Snd0pXnkwlka3x5pjlxP5_D-eC1Ts%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_t=AomLb2fiAGev-XOo2Od-FxfT_FpxZjvQG25VUKx444tWbV2onFqKJdqwlUjzGgA83LCKShmQlucMy5Snd0pXnkwlka3x5pjlxP5_D-eC1Ts%3D)
[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_e=VHndfYDbFvEZoNMpGcrRExpUFwB-jVM-nZivusZQiAXXLZQtw8TSLYW9-ZHEH0MGGjIuIrtZMi1ku7noNAWPnkV8FIW1tI4oOZsOCnCMWunFsJVIFn5ts6D9J6L6_qoxliHISw-WkZNdW8Hqp0zoEndXCUFbT9NMvR5uswDNjTTBYpfzT0E-dHo6akiatvn-aTcRYtuzzjswwdS-mFDDqZYXaYED_wkG-j3d93MVjhVpr-90HNl097dtVLOin4d81RA8FZRZishMdWCQq25ge7C8QRp7k9f4m9WN5I0cM9f9xwfyviLfzpTQkjqtoyVizVNy7JrCLhKwneVuucBu_Wm1u8dncjDCBJ2te52k09qrVthyfaK67OuKMqAhHWARZWKH9d3k6p0spkZk3X1Y2Q%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_e=VHndfYDbFvEZoNMpGcrRExpUFwB-jVM-nZivusZQiAXXLZQtw8TSLYW9-ZHEH0MGGjIuIrtZMi1ku7noNAWPnkV8FIW1tI4oOZsOCnCMWunFsJVIFn5ts6D9J6L6_qoxliHISw-WkZNdW8Hqp0zoEndXCUFbT9NMvR5uswDNjTTBYpfzT0E-dHo6akiatvn-aTcRYtuzzjswwdS-mFDDqZYXaYED_wkG-j3d93MVjhVpr-90HNl097dtVLOin4d85nTboaYOQEAkFmNU_bOrXs9twN8-LfQxdS1YOdAOAOwEEgqwL_FJAvOYpQSNbBXlP02HZRS_qi2WlewgYuQ8uzVMGZVopLEg0olpcNTJQybNoJqNvpJehqkb_n44CAp68ULovMXbTqHGK97vqEWLIw%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_e=VHndfYDbFvEZoNMpGcrRExpUFwB-jVM-nZivusZQiAXXLZQtw8TSLYW9-ZHEH0MGGjIuIrtZMi1ku7noNAWPnkV8FIW1tI4oOZsOCnCMWunFsJVIFn5ts6D9J6L6_qoxliHISw-WkZNdW8Hqp0zoEndXCUFbT9NMvR5uswDNjTTBYpfzT0E-dHo6akiatvn-aTcRYtuzzjswwdS-mFDDqZYXaYED_wkG-j3d93MVjhVpr-90HNl097dtVLOin4d8juhWOcguUx6zAMc3wQYrXqkzccPnLNCHEnBhyJ9VLXYbitA66u88_oDezHez0lCsEsFwj6YsDAWg6JoxSlDVm8OuzhDaKmTl60r1zzH2C2ZzGMOqrQDPORlWn4HEvlqiE3kNpNDi4joYPgF0jUKMjQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_e=VHndfYDbFvEZoNMpGcrRExpUFwB-jVM-nZivusZQiAXXLZQtw8TSLYW9-ZHEH0MGGjIuIrtZMi1ku7noNAWPnkV8FIW1tI4oOZsOCnCMWunFsJVIFn5ts6D9J6L6_qoxliHISw-WkZNdW8Hqp0zoEndXCUFbT9NMvR5uswDNjTTBYpfzT0E-dHo6akiatvn-aTcRYtuzzjswwdS-mFDDqZYXaYED_wkG-j3d93MVjhVpr-90HNl097dtVLOin4d809VBe8oQyT2oJaSXoikcDv3lyc5grEDEmDWdGfBBY5ZmQcuPMKfHmIQEv8OFtKTI6Kz4-qtL7cuBmnpZOrHVZHtCA0hcDIqdQBsaLEraMbaA13gLein3ykFHMphMOJAhAH9VXJXprDCUo5_nqdKBpg%3D%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=13869fe7eba04f5285c8a41bf93e1c8a&_e=VHndfYDbFvEZoNMpGcrRExpUFwB-jVM-nZivusZQiAXXLZQtw8TSLYW9-ZHEH0MGGjIuIrtZMi1ku7noNAWPnkV8FIW1tI4oOZsOCnCMWunFsJVIFn5ts6D9J6L6_qoxliHISw-WkZNdW8Hqp0zoEndXCUFbT9NMvR5uswDNjTTBYpfzT0E-dHo6akiatvn-aTcRYtuzzjswwdS-mFDDqZYXaYED_wkG-j3d93MVjhVpr-90HNl097dtVLOin4d8U0YnWMvAfdsmq3dLmVu573E5Rbp2uWXPNc3Dd_HwyCubtFBYHDDsoKqJdrdLbqMVFpGp7tyMjb5MTSCdbGA1gBhCGvMVG6w1m-AG-RDv2aaSZP31b7ZF1OGU0znpXdoueaqYp0_wPtjv-0eiD81wPQ%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. clean_body: So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for. To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country. I believe that God is not done with America yet. | | Fellow American, You might not know me very well – probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress. So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for. To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=GF7IzDf3RcTo%2FsfszqECapQIqyq86nmKPguYt9NRTc2bMioCQMvwanvfol7UkBnc0kdQRzNLiI3hC9d7PBcvHRyNWJjDYKhVlTqvrzhkSudiz9GpWJF4v7UbFhSsqmjKMagvwaUbQlJHxxf3MoB7Rf%2F%2FESYmzLivLymq6UWvjQkKBZOtHJTGtNEscRHVa1stTeA%2Fh6ByQik8XZZN2WiZm1hmXmCUzWYwi0sZt5LerKuLuWpiErm8UlvkqV%2F0WikAYFYTiGFfQBr6689kkydSxNbRxaNM8ONbFfBBgfEuVzQGAeDVLiS5tUIF7b7tmDTeZX4wxpHbiau2ncdxnBIFDucshm61mWWcCAQ86Ib5MrdJ5KGfgEfdaQMzWSKDLb9HVk0nEjGoarntBGsjMyNwqZalGbU2r68lugwBAKRw5c%2FqXZ0S422Cv0hNFqHgk8pz .
Peter, have you heard the news out of Florida?
Former Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell just launched her campaign to DEFEAT extremist Republican Sen. Rick Scott! This is one of our best — and only — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024.
Experts are already saying that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection — and early polling puts Debbie ONE POINT AHEAD in this neck-and-neck race. But last time around, Scott spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Debbie is counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors like you to build a war chest capable of taking on Rick Scott’s money machine in this critical battleground race. Please, will you split $10 or more between Debbie and Roland Gutierrez before midnight to become a Founding Donor in our fight to flip Florida blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell! If he had things his way, he’d end Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on working families, and ban abortions nationwide.
But here’s the good news: As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. He won his seat last time with only 0.12% of the vote — and now, experts at CNN, Roll Call, and FiveThirtyEight are calling Florida one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2024.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running against him to defend our democracy, strengthen our economy, stop gun violence, and protect reproductive rights. In an election year as critical as 2024, we must take advantage of this incredible opportunity to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.
With Rick Scott sitting on a massive war chest, the only way Debbie can fight back and win is with a surge of grassroots resources from people like YOU.
So please, Peter, will you split a donation right now and become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat Rick Scott and defend our majority? Together, we can show Scott that he can’t buy his way back to the Senate. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

body:
the GOP is attacking Raskin relentlessly for calling out Trump...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)
---
**Breaking: Jamie Raskin Says Donald Trump’s Attack on Judges Pose Risk to Judiciary: “He’s like a mob boss”** | [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm) The GOP is attacking Rep. Jamie Raskin relentlessly for calling out Trump and trying to protect our country.

Rep. Raskin needs support from Democrats ASAP. We can’t let the GOP get away with this.

**[We’re starting a MASSIVE petition to show Raskin that Democrats have his back. Can we count on your signature by 10:00 AM tomorrow?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)** | [SIGN NOW: STAND WITH REP. RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin/?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)
---
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)
**** 30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ****
**Here are just 3 of the things that Raskin did to infuriate the GOP:**

✅ Serve as an impeachment manager for BOTH of Trump’s impeachments.
✅ Serve as a member of the January 6th Committee.
✅ **Humiliate the House GOP by exposing GOP’s impeachment inquiry into President Biden as a partisan sham.**

**[We need anti-corruption Democrats like Raskin to combat corrupt Republicans. Please, sign our urgent petition to stand with Raskin »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)**
[SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION TO STAND WITH REP. JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-j-raskin?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=20349%2E4449941%2EkPDodm)
---
**** 30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ****
Thank you,

_-Fight for Reform_
