clean_body: | | | | It could be worse, but we’re in some trouble... | Peter, I have some bad news to share with you today... Every single dime of that fundraising haul is going to be spent in an effort to defeat me. There’s no way to sugarcoat this. If I’m going to stand a chance at keeping my seat next November, we have to pick up the pace of our fundraising. That all starts right now – our October End-of-Month Deadline is the FIRST deadline of Q4 and we have to start out strong. | | | | | | | Thank you, Mike Lawler Congressman, NY-17 | | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

name: Jon Tester
subject: Republicans are already attacking me on TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks,
I hate to reach out again, but this couldn’t wait.
Republicans are already attacking me on TV—a full six months earlier than the last election. That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.
We’re proudly funded by tens of thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in a few bucks when they can. We immediately put these dollars to work mobilizing supporters, registering Montanans to vote, and fighting back against Mitch McConnell’s misleading attacks. If we want to keep pace in this ultra-competitive race, we have to catch up now.
Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, just ask my team. But I know it’s essential to winning this race and continuing to work on the issues that really matter. So I hope you’ll bear with me when I ask:
Can you chip in any amount that feels right to you today to help us hit our goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton. It truly does make a difference in a people-powered campaign like ours. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks so much. I’ll let you get back to enjoying your day.
Jon

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: We’re wasting $160,000 per month on what?!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I need not remind you that the federal government is 32 trillion dollars in debt. Really, that means our children and grandchildren are 32 trillion in debt — Washington has zero interest in paying off their financial obligations; they’re simply planning on passing them down to future generations.
I can imagine you’re sick of it — that’s why we need you to sign this important petition now.
| | | [ **Join the Fight TODAY!** ](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckT-PnDAQxT-N6VjBmDVQUCThUIpLihTXWmN7YL3xH4LNrTafPmK1iaJrXDw_vZn3G_Srs_N9YO1nBnCxJjEAxj8xgOXt_br_gN_fcrlx9VK-XP1rdfzCFwaQ7yv9sz5TTuTRukNtx8IMjaauEaqgoRZ9d4YOOiguAxnDa-QNAhqcexTYQ9twhfrci9b0hR2gAl5X0EENDW9P7VxV9VnUqmm0QSTWVMegUwyEnjarMcwOl5OOvnDDJec1PfaaGEw6plPYtaM9rbhQOkwMJofB2LAwmFTcDG3lDZ0rb5gylcD4tGcvPRm7e8bHZy1xiCnumybGx__wBO3kE8HTpdGvaJfA-PhoIsrjkTom6WzKcqOQ0Um1YTAy0E3quN7lFX-STLu6ks5Sy4jz37gYMoXM-Bi0K_vvU_9OX89qZCBkcNYwPn4QH5fko3qjmMUv81psg1lv1jmbRMuaankA1NH_CQAA__-RbqYl)
---
| | Thirty-two trillion (that’s twelve zeroes) is an incomprehensible number for most Americans, but when you see how Washington manages its money, well... it’s not hard to see how they wrecked the country so badly. For example, when Biden took office, his administration immediately ended the border wall project. Ever since, even as the nation suffered a terrible border crisis, the Department of Defense has sat on 20,822 unused border wall panels. Adding insult to injury, storing the materials costs $160,000 every single month. It should be clear to you that our federal government is hopelessly broken. Holding your breath waiting for Congress to tackle the debt is useless. In fact, the more we wait for Washington to fix itself, the worse the problem gets. **[That’s why I’m urging you, right now, to sign the Convention of States petition for an Article V convention -– the only viable solution to federal overreach and reckless spending.](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckb2SnDAQhJ9GZFAw0gkICGxzODknDi5VDdIsq7V-MBLG66d3sbV2uZwoaHX1TH-DfnX2ch9Y-5EBXK1JDIDxDwxgef9x27_Cry-53Pj8Wr7e_Ft9_sInBpDvK_21PlMq8mjdqbZjYQahqRNyLmhoZN-9QAcdFNehFk2nEWVbdy9ETW_mXoheztCLfhadKOwANfCmhg4aELyt2ktdNy-ymYXQBpGYqM9BVQyEnjarMVwcLpWOvnDDNec1PfaaGEw6pirs2tGeVlwonSYGk8NgbFgYTHPcDG3lgc6VB6ZMJTA-7dkrT8bunvHxWUueYor7ponx8R88QTv1RPB0afQr2iUwPj6ayPJ8lI5JOZuy2ihkdGreMBgV6FA6rnd1w2-k0j7fSGelVcTLn7gYMoXM-Bi0K9Pn_uA_Dzm1DKQKzhrGx__ExyX5OL9TzPK7eSu2wayHdc4m2TJRLw-AOvrfAQAA__8ZdaWN)** Calling an Article V convention is about so much more than just balancing the Feds’ outrageous budget. clean_body: | | | Friend, I need not remind you that the federal government is 32 trillion dollars in debt. Really, that means our children and grandchildren are 32 trillion in debt — Washington has zero interest in paying off their financial obligations; they’re simply planning on passing them down to future generations. I can imagine you’re sick of it — that’s why we need you to sign this important petition now. | | | | | Thirty-two trillion (that’s twelve zeroes) is an incomprehensible number for most Americans, but when you see how Washington manages its money, well... it’s not hard to see how they wrecked the country so badly. For example, when Biden took office, his administration immediately ended the border wall project. Ever since, even as the nation suffered a terrible border crisis, the Department of Defense has sat on 20,822 unused border wall panels. Adding insult to injury, storing the materials costs $160,000 every single month. It should be clear to you that our federal government is hopelessly broken. Holding your breath waiting for Congress to tackle the debt is useless. In fact, the more we wait for Washington to fix itself, the worse the problem gets. Calling an Article V convention is about so much more than just balancing the Feds’ outrageous budget. It’s about bringing power back to the states and people and ending Washington’s runaway reign. Article V comes to us straight from our Founding Fathers and is endorsed by many well-known patriots today. But we need your help! | | | | | For America’s future, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action | |

Peter, The truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real change in every corner of the state. **And I am _all in_ to make real change happen.**

But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight.
* They know the polls are tied.
* They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the country.
* They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership and lies.
* **But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over our campaign.**

It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way.

Mississippi can’t afford four more years of corrupt leadership. So, I’m asking you to step up, Peter. [**_Please, will you split a donation between the GA Dems and my campaign to keep our fundraising on track? We cannot afford to fall short or show any weakness during this crucial moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72369430/435113793/-180861650?refcode=20231028.2_BP_10AL&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWYwMWEwZi1kZDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_RFeCNJlDa-zV9S9cdnh7O0jBJELM9-zBGDPQ4tU0o=)**_

With immense gratitude,

Brandon Presley

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: We're Mainers
body:
we'll work every day to support one another
[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-r/) Peter,Last night, we saw the first part of this horrific tragedy move behind us. We can all sleep a little easier knowing the deranged killer who attacked our way of life is no thronger a threat to our families, or to law enforcement leading the search.On Wednesday, we were all shaken to our very core. We're Mainers, we're a community of neighbors that work every day to support one another. And because of who we are, how we were raised - we will pull through this together. We will honor the victims, support their friends and families, and be grateful for our law enforcement who put themselves at risk every day.We will also protect our way of life, and the Constitution. While we are still working to mourn and heal, politicians in Washington DC are already looking to exploit our tragedy for their political gain. **_I won't stand for it._**Stay safe,Mike Soboleski
Republican Candidate for Congress- CD-2 [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-y/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-i/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-d/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-h/) | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country is going in the wrong direction. [Preferences](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/y-xpulyd-150DA8AB-ddldgdkhd-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xpulyd-ddldgdkhd-u/)
---

subject: Courtesy Reminder Before The Deadline

body:
Due on the last day of the month at 11:59 PM

**FROM THE DESK OF THE PRESIDENT**
Friend,

We missed our deadline. The 2024 RED WAVE is in grave danger. It's incredible how far we've come, but when they told me we missed our deadline, WOW, I was shocked.

It's no secret that we need a majority in the next election -- there are 34 seats up for grabs, and every single one is a MUST-WIN if we're going to WIN and Take Back America.

We're almost a year away from the most critical election of our entire lives -- and if we don't win -- this country's in SERIOUS TROUBLE.

I didn't want to be the one to tell you -- but this is bad. [**I need your help as soon as possible.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6df1e442735248c6a6df473c19ff20d8&_e=f4I3fVNOeDqQi9gvJft3PyaAS3C1-QQFIalxc9H5w13le0nrS4Kw0Kb-LqajJ34SFydJDK4xi_BZHCJAuU-ToL8cdwAAR_oznOGj8trZ-1AbGQUaTNCSXdAfPLaik3ZXUpDYaTrlqMWmDBcn7dQPEf_onDMr_5PNjHY9otwNnYlx37yDflb_fsECPmoMtDwNQvqHo1-W9W5aW5_Yxh-uWGYhQe3CJDOL3XEhc2U1RFDRMolzsO__yNwu_Y9LHHr4qiZeGBUytdSx9qL-4xizJYav8t_1ALzMWrT55jce3EBET0f89tCMjLnrwMTFKgGb7eFAsuoK2aKVMOeQilCWKDkfcxA1x3Om9cG0-u_CXlebR81yrZfhex__5UiexjlWtdo6fZxKJEhfPe9-ARsTBg%3D%3D)

**This is the last time I 'll be reaching out to you about this -- I'm heading to a meeting soon to discuss the next steps -- and I want to tell everyone YOU were the first person to step up. **

**Since this deadline was so HUGE, and we missed it BIGLY, I 'm personally offering you a 25X Impact on your contribution.** [**Click the buttons below, donate, and help TAKE BACK AMERICA!**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6df1e442735248c6a6df473c19ff20d8&_e=f4I3fVNOeDqQi9gvJft3PyaAS3C1-QQFIalxc9H5w13le0nrS4Kw0Kb-LqajJ34SFydJDK4xi_BZHCJAuU-ToL8cdwAAR_oznOGj8trZ-1AbGQUaTNCSXdAfPLaik3ZXUpDYaTrlqMWmDBcn7dQPEf_onDMr_5PNjHY9otwNnYlx37yDflb_fsECPmoMtDwNQvqHo1-W9W5aW5_Yxh-uWGYhQe3CJDOL3XEhc2U1RFDRMolzsO__yNwu_Y9LHHr4dUF72oGIw1umEa9GbiTg0ucqNPiqyajLHxCGI7gDTrDnpbNSDd9PGKz6nPm4_8hCOtjukuGLkUnKrYhOrjAF1GPhLcLpx2bgmslFb2XFo3AQbWJC_3FwKXV3LSbYFFWMPOEkNy8w_5lQUelAM-JaQA%3D%3D)

clean_body: | FROM THE DESK OF THE PRESIDENT Friend, We missed our deadline. The 2024 RED WAVE is in grave danger. It's incredible how far we've come, but when they told me we missed our deadline, WOW, I was shocked. It's no secret that we need a majority in the next election -- there are 34 seats up for grabs, and every single one is a MUST-WIN if we're going to WIN and Take Back America. We're almost a year away from the most critical election of our entire lives -- and if we don't win -- this country's in SERIOUS TROUBLE. I didn't want to be the one to tell you -- but this is bad. This is the last time I 'll be reaching out to you about this -- I'm heading to a meeting soon to discuss the next steps -- and I want to tell everyone YOU were the first person to step up. Since this deadline was so HUGE, and we missed it BIGLY, I 'm personally offering you a 25X Impact on your contribution. | Everything and ANYTHING helps. We're fighting for our freedoms, and many are already willing to give it up. I'm counting on you. Best, The President of the GOP Senate Victory PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Jacky
subject: You can read this in 60 seconds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend, this won't take more than 60 seconds:

CNN has ranked me as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot. And now, a poll shows me _**2 points down**_ in the race that will likely decide Senate control. That's why Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent, setting his sights on me as a top target for defeat.

[_So I have to ask directly: Will you please donate $20 or more to my campaign and Zak Malamed before my midnight fundraising deadline to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue? The only way I can win is with your critical grassroots support._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?source=em231028-zm-jr-split&refcode2=543_8507_2wLVYp&akid=543%2E8507%2E2wLVYp)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $20 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em20231028-jr-split-el&refcode2=543_8507_2wLVYp&akid=543%2E8507%2E2wLVYp) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231028-jr-split-el&refcode2=543_8507_2wLVYp&akid=543%2E8507%2E2wLVYp) [Split $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231028-jr-split-el&refcode2=543_8507_2wLVYp&akid=543%2E8507%2E2wLVYp) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20&amount=30&refcode=em20231028-jr-split-el&refcode2=543_8507_2wLVYp&akid=543%2E8507%2E2wLVYp)

Hi team — I want to share something important with you today. As October comes to a close, we’re watching our fundraising results closely. Right now, we still need a few more folks to chip in, so we’ve set a goal to reach 500 contributions before midnight on Tuesday. **[Before I continue, will you chip in $5, $10, or more to help us reach our goal before the deadline expires on Tuesday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72369838/435114215/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FjM2I1OC1kZDc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSHSpnMpxoFi874xigdysqI4p2KubCIHf84N9-5FCtQ=)** Thanks to the support of this team, I've been able to keep my focus on building bipartisan relationships to break through gridlock and expand access to good-paying jobs, ensure veterans get the care they’ve earned, and invest in our infrastructure. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Team – can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
I need your help to ensure we have what it takes to win this tough race. |
#
---
Hey folks, this is Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear. We're quickly approaching Election Day in the race for Kentucky governor, and I need your help to ensure we have what it takes to win this tough race. **If you're ready to help us protect Kentucky's progress, you can split a donation between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC here now. →
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flhp-em-beshear?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72369861/435114243/-175233556?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZhYzNiNTgtZGQ3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1tk4a4mXytIOsB4wGZGOp-efDEvKO8HFEu3vP4vU1Jk=)** Otherwise, let me explain where this race stands: Election experts are predicting this will be the closest race in the entire country this November, and Politico is calling the match-up between me and my opponent **"dramatically close."** I'm not surprised, team. I won the race for governor in 2019 by just over 5,000 votes. We always knew this race would be just as close. That's why I'm also not surprised that my opponent and his allies are spending millions to attack me. They think their deep pockets can buy this race and undo all the progress we've made. We can't let that happen. I was able to beat the odds and win in 2019 because of grassroots supporters like you. If we're going to do it again, I need you by my side from now until the polls close on Election Day. **So I'm asking, team: Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC? I can't win this tough race and protect the progress we've made in Kentucky without you. →
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flhp-em-beshear?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72369862/435114244/-175233556?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZhYzNiNTgtZGQ3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1tk4a4mXytIOsB4wGZGOp-efDEvKO8HFEu3vP4vU1Jk=)** Thank you, Andy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72369863/435114245/-175233556?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231028_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZhYzNiNTgtZGQ3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1tk4a4mXytIOsB4wGZGOp-efDEvKO8HFEu3vP4vU1Jk=)

Chris Christie Calls For Strong American Leadership In Remarks To Republican Jewish Coalition | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f10cddbc141f/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13560276?e=d0a9afa930)

---
**Chris Christie Calls For Strong American Leadership In Remarks To Republican Jewish Coalition
**
Today, Governor Chris Christie addressed the Republican Jewish Coalition in Las Vegas, NV.
Christie’s remarks focused on the role of American leadership in the world, the rise of anti-Semitism, and the steadfast support that a Christie administration would have for Israel and our allies across the world.
[The Messenger](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=dea1bf99c2&e=d0a9afa930): _“Republican presidential candidate Chris Christie spoke against the ‘unserious people’ who want America to be isolated from the rest of the world during remarks at the Republican Jewish Coalition Conference Saturday. ‘The question is will America walk away in fear, using our own problems internally as justification for that?’ said Christie. ‘I say we will not, and we cannot.’"_
Below are a few highlights from Christie’s speech:
**“Today Is Too Serious A Day For Pettiness And Unserious People”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=bf2f908f27&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Bulwark of Freedom And Liberty”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a11e74cf07&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Jewish Students Are Living In Fear On Campuses”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=987981dfab&e=d0a9afa930)
**“There Is No Substitute For American Leadership In This World”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a03f97a879&e=d0a9afa930)
| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e2288d649f&e=d0a9afa930)

we need 75,000 Dems to speak up now:
| | |
---
**DEVELOPING FROM WASHINGTON:**
**Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand introduces a resolution to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution.**
Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for nearly 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
Since Kirsten announced this resolution, so many Democrats have already added their names to stand with her and show their support for the ERA. Now, we've set a HUGE end-of-month goal to reach 75,000 signatures, and we're counting on your help to do it!
**[Please, friend, it's time to raise our voices as one and DEMAND gender equity — will you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72376922/435116781/1279631219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4535-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTFmNWQzYS1lMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bi9SKPI7bmxG8kGcAvcylJljsQC_0uJSIEYxGAd2pa4=&emci=2fa9cf46-aa72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5e1f5d3a-e275-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple. **Adding the ERA to our Constitution would give us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the entire country.**
Right now, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it, and it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced new legislation that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this legislation, finally establish gender equality in our Constitution and restore reproductive freedoms nationwide.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. **[_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show Kirsten that you support the ERA? She's counting on 75,000 signatures before our end-of-month deadline!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72376924/435116783/1279631219?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4535-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTFmNWQzYS1lMjc1LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bi9SKPI7bmxG8kGcAvcylJljsQC_0uJSIEYxGAd2pa4=&emci=2fa9cf46-aa72-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5e1f5d3a-e275-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

---
Since the moment I declared I would run for president as a political outsider, the Left has tried to break my spirit. They’ve tried to get me to cave and surrender.

---
And much to their grave disappointment, I have never yielded once. I have remained what is often called a _“happy warrior”_ in our mission to Make America Great Again!
---
**Even if ALL of the Democrats’ vicious attacks succeed – if they impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me, if they even put me in jail as an innocent man – there’s one thing they still can NEVER take from me...**** _my faith._**
---
And that goes for _all of us_ , Patriot.

---
No matter how bad things become, NO ONE can ever rob you of your _hope_ for a better tomorrow.

---
Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope.

---
And I’ll let you in on a little secret – it drives the Left CRAZY to see us optimistic and hopeful during these dark moments...

---
_..._** _Because it reminds them that they do NOT have power over us._**

---
We are a movement of brave, unyielding patriots united by a _LOVE_ for our country. It’s called Make America Great Again!

---
We want nothing else than to make our nation prosperous, peaceful, and proud again. _That’s it!_

---
So, while a dark cloud may be hanging over our country today, I have faith, nevertheless, that we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---
_With yet another trial set to start right at the end of the month, I ask that you make a contribution before the October end-of-month deadline to ensure we prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and save our great country.

body:
[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2179?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_BrandonPresley_BrandonPresley_NA_eom.3.5&t=1001&akid=6460%2E1827488%2EjcwnC9 ][IMG]
Derek, it’s been
one heck of a ride, and I can hardly believe we're just 10 days out from
Election Day. Let me tell you where my race stands and how you can help
power my campaign to the finish line.

A recent poll shows my race VIRTUALLY TIED 45% to 46%. And the political
experts at Cook Political Report just upgraded our chances of flipping
Mississippi blue! They know what we know: Tate Reeves is beatable.

The thing is, I can’t beat him by myself. I need the support of this
grassroots team. [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2179?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_BrandonPresley_BrandonPresley_NA_eom.3.5&t=1002&akid=6460%2E1827488%2EjcwnC9 ]So please, will you split $10 between
Tony Evers and my campaign? Any amount makes a major difference.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2179?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231028_FR_eom_0_3MO_BrandonPresley_BrandonPresley_NA_eom.3.5&t=1003&akid=6460%2E1827488%2EjcwnC9 ]DONATE NOW

Derek, the
truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is
happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real
change in every corner of the state. And I am all in to make real change
happen.

But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight.

* They know the polls are tied.
* They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the
country.
* They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership
and lies.
* But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over
our campaign.

It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician
like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been
throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way.

Mississippi can’t afford four more years of corrupt leadership. So, I’m
asking you to step up,

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Derek, it’s been one heck of a ride, and I can hardly believe we're just 10 days out from Election Day. Let me tell you where my race stands and how you can help power my campaign to the finish line. A recent poll shows my race VIRTUALLY TIED 45% to 46%. And the political experts at Cook Political Report just upgraded our chances of flipping Mississippi blue! They know what we know: Tate Reeves is beatable. The thing is, I can’t beat him by myself. I need the support of this grassroots team. [ ]So please, will you split $10 between Tony Evers and my campaign? Any amount makes a major difference. [ ]DONATE NOW Derek, the truth is we didn’t need fancy stats to know that something big is happening here in Mississippi. You can just feel the energy for real change in every corner of the state. And I am all in to make real change happen. But Tate Reeves and his allies won't go down without a fight. They know the polls are tied. They know Reeves is one of the most unpopular governors in the country. They know that Mississippians have had enough of his failed leadership and lies. But they also know that Reeves has a HUGE fundraising advantage over our campaign. It’s not easy to take on a well-funded, bought-and-paid-for politician like Tate Reeves. And because he knows this race is tight, he’s been throwing the kitchen sink at us every step of the way. Mississippi can’t afford four more years of corrupt leadership. So, I’m asking you to step up, Derek. [ ]Please, will you split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign to keep our fundraising on track? We cannot afford to fall short or show any weakness during this crucial moment. Contrary to their beliefs, the “Deep State” is not funding me — I rely on grassroots donations from Americans like you who want to restore trust in our democracy. body:
We need an immediate ceasefire, but the White House and Congress continue to unconditionally support the Israeli government’s genocidal actions. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvFl4R5d-8fM70nlOPhtc7Mvhxv03b1QmTptmsHxzkUC_mRlgBn2SlD1EcZMRnlUJCoyAtRV8hydvgbxO0uBCM7PW6YmvQq3B56mpgKoqigZPKQt298VOTXsOimEFESmQSq11lBWLFXU8C4DirWRjAdqG7Zz7mD-_j88OoEVjHJJ2ouKfCbCHuB2-eqoW-kikKaj1ZMHdFgxsw0gAdtPvFDA/40t/kUpvzmdzTfaKCgljqg2yKw/h0/cfum3VDJiVTGAVLR1eHzqhcAS4yn4I61NFJIdD1Dofw)
---
Friend, After dropping 12,000 tons of bombs on Gaza—the size of the nuclear bomb that the U.S. dropped on Hiroshima—the Israeli military said it was “expanding” ground invasion actions yesterday, then destroyed Gaza’s Internet and phone service. As a Palestinian in the West Bank said:_“We’ve been seeing these horrible things and massacres when it’s live on TV, so now what will happen when there’s a total blackout?”_ We need an immediate ceasefire, but the White House and Congress continue to unconditionally support the Israeli government’s genocidal actions. **[Please join me, elected officials from across the country, and humanitarian organizations for a virtual conversation about the crisis in Gaza and the urgent work to save lives.
